name: GA2A
subject: The 2nd Amendment is Under Attack: Shield the 2nd
body:
No images? [Click here](https://blast.pushdigital.com/t/r-e-tyjhkie-btjuilkuuy-o/) [](https://blast.pushdigital.com/t/r-l-tyjhkie-btjuilkuuy-r/)
# **The 2nd Amendment is Under Attack: Shield the 2nd**
Friend, Here at [GA2A, formerly GeorgiaCarry.org](https://blast.pushdigital.com/t/r-l-tyjhkie-btjuilkuuy-y/), we believe that law-abiding citizens have the right to own and carry the firearm of their choice for any reason other than to commit a crime. Full stop. No questions asked. This year, GA2A, played a critical role in the passage of the historic Constitutional Carry bill at the Georgia State Capitol. While proud of our accomplishments, there's still more work to be done.
**GA2A members are not just numbers, they are partners and you 're invited to join.** [Click Here to Become a Member](https://blast.pushdigital.com/t/r-l-tyjhkie-btjuilkuuy-j/) Annual memberships start at only $20 or you could become a lifetime supporter of the 2nd Amendment for just $500. Don't lose sight of this important battle to [Shield the 2nd](https://blast.pushdigital.com/t/r-l-tyjhkie-btjuilkuuy-t/) in Georgia. [Join today!](https://blast.pushdigital.com/t/r-l-tyjhkie-btjuilkuuy-i/) From, Jerry HenryExecutive Director GA2A [Click Here to Join Now](https://blast.pushdigital.com/t/r-l-tyjhkie-btjuilkuuy-d/) [](https://blast.pushdigital.com/t/r-l-tyjhkie-btjuilkuuy-h/)[](https://blast.pushdigital.com/t/r-l-tyjhkie-btjuilkuuy-k/) [](https://blast.pushdigital.com/t/r-l-tyjhkie-btjuilkuuy-u/) | Georgia Second Amendment, IncPO Box 142924

name: Bflow555
subject: Berney's Campaign Update for May
body:
Happy Mother's Day, Dear Friends,

We have been pretty busy over the last few months, building a winning campaign. My team and I thank you for your kind and generous support and attention. We expect to win Maryland's District 2 GOP Primary on 19 July, and we will go on to win the general election against Dutch Ruppersberger. We will accomplish this feat by outworking the competition. We will do our best to keep you updated on social media and our website. If you have questions, feel free to contact me.

The biggest effort for us has been getting the word out about our campaign. We dispatched roughly 5000 palm cards and we expect a new batch to arrive any day now. We placed 50 yard signs so far and we are looking to place many more. If you would like yard signs or palm cards, let me know and I will bring them to you. We are working on new radio ads on WCBM and working to increase our social media presence. And we hope to see you at a few soon to be announced fund raising events.

If you have a particular skill set and the time to support our cause, the time has come to have you as a volunteer. Particularly, we need to make a huge number of phone calls, we need to distribute a great number of yard signs, we need to knock on many doors and we are in need of volunteers with video and audio editing skills. If you have skills to volunteer, please contact me. And as always, we really need your financial support, if we are to change the politics in Maryland.

Here are our major calendar events for this month, as of today:

\- 09 May - WUBO Radio w/Dr Charlene "Lady J" Jenkins - "What Up Baltimore" Online Radio Show, 8-9 pm - +1 443-297-4753
\- 12 May - Lincoln Regan Douglas Dinner Baltimore City, Best Western Plus Hotel & Conference Center, 5625 O'Donnell St, Baltimore, MD 21224
\- 15 May - Carroll Veterans Celebration - Carroll County Farm Museum, 500 S Center St, Westminster, MD 21157
\- 17 May - Central Baltimore County Republican Club - Ryleigh's Oyster House - 22 W. Padonia Rd, Cockeysville, MD
\- 19 May - America and Maryland First Town Hall - 2 Pythian Dr. Edgewater, MD
\- 23 May - District 2 Candidate Forum Invitation!/Tri-District Republican Club - 40 S Church St, Westminster, MD
\- 24 May - Lunch with WCBM's Bruce Elliott at Pappas Restaurant - 550 Cranbrook Road, Cockeysville, MD 21030

Other events will be added to our calendar later, but for now, these are our major commitments for the month. For those of you who I have not met, I hope to meet you at one of the events listed above.
Please join us if your schedule allows.

Sincere Thanks,

_**_Berney_**

Berney Flowers
Candidate For Congress
Maryland's 2nd District
[info@berneyflowers.com](mailto:info@berneyflowers.com)
https://berneyflowers.com_
_Facebook: Berney __Flowers_ _ For Congress_
_443 267-4078_

_"Be The Change You Want to See"_

name: =?utf-8?Q?Benda=20for=20Congress?=
subject: Matt Benda will fight to protect Democracy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BENDA FOR CONGRESS](https://bendaforcongress
body:
| | | |
---
| | | Dear Peter, In January 2017, the Department of Homeland Security declared the U.S. election systems a part of the _nation’s critical infrastructure_. We also know that strengthening our critical infrastructure from cyber-security has also been identified as a national priority.

With this background, why is it so hard to obtain election information from our local county officials in southern Minnesota?

Many concerned citizens have shared their outrage over not receiving cooperation from local election officials in obtaining election information. In response, I quickly initiated a series of public data requests in five counties – Olmsted, Rice, Blue Earth, Fillmore and Nobles.

My questions were simple – provide an inventory of the election machines they use, including the software, inspections, incident logs, vendors, and other details. **To date, I have not received this information from any of the five counties.** Based upon written responses I’ve seen from other similar data requests; I expect that these disclosures will be incomplete and hidden behind the artificial shroud of “nonpublic security data.”

__Trust me, the more resistance we receive in obtaining this information the more persistent I will become.__ Citizens must be allowed to participate in the important role of protecting our critical infrastructure. Government works for us, not in a secret world beyond our view.

I expect a fight ahead. Will you [help](https://bendaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ace2cfdb811af9316dec053d7&id=3ce91298b9&e=58a207e9d5) me?

Sincerely,
---
|
---
| Matt Benda
507-383-4679
[matt@bendaforcongress.com](mailto:matt@bendaforcongress.com)
---
| P.S. Later today I will be watching the world premier of 2,000 Mules, a documentary billed to expose a ballot-harvesting scheme during the 2020 election. Please share your thoughts with me following this viewing.
---
|
---
| [HELP MATT WIN!](https://bendaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ace2cfdb811af9316dec053d7&id=d214e1d672&e=58a207e9d5 "HELP MATT WIN!")

You can also vote early at the office of your local elections official. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Fighting for the lives of the unborn
body:
I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of human life. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6977%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=j1jUtyhywb4nKixL%2bXJYJg&sysid=1)
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I feel like our culture has forgotten--or ignored--some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of human life. Our society has been infected by an anti-life ideology, treating its most vulnerable members as disposable objects. Abortion that was once thought of as a last resort in a medical emergency has become the new normal. Medicine tells us that life begins at the moment of conception. It also tells us when an unborn baby develops a heartbeat, brainwaves, and nervous system. Yet, despite all of this, the unborn are not treated as though they are alive or even human. **As a surgeon, I have operated on infants pre-birth. I can assure you that they are very much alive.** [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61889%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jWqauFAsC7PDRRp8ZU%2fiWA&sysid=1)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ Life is a precious gift that has been given to us from our creator. No person is disposable, and every life is precious according to Him. I believe that everyone deserves life, even those who have been denied this right by our society. I believe that together we can make a difference and bring dignity and a voice to the unborn. I also believe that I’m not alone in this belief. I believe that you believe that too. I’ve started working with a group of like-minded individuals who are looking to change our culture. We want to build a society that values life but that takes people like you and I making a commitment. The first step is clearly stating what we believe and what we are willing to do to protect the lives of the unborn. [**Will you join me today and stand up for those who cannot do it for themselves?**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61880%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=n04OARWYKHWonTO09IlgKw&sysid=1) I’ve created a new pro-life pledge; I’d love your support. Would you read the pledge below to see if you align with our shared goals and are willing to commit to fighting for the lives of the unborn? [https://offers.americancornerstone.org/pro-life-statement/](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61881%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nOhf%2fa0xyQrGC3eyFrg2oQ&sysid=1) Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright(C) 2022 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6977%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=j1jUtyhywb4nKixL%2bXJYJg&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6977%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=j1jUtyhywb4nKixL%2bXJYJg&sysid=1)

name: Herschel Walker
subject: There isn't much time left
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand for America PAC
body:
| | | Friend,

There isn't much time left, so I'll make this quick.

Georgians started casting their ballots on May 2, and we need your help.

To defeat Senator Raphael Warnock in November, I must win the Republican primary that's rapidly approaching.

If Senator Warnock wins again, there will be dire consequences for our country. Not only will we be re-electing a Democrat who has supported the disastrous Biden agenda nearly 100% of the time during his first term, we'll be risking our chance of taking back the Senate majority.

_**[If you have anything to spare, we're asking you to step up today to help us win in Georgia and reclaim the conservative majority in the Senate.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6633eu52fndo23eesnrvecg070alvb5h5gif73g_rp22sh2s8i66pb2c1g62o36chh2bs "If you have anything to spare, we’re asking you to step up today to help us win in Georgia and reclaim the conservative majority in the Senate.")**_

---
| | | [CONTRIBUTE NOW](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zivl6vimnvi2gdeac6kh8u3jeb7ci6alikbmp4lo_rp22sh2s8i66pb2c1g62o36chh2bs)
---

All eyes are on Georgia. We cannot afford to let the Democrats win the Peach State again.

**We _can_ win. In fact, the latest polls show us slightly ahead of Senator Warnock!**

That's why Democrats are rushing in millions of dollars to fuel my opponent's campaign. In the first three months of the year, he raised a record-breaking $13.6 MILLION!

If we can gather the resources, we can defeat Senator Warnock and flip the Senate.

**Will you help us win the Republican primary that 's quickly approaching and defeat our Democrat opponent in November?** Every single dollar you give will impact how many more doors we can knock, phone calls we can make, signs we can distribute, and voters we can reach.

_**[Please pitch in anything you're able ASAP, even if it's just $3.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z258lgj3lf6tppn1r47t8t2musa3vlk5s3p6cs50_rp22sh2s8i66pb2c1g62o36chh2bs "Please pitch in anything you’re able ASAP, even if it’s just $3.")**_

Thank you in advance for your generous support.

To victory,

Herschel Walker

---
| | | [CONTRIBUTE NOW](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ziqccfo00qtnjq40oeaan1k6k7bun7o71kio7cto_rp22sh2s8i66pb2c1g62o36chh2bs)
---
|
---

name: Gary Sinise
subject: Most don't know this about Memorial Day
body:
It’s Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 and The Green Mile — but the role that cha
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjkpvhiui6gnl8pks6d8q5ote6rmc4gideldu1qo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2u5r34d3k6phreotl69p3csjh63ib6tj4cdib0pjj6iqn2dpgmapn9d30sdi62tpnq9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhm0shicoq6ecr2cur6cphgm2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8gq48bi4bh28or5c9g60ob0cdi649fg)
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbq2ear2hmbtlh3kk63ju1ilsn8fmrpe76nebgvo_rp22sh2s8i66pb2c1g62o33chh2bs)
---
Fellow American, It’s Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like _Apollo 13_ and _The Green Mile_ — but the role that changed my life, and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, was as Lt. Dan in _Forrest Gump_. **This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.** The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, the American Veterans Center is bringing it BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country. [**Fellow American, the National Memorial Day Parade is PRIMARILY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zma04tibd96unsifaf2albi1lr4a4a4a7vjt9bh0_rp22sh2s8i66pb2c1g62o33chh2bs)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1m3tepler7a1g4m30bdieimjth0hsofrkv20968_rp22sh2s8i66pb2c1g62o33chh2bs)
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zga50g7plhi05dmmtgrml0lruvvm4bl6gvmd14b8_rp22sh2s8i66pb2c1g62o33chh2bs)
---
When the American Veterans Center first called me more than 15 years ago and invited me to the National Memorial Day Parade, I was honored to join the event to remember our fallen heroes. The American Veterans Center revived the Parade in 2005 after it had been dormant for nearly 70 years. Now, in 2022, they’re bringing the Parade back to its full-scale glory after two years of pandemic precautions. Every American should be proud that generations of our brave servicemen and servicewomen, from the last of our “Greatest Generation” heroes of World War II to our veterans from Afghanistan and Iraq, will get the public thanks for their service that they deserve this year. But I know that the defenders and families of the fallen who will join me in the National Memorial Day Parade will be thinking of their friends and loved ones who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country — the brave Americans we honor on Memorial Day. **Sadly, our country is losing hundreds of World War II veterans each day, so the mission of the National Memorial Day Parade is _more important now than ever_ — as this year’s event may be the LAST opportunity for our WWII heroes to commemorate their friends who never came home.** [**Please make your most generous contribution of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, to support the National Memorial Day Parade and make it the tribute that our nation’s heroes deserve.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdqu2vlmmhtoaap62e83gojkl4n0udctfq14u4s0_rp22sh2s8i66pb2c1g62o33chh2bs)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8gl7l13op4rt1e3gblnq6vlai26f6hl7eqm3f60_rp22sh2s8i66pb2c1g62o33chh2bs)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, _the entire parade_ costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy’s Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that’s contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever.
* Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.
* Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom.

---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zeh93ge459unb0ms043qj3octm8vdh0ldpv9nnc8_rp22sh2s8i66pb2c1g62o33chh2bs)
---
[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zs7g34t7c2uhq4gbbkn0bevjacp4vnb2610ckcp8_rp22sh2s8i66pb2c1g62o33chh2bs) But no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you.

On Memorial Day — this year and every year — please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans’ cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, but we can always do a little more._ Fellow American, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please — [**if you're able, make a gift to help fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq0eb8esu4air9d5dk8lae0c18bfqp6ph77n28h0_rp22sh2s8i66pb2c1g62o33chh2bs)
---
Sincerely,

Gary Sinise
Honorary Grand Marshal
National Memorial Day Parade
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z09f9ki1g4mevvs9turn613et9akfirqrkglfds0_rp22sh2s8i66pb2c1g62o33chh2bs)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zalibipql4k02v4vb5b6b9etfhcfsk18hvv7c158_rp22sh2s8i66pb2c1g62o33chh2bs)
---
|
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. © American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Action News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.americanactionnews.com/prefs/9z2zqgp9pt055de1qqujp3aqm6nj661q50oqjmjnhpg).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkb2ekpahs7fjempgrpq0gjopjjf5qnilen6a158_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or5c9g60ob0cdi649fg)

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Standing up for life
body:
I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of h
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zf7fbhmclbqlavvaddbnmc2vcgsq96t5q8qi495o_rp22sh2s8i66pb2c1g6ao72cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onmc9gb9djlehgb2sdh63h33cr1e8rr7db26ep69o30mgq7cpr3e1p38s9jcqqn0puie1p68dhgm9j74t1hepge1d3563gbacb4spj6ccdgmdg6fdj5cor61cr66uobapbi4no)

---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of human life. Our society has been infected by an anti-life ideology, treating its most vulnerable members as disposable objects. Abortion that was once thought of as a last resort in a medical emergency has become the new normal. Medicine tells us that life begins at the moment of conception. It also tells us when an unborn baby develops a heartbeat, brainwaves, and nervous system. Yet, despite all of this, the unborn are not treated as though they are alive or even human. **As a surgeon, I have operated on infants pre-birth. I can assure you that they are very much alive.** [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpl40uviu8jnu44p6qbaolhj9ri9imc3nv3b106g_rp22sh2s8i66pb2c1g6ao72cph2bs)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ Life is a precious gift that has been given to us from our creator. No person is disposable, and every life is precious according to Him. I believe that everyone deserves life, even those who have been denied this right by our society. I believe that together we can make a difference and bring dignity and a voice to the unborn. I also believe that I’m not alone in this belief. I believe that you believe that too. I’ve started working with a group of like-minded individuals who are looking to change our culture. We want to build a society that values life but that takes people like you and I making a commitment. The first step is clearly stating what we believe and what we are willing to do to protect the lives of the unborn. [**Will you join me today and stand up for those who cannot do it for themselves?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2brim8a5efbh2t9oc511106cf0h1ocbjnj7e9ro_rp22sh2s8i66pb2c1g6ao72cph2bs) I’ve created a new pro-life pledge; I’d love your support. Would you read the pledge below to see if you align with our shared goals and are willing to commit to fighting for the lives of the unborn? [https://offers.americancornerstone.org/pro-life-statement/](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2za8d62us1a9s7kvj3ltmh3boo1gpeppd7pgo0f78_rp22sh2s8i66pb2c1g6ao72cph2bs) Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.

# Weekly Newsletter
---
|
---
May 11, 2022 | Issue XVII
---
| |
---
| | Statement From Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt on On the Bill to Drop Disgraced LG Brian Benjamin From the Ballot
---
Once again, Democrats in Albany are prioritizing party politics with their latest plan to change the rules for their own political benefit. Just a few weeks ago, Senate Democrats across the state gleefully announced their support for Brian Benjamin. Now, days after having their gerrymandered district lines thrown out by New York's highest court, they want to change the rules to allow Kathy Hochul to dump him from her ticket to protect their political interests.
This repeated pattern of political self-dealing is shameful, and New Yorkers deserve better. Any member of the legislature who supports this bill is complicit in this corruption and should be voted out this November.
###
---

Working men and women will pay the highest price for Albany's radical climate agenda.
The Democrats, who are proposing this ban, need to pay serious attention to the ramifications of eliminating natural gas - which is a safe, reliable and lower-carbon fuel source - for middle class & trades workers.

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Revealed: Plan to Transform America
body:
Something strange is happening behind the scenes in our financial system. Right now, the mainstream media is completely ignorin
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zl5kplkbegugctlvkifbt5mlig5mm8e2eru8rmho_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbqnbc3ickoeed1lesp75cdke9qmcdb6cth74d3me5gm3d3i65r62ojh6opratr0sv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj666ob6o37mpjmcc9n6koefc5lclp238h1e8he4933clh60o37cdge8oh5u)
| **Why are Bezos and Musk Investing Billions to ‘Transform’ the American Economy? And What Does It Mean for Your Money?** Something strange is happening behind the scenes in our financial system. Right now, the mainstream media is completely ignoring what might be the most important story in the financial world that nobody is talking about. Amid the distractions caused by conflicts overseas, shortages, and inflation, Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen recently took the stage at an event called COP26 in Glasgow, Scotland to address some of the world’s most powerful people, including:
* U.S. President, Joe Biden...
* British Prime Minister, Boris Johnson...
* Canadian Prime Minister, Justin Trudeau...
* French President, Emmanuel Macron...
* ... and many more...
From the stage, Yellen called for world leaders to commit to a [$150 trillion ‘global transition’ of our economy.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqfavubgo112kqkmo8etdvlva5ufulvlvulm30v8_rp22sh2s8i66pb2c1g6eor0shh2bs) Since then, Bank of America has committed, along with 131 countries, 234 cities, and 695 of the world’s biggest companies. Several billionaires, led by Jeff Bezos and Elon Musk have invested in this ‘transformation’ as well. What is it that Yellen, Biden, Trudeau, Bezos and Musk are pushing for with their ‘transformation’? And what does it mean for your money? Investigative journalist and renowned economist, Nomi Prins, who predicted the 2008 market meltdown has followed the money... And what she’s discovered is startling. It has nothing to do with a market crash... a new reserve currency... or the end of fiat. Prins says: **“While most Americans are distracted by mainstream media headlines, I’ve found evidence the elites are spending $150 trillion to ‘transform’ our economy into something we didn’t vote on... didn’t ask for... and very few are prepared for.** **In essence, we’re about to see a stranger, more extreme ‘new normal’ in America.** **Most people will be shocked when they see what happens in the months ahead.”** Prins considers this transformation so urgent, she has agreed to sit down for an interview to get her message in front of as many Americans as possible. For now, there’s no cost to watch. [Go here to see how this ‘transformation’ could affect you – and find out what it means for your money.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zslg69org8fg2l1p566h42eq7sn34nhjr51c23n0_rp22sh2s8i66pb2c1g6eor0shh2bs) [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4i7dr2sdrbhtdur4dm0nggvt6r9j5i8gtr973po_rp22sh2s8i66pb2c1g6eor0shh2bs)

From the stage, Yellen called for world leaders to commit to a Since then, Bank of America has committed, along with 131 countries, 234 cities, and 695 of the world’s biggest companies. Several billionaires, led by Jeff Bezos and Elon Musk have invested in this ‘transformation’ as well. What is it that Yellen, Biden, Trudeau, Bezos and Musk are pushing for with their ‘transformation’? And what does it mean for your money? Investigative journalist and renowned economist, Nomi Prins, who predicted the 2008 market meltdown has followed the money... And what she’s discovered is startling. It has nothing to do with a market crash... a new reserve currency... or the end of fiat. Prins says: “While most Americans are distracted by mainstream media headlines, I’ve found evidence the elites are spending $150 trillion to ‘transform’ our economy into something we didn’t vote on... didn’t ask for... and very few are prepared for. In essence, we’re about to see a stranger, more extreme ‘new normal’ in America. Most people will be shocked when they see what happens in the months ahead.”** Prins considers this transformation so urgent, she has agreed to sit down for an interview to get her message in front of as many Americans as possible. For now, there’s no cost to watch. name: Gary Sinise
subject: Most don't know this about Memorial Day
body:
It’s Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 and The Green Mile — but the role that cha
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zd2teg96j8jqiil73r1mmnfagkr136srkev7vgsg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkir39tdkmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbob1orj6crjaopic8r68c34mop68djgsaqb4odicdpjbcdkc3im0t73mmq38clgcv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3i69j38ppjckrr4t3661ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933clh60o37cdgmcoh5u)
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqrvm2aa8geonlicmsje61ejd94qnoc0tlo00sqo_rp22sh2s8i66pb2c1g6eor1cph2bs)
---
Fellow American, It’s Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like _Apollo 13_ and _The Green Mile_ — but the role that changed my life, and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, was as Lt. Dan in _Forrest Gump_. **This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.** The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, the American Veterans Center is bringing it BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country. [**Fellow American, the National Memorial Day Parade is PRIMARILY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zr9f3f26aagkom9nmk668oeos018m8ssgog55jd0_rp22sh2s8i66pb2c1g6eor1cph2bs)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9mralp7cu9oac9gfo0mgmggfmcns1evlvtdtj1g_rp22sh2s8i66pb2c1g6eor1cph2bs)
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7c7qrsnnuchr4slepinik3fifbfmg7l8ovbln00_rp22sh2s8i66pb2c1g6eor1cph2bs)
---
When the American Veterans Center first called me more than 15 years ago and invited me to the National Memorial Day Parade, I was honored to join the event to remember our fallen heroes. The American Veterans Center revived the Parade in 2005 after it had been dormant for nearly 70 years. Now, in 2022, they’re bringing the Parade back to its full-scale glory after two years of pandemic precautions. Every American should be proud that generations of our brave servicemen and servicewomen, from the last of our “Greatest Generation” heroes of World War II to our veterans from Afghanistan and Iraq, will get the public thanks for their service that they deserve this year. But I know that the defenders and families of the fallen who will join me in the National Memorial Day Parade will be thinking of their friends and loved ones who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country — the brave Americans we honor on Memorial Day. **Sadly, our country is losing hundreds of World War II veterans each day, so the mission of the National Memorial Day Parade is _more important now than ever_ — as this year’s event may be the LAST opportunity for our WWII heroes to commemorate their friends who never came home.** [**Please make your most generous contribution of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, to support the National Memorial Day Parade and make it the tribute that our nation’s heroes deserve.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zvcduh80gept223hd59eqjfl2302pgpr9hdd3cj8_rp22sh2s8i66pb2c1g6eor1cph2bs)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zs7eiqjgu45gpg9c0al22if75brevf1pah96rcco_rp22sh2s8i66pb2c1g6eor1cph2bs)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, _the entire parade_ costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy’s Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that’s contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever.
* Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.
* Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom.

---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zo69rtb9vcro1el0j7fumoek5asg1d6dr7d8jpr8_rp22sh2s8i66pb2c1g6eor1cph2bs)
---
[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z00q0ao6mirpnd9lf8drvdccqkc8v65bsq1pv6bg_rp22sh2s8i66pb2c1g6eor1cph2bs) But no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you.

On Memorial Day — this year and every year — please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans’ cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, but we can always do a little more._ Fellow American, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please — [**if you're able, make a gift to help fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zb7sbuspc8dqa459ejb3qdobo6cotcp9hnmbrit8_rp22sh2s8i66pb2c1g6eor1cph2bs)
---
Sincerely,

Gary Sinise
Honorary Grand Marshal
National Memorial Day Parade
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqhjaqa1prcd24ki7gl25nndg78r88qa4igo94b0_rp22sh2s8i66pb2c1g6eor1cph2bs)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2za92i5lkk5s92odoh114al4bp9j7io48arps99so_rp22sh2s8i66pb2c1g6eor1cph2bs)
---
|
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. © American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zfeq9sjqbc1ebb6o5rljdrubo8shc1gje504c2bg_rp22sh2s8i66pb2c1g6eor1cph238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: American Update
subject: Bring Constitution 101 to your home
body:
I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9938%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=qKJaOYjnUa39Ox%2bJVhTP0w&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c21548%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Im7XQTwwCLVcdOxSsiG0JQ&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c21548%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Im7XQTwwCLVcdOxSsiG0JQ&sysid=1) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c21549%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=sjNEvuq%2f%2f7BS3U195BpFuQ&sysid=1) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth--Defending Liberty since 1844
---
---

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Candace Owens
subject: Roe v. Wade is dead, but the fight for life is just beginning. Here’s how we win >>
body:
---
| | | | | | | | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60337081:JuoaiWo3N:m:1:3317145305:E9B77F7EBF35B7E217769729E08CCA15:r)
---
| Peter,
This week, a leak showed the _Supreme Court is ready to overturn Roe v. Wade_...ending one of the greatest injustices in American history.
_No one_ understands the horrors of abortion more than the Black Americans...with **_more than 20 million Black babies killed_** through abortion since 1973.
But BLEXIT recognizes that ending _Roe v. Wade is NOT_ the end of our fight to protect life.
**We need to rebuild a culture of courage, personal responsibility, and respect for life in our communities.**
BLEXIT is doing tough work in our communities every day...and showcasing the _tremendous power_ of traditional American values:
* We believe that Black Americans have **unlimited potential to achieve the American Dream.**

* We know that our **nation 's values empower every one of us**, regardless of race.

* Unlike Black Lives Matter, **we fight to protect ALL Black lives..._including_ our unborn children.**

Black Americans are waking up. **[But BLEXIT's efforts to rebuild, reshape, and reclaim Black America can only be as successful as your help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60337081:JuoaiWo3N:m:1:3317145305:E9B77F7EBF35B7E217769729E08CCA15:r)**

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: A pledge to protect the unborn
body:
I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of h
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqk0ks2are7dk76nj5fs20a73m5mpvroh5dc6p40_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbq36p3hmar62cb6m1prco5mmkqe8tbhccrj0obn6sqebdbieipb1oj2cdhr0t5nmv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj666ob6o37mpgmctb4mdj3fc5lclp238h1e8he4933clh60o34s5i6coh5u)
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of human life. Our society has been infected by an anti-life ideology, treating its most vulnerable members as disposable objects. Abortion that was once thought of as a last resort in a medical emergency has become the new normal. Medicine tells us that life begins at the moment of conception. It also tells us when an unborn baby develops a heartbeat, brainwaves, and nervous system. Yet, despite all of this, the unborn are not treated as though they are alive or even human. **As a surgeon, I have operated on infants pre-birth. I can assure you that they are very much alive.** [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zvj1eaov6s8v2fb4dg61akm2fjq651pah50sopog_rp22sh2s8i66pb2c1g69ob4cph2bs)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ Life is a precious gift that has been given to us from our creator. No person is disposable, and every life is precious according to Him. I believe that everyone deserves life, even those who have been denied this right by our society. I believe that together we can make a difference and bring dignity and a voice to the unborn. I also believe that I’m not alone in this belief. I believe that you believe that too. I’ve started working with a group of like-minded individuals who are looking to change our culture. We want to build a society that values life but that takes people like you and I making a commitment. The first step is clearly stating what we believe and what we are willing to do to protect the lives of the unborn. [**Will you join me today and stand up for those who cannot do it for themselves?**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zfuo0o8cclj3h5t002q7p5erpf9r0v3dslvsq25o_rp22sh2s8i66pb2c1g69ob4cph2bs) I’ve created a new pro-life pledge; I’d love your support. Would you read the pledge below to see if you align with our shared goals and are willing to commit to fighting for the lives of the unborn? [https://offers.americancornerstone.org/pro-life-statement/](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zlgth4gim8olea5u74c54ap3obpbek66sqqkkef0_rp22sh2s8i66pb2c1g69ob4cph2bs) Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2022 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

name: Hillsdale College via CIntel
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsfxv9gHxN

World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history,
encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today,
only around one percent
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osfxv9gHxN

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear
Fellow American,

World War
II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing
global fighting in unprecedented ways.

But
today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans
who fought in the war are still alive.

As we
lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the
living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons
learned from this world war.

That's
why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled "The
Second World Wars." And right now, you can receive your very own
DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of
$100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on
behalf of liberty.

This
limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military
historian Victor Davis Hanson of Allied and Axis investments and
strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the
Allies' victory.

This is
one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there
are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you'd like to
secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can have one
shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to
Hillsdale College.

Simply
use this secure link to reserve your copy of "The Second World
Wars" on DVD today:

https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars

Thank you
for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans
through education with Hillsdale College!

Best
regards,

Kyle
Murnen, '09
Director
of Online Learning
Hillsdale
College

Now, why is it urgent that you donate to the NDRC TODAY? Because as of today, we have **six months left until the 2022 elections**.

In that time, we must keep up our state-based work to make sure the elections are held on fair maps, hold Republicans accountable for the gerrymandering they’ve done in 2021-22, adjust our strategies to respond to redistricting court decisions, and support 2022 candidates who support fair maps (and oppose candidates who oppose fair maps!).

It’s a huge amount of work, so we’re counting on grassroots supporters like you. Will you chip in today?
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

subject: A Special Message for Mother's Day
body:
From Our Future First Lady of Massachusetts
| | | |
---
---
---
| Please accept our wishes for a wonderful Mother's Day to all!

Team Diehl

name: Mark, 2022 Membership Services
subject: I didn’t know you were a Democrat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I have bad news. You’ve failed to renew your Republican Membership and have broken a 2 year support streak. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9932%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=5Fqgred%2bsupbSIge%2fhnMzA&sysid=1)
I have bad news. You’ve failed to renew your Republican Membership and have broken a 2 year support streak.

| |
---
| | |
Fellow Conservative,

**I have bad news. You’ve failed to renew your Republican Membership and have broken a 2-year support streak.**

I am so disappointed. You seemed like such a great Republican supporter. And now that Republicans are on the verge of winning back the House Majority, we need you more than ever.

**[Will you renew for 2022 and become a Sustaining Member of our Republican team one more time? I am holding the renewal window open for you until TONIGHT at Midnight.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c21542%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3SxaAgvvMEF7PkuwLiqiRA&sysid=1)**

---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c21543%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=oljUYLaYPT5%2fHTgpsvcXug&sysid=1)
---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c21544%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4vKYHDq3VaF1m4oq3EfK%2fw&sysid=1)
---
**Democrats are expecting that grassroots conservative supporters like you will let your memberships lapse in the New Year, tune out of politics, and even forget to vote.**

In the meantime, Democrats are raising MILLIONS to beat Republicans and hold the House. It’s a simple strategy - they’re using limousine liberal money from New York and California to drown out the voices of real Americans like you and me.

That’s why it’s so important you renew your 2022 Republican Membership, Fellow Conservative! **[Please make your commitment by 12 AM](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c21655%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=D9rOnKdJiHitAVr8Ji%2bMxA&sysid=1) **and give Republicans the help they need to fight the Democrats’ big bucks.

I am investing extra time in your membership case because I know that with the support of great Americans like you, Republicans can win this next election.
---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c21544%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4vKYHDq3VaF1m4oq3EfK%2fw&sysid=1)
---
Thank you,

Mark, National Republican Membership Office

---
| |

name: Josh Gottheimer
subject: On this Mother's Day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/80737/images/IMG_1202%20copy%20%281%29.jpg No matter how you and your family are celebrating Mother’s Day this year, I hope it’s filled with joy and happiness.

I’ve often said that being a dad to Ellie and Ben is the most rewarding job I have, and I know my wife Marla feels the same way. Like all of you, we’ve had a tough couple of years. My family has made it through the ups and downs because of Marla.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/80737/images/IMG_1202%20copy%20%281%29.jpg]
My wife is courageous, strong, brilliant, and loving. On this journey of representing you and your family in Congress, she’s been an integral part of my success — I couldn’t do this without her. As I often say, my wife is Wonder Woman. I literally don’t know how she does it all.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/80737/images/Image.jpeg]
Today is also bittersweet for me. My mom, Gwenn, passed away in 2018. While I miss her terribly, I celebrate the life she created for me. As a preschool teacher, my mom saw the absolute best in our children and community. I would not be where I am without her love, guidance, faith, and confidence she had in me. I think about her, and miss her, every single day.

My mom taught me the importance of working hard and giving back — a lesson that still drives me to do my best in every avenue of my life.

However you’re celebrating today, let’s take a moment to be thankful for the moms in our lives and to be thankful for everything they do.

I hope you and your family have a happy and healthy Mother’s Day! Thanks to all our moms!

Yours,

Josh

PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS

body:
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=220105_FR_newyearnewemail_LOGO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=220105_FR_newyearnewemail_LOGO] [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
My mother, Isabel, is my biggest supporter. When I was young, she worked as a manicurist to pay the bills and support her family. She used to take me to work with her, because she knew we did not have the money to pay for a babysitter. Her story is one of so many immigrant women.
My mom has always always reminded me of the importance of knowledge, hard work, and passion. She is the reason why I strive to give back to both my family and our community. I truly would not be the woman I am today without her guidance and love.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/91626/images/Screen%20Shot%202022-05-07%20at%2010.55.37%20AM.png]
This Mother’s Day, I would like to honor all the mothers out there for their selflessness, for constantly uplifting their children, and for always supporting their dreams.
To all the moms out there–thank you for everything you do.
If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Your support means everything. Thank you!
Victoria

Victoria Virasingh is the daughter of immigrants. She grew up housing insecure and watched her working parents struggle to pull their family out of poverty. But today, even those opportunities to work hard and live the American dream are becoming less and less attainable.
That's why Victoria is running for Congress in Virginia's 8th District -- to create equitable opportunities for those who have been left behind, to expand access for the store owner to the refugee, to support our struggling elders and students, and to lift up working families.
Victoria is a fearless progressive champion who will fight for bold policies to improve the daily lives of Virginians, and she's bringing the fresh new leadership that we need to move our state forward.
Pitch in to help elect Victoria Virasingh as the next voice of VA-08 >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=isabel]

Hello,
The courage we saw from President Zelensky after Russia invaded was not the kind of instantaneous courage used to charge an enemy or the self-promoting false courage of Trumpian showmanship.
Zelensky’s courage was that of thought-through deliberation, choosing to sacrifice oneself to protect others, to do one’s duty in office. That is the definition of bravery.
**Imagine what Putin must be thinking when besieged Ukrainians and even some Russian citizens stand up to him more fiercely than senior Republicans like Chuck Grassley ever stood up to Donald Trump.**
The Javelin missiles that Ukrainians bravely used to repel Russian tanks were the same ones that Trump was impeached for holding hostage – and that Republicans refused to hold him accountable for.
When I defeat Chuck Grassley this November, the Democrats will have the most senior military person ever-elected to the United States Senate. That’s fitting in the shadow of January 6th, because it’s time we had more leaders in Washington who choose sacrifice and service – versus corporate donations and personal gain.
The polls show a close race, and McConnell’s Super PACs are already queuing up millions to spend against me. I’m a hard target, but that won’t stop Fox News from fabricating some made-up tale.
**We need to raise another $65,000 before our deadline at midnight tomorrow to keep our new TV ads up and fight back, but right now, we’re still $41,085 short. The only way we’ll defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue is if grassroots donors like you chip in now:**
[**Please, may I count on you to urgently give $5 or more right now – whatever you can spare before our critical deadline at midnight tommorrow – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45056430/344281138/-42398318?refcode=em20220508am-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzI3NWZjZS1jZWNlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ef8BUAFpzeFaNm3wGfhOGOzvnNUwaMZvzJtX2DoAI2A=)

clean_body: Hello, The courage we saw from President Zelensky after Russia invaded was not the kind of instantaneous courage used to charge an enemy or the self-promoting false courage of Trumpian showmanship. Zelensky’s courage was that of thought-through deliberation, choosing to sacrifice oneself to protect others, to do one’s duty in office. That is the definition of bravery. Imagine what Putin must be thinking when besieged Ukrainians and even some Russian citizens stand up to him more fiercely than senior Republicans like Chuck Grassley ever stood up to Donald Trump. The Javelin missiles that Ukrainians bravely used to repel Russian tanks were the same ones that Trump was impeached for holding hostage – and that Republicans refused to hold him accountable for. When I defeat Chuck Grassley this November, the Democrats will have the most senior military person ever-elected to the United States Senate. That’s fitting in the shadow of January 6th, because it’s time we had more leaders in Washington who choose sacrifice and service – versus corporate donations and personal gain. The polls show a close race, and McConnell’s Super PACs are already queuing up millions to spend against me. I’m a hard target, but that won’t stop Fox News from fabricating some made-up tale. We need to raise another $65,000 before our deadline at midnight tomorrow to keep our new TV ads up and fight back, but right now, we’re still $41,085 short. The only way we’ll defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue is if grassroots donors like you chip in now: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = The past few years have shown that democracy is a fragile thing; but it is always worth fighting for. name: Great America Update
subject: C.S. Lewis on Christianity
body:
Young people today grow up being told that their perception of reality is a matter of perspective. Recently, they are even told that women can choose to be men and men women. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6978%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=Cxyljq4kj%2b4meiaHx7%2fPTA&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61884%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=m2EtCBMZz2mD2d0oYG1anA&sysid=1)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, Young people today grow up being told that their perception of reality is a matter of perspective. Recently, they are even told that women can choose to be men and men women. This denial of objective reality--including a denial of an objective good--is destructive of proper education, of religious faith, and of free government. Largely as an antidote to this destructive force, Hillsdale College is releasing its latest free online course, “C.S. Lewis on Christianity.” Taught by Michael Ward, a visiting distinguished fellow at Hillsdale and a professor of theology at Oxford University, this seven-lecture course covers Lewis’s philosophical defense of an objective good and his demonstration of its fulfillment in Christianity. **I am writing today to ask if you would consider helping us meet our goal of raising $500,000 by midnight on May 16, so we can promote this new online course effectively, especially to young people.** ** ** Hillsdale produces its free online courses, as it does all its work, while refusing to accept government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. We are entirely dependent on private donations. With your tax-deductible gift today, we can enroll tens of thousands of young people in this new free online course and expand Hillsdale’s other outreach efforts. Please help us reach our $500,000 goal. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/cs-lewis-christianity](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61895%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=izfPzDBsQgicCUuwi%2bW%2f0A&sysid=1)** Thank you for your friendship and support. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

---
| |
---
| |
---

name: Brent Bozell
subject: I won’t stop until the radical liberal journalists are treated with the same hatred as tobacco executives.
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60335957:6XMMJWoNP:m:1:3253819041:1BA8EE6A585C394433621299A7AE3F93:r)
Peter,

In 2020, the media lied to us.

That's no surprise, of course. But I'm talking about one lie in particular--that Hunter Biden's laptop was Russian disinformation.

The media got intelligence officials to back up the lies and get the story banned from social media.

They even banned the New York Post--America's oldest publication--from reporting the story.

As if the story couldn't be any more biased, both the NY Times and the Washington Post have recently confirmed the truth of the Biden laptop story.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60335957:6XMMJWoNP:m:1:3253819041:1BA8EE6A585C394433621299A7AE3F93:r)

Have any of them apologized or owned up to the mistake?

_**No, they haven 't.**_

This isn't just bias--this is open malevolence to the American people and election interference.

**It 's time to hold the media and their lackeys accountable, both in the public eye and in the courts of law. **

But MRC can't fight this war alone, Peter. That's why I set a goal to raise $37,000 that will go to holding the Left media accountable for their lies and misinformation.

_**[Can I count on your help to stop blatant media manipulation and lies? Click here to donate $10, $35, $50, or any amount >>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60335957:6XMMJWoNP:m:1:3253819041:1BA8EE6A585C394433621299A7AE3F93:r)**_

I won't stop until the radical liberal journalists are treated with the same disdain as tobacco executives.

Let me introduce myself. My name is Brent Bozell, Founder and President of the Media Research Center (MRC).

MRC is the only conservative organization dedicated to neutralizing leftist bias in the news media and popular culture.

**When the MRC was founded in 1987, over 75% of Americans trusted the left-wing media. Now, MRC has successfully SHATTERED America 's trust in the leftwing media--over 90% of Americans state they DO NOT trust the media anymore. **

Make no mistake: the media is working alongside Facebook, Twitter, Instagram, TikTok, Google, and every facet of the internet to censor the truth.

_Lies and censorship is anti-American, plain and simple. _

We CAN NOT allow media to destroy the First Amendment or build a culture hostile to debate, disagreements, or be allowed to silence us.

Can I count on YOU, Peter, to stand for the first Amendment? **Click any link below to donate. **
[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60335958:6XMMJWoNP:m:1:3253819041:1BA8EE6A585C394433621299A7AE3F93:r)

clean_body: Peter, In 2020, the media lied to us. That's no surprise, of course. But I'm talking about one lie in particular--that Hunter Biden's laptop was Russian disinformation. The media got intelligence officials to back up the lies and get the story banned from social media. They even banned the New York Post--America's oldest publication--from reporting the story. As if the story couldn't be any more biased, both the NY Times and the Washington Post have recently confirmed the truth of the Biden laptop story. Have any of them apologized or owned up to the mistake? No, they haven 't. This isn't just bias--this is open malevolence to the American people and election interference. It 's time to hold the media and their lackeys accountable, both in the public eye and in the courts of law. But MRC can't fight this war alone, Peter. That's why I set a goal to raise $37,000 that will go to holding the Left media accountable for their lies and misinformation. I won't stop until the radical liberal journalists are treated with the same disdain as tobacco executives. Let me introduce myself. My name is Brent Bozell, Founder and President of the Media Research Center (MRC). MRC is the only conservative organization dedicated to neutralizing leftist bias in the news media and popular culture. When the MRC was founded in 1987, over 75% of Americans trusted the left-wing media. Now, MRC has successfully SHATTERED America 's trust in the leftwing media--over 90% of Americans state they DO NOT trust the media anymore. Make no mistake: the media is working alongside Facebook, Twitter, Instagram, TikTok, Google, and every facet of the internet to censor the truth. Lies and censorship is anti-American, plain and simple. We CAN NOT allow media to destroy the First Amendment or build a culture hostile to debate, disagreements, or be allowed to silence us. Can I count on YOU, Peter, to stand for the first Amendment? Click any link below to donate. It's time to hold the Left media accountable for their lies. subject: Happy Mother’s Day!
body:
This Mother’s Day, be sure to let the important women in your life know how much you cherish their love and compassion.
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xFWa7zmSqCpKIfvVrOEmd8DXSaXkVhY4_8GIOU_21QY74iZr4x5a7EnLWWHBvAUn0iOhjvRZxSiSXHhvy982kf0ww0ZS7qg1bPHIoY_Edw_Zk42IJczZr2iDjCqmQ1P-cCQQs3-O6qYsze-uUrjJI9tEexQp3QJq&c=DRohPfaPqS7iV5nRE-uS-OBBSBqQCtI3xlbOgN36ATUlc4o-k42LUQ==&ch=o_-m2W61sxZJgAhrVhl3-a8T7AioHDe2kHGuTHaSvjI6y1fELhOxgQ==)

| Friend
This Mother's Day, be sure to let the important women in your life know how much you cherish their love and compassion. Millions of proud women across America work tirelessly to help ensure prosperity in America's future.
I would like to take this moment to thank them for their courage and love. America would be nothing without its mothers.
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xFWa7zmSqCpKIfvVrOEmd8DXSaXkVhY4_8GIOU_21QY74iZr4x5a7EnLWWHBvAUn0iOhjvRZxSiSXHhvy982kf0ww0ZS7qg1bPHIoY_Edw_Zk42IJczZr2iDjCqmQ1P-cCQQs3-O6qYsze-uUrjJI9tEexQp3QJq&c=DRohPfaPqS7iV5nRE-uS-OBBSBqQCtI3xlbOgN36ATUlc4o-k42LUQ==&ch=o_-m2W61sxZJgAhrVhl3-a8T7AioHDe2kHGuTHaSvjI6y1fELhOxgQ==)

| Thank you again for your continued support of my campaign and have a blessed Mother's Day!

name: Gabe Vasquez
subject: Feliz dia de las Madres
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45060884/344299222/-1530593628?refcode=fl_email_na_20220508mothersday_gv_90da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTdjOGU1Ny1kNWNlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hO9GKvilJ9ShYmzdpX5BMGmByh_1voh5cd-leYL5SuI=)
---
Team, On this Mother’s Day, we celebrate the women in our life who provide for our families, raise the next generation, and lead our communities. I’m running for Congress because of the strong, hard working women in my life who came before me, including my mother, grandmother, and aunties. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45060885/344299234/-1530593628?refcode=fl_email_na_20220508mothersday_gv_90da_xx_img1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTdjOGU1Ny1kNWNlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hO9GKvilJ9ShYmzdpX5BMGmByh_1voh5cd-leYL5SuI=)
---
_My late grandmother Pilar with her children in Chihuahua, Chihuahua, Mexico_
As a first-generation American, I grew up on both sides of the border and spent much of my time in my grandfather’s TV repair shop in the Chaveña Neighborhood of Ciudad Juarez, where all of his children, including my mother and aunties worked hard every day.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45060886/344299235/-1530593628?refcode=fl_email_na_20220508mothersday_gv_90da_xx_img2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTdjOGU1Ny1kNWNlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hO9GKvilJ9ShYmzdpX5BMGmByh_1voh5cd-leYL5SuI=)
---
_My late grandmother Pilar at her home in Cd. Juarez, Mexico_
My mother is one of 10 children, and she was the first in our family to graduate from college, receiving a degree in accounting. She began working in the maquiladoras of Ciudad Juarez and worked her way up to have a successful career in finance in the United States, primarily working for American companies that did business with Mexico.
I watched her work hard every day to support our family, and she taught me the value of hard work, to respect all, and to help those in need.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45060887/344299236/-1530593628?refcode=fl_email_na_20220508mothersday_gv_90da_xx_img3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTdjOGU1Ny1kNWNlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hO9GKvilJ9ShYmzdpX5BMGmByh_1voh5cd-leYL5SuI=)
---
_My mother, Hortencia Bañuelos, myself, and my brother_
I’ve spent my career dedicated to public service, working hard to improve the lives of others and conserve our public lands and traditions, inspired by these women who sacrificed so much and struggled to achieve the American dream.
I give thanks to all of the mothers and mother figures out there today who contribute so much to our lives and society. They deserve a representative in Congress who fights for their best interests — including reproductive rights and healthcare, affordable childcare, and equal pay for equal work — and with your support, I plan to be that leader come this time next year.
Thank you, and have a happy Mother’s Day!
— Gabe
[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45060888/344299237/-1530593628?refcode=fl_email_na_20220508mothersday_gv_90da_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTdjOGU1Ny1kNWNlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hO9GKvilJ9ShYmzdpX5BMGmByh_1voh5cd-leYL5SuI=)
---

| Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American and former City Councilor running for Congress to challenge Yvette Herrell and fight for New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District. He's building a people-powered movement to flip this critical House seat from red to blue and take his experience in office, passion for the environment, immigrant and civil rights, and economic justice to Congress for the people of New Mexico.
---

clean_body: | = Team, On this Mother’s Day, we celebrate the women in our life who provide for our families, raise the next generation, and lead our communities. I’m running for Congress because of the strong, hard working women in my life who came before me, including my mother, grandmother, and aunties. | = My late grandmother Pilar with her children in Chihuahua, Chihuahua, Mexico As a first-generation American, I grew up on both sides of the border and spent much of my time in my grandfather’s TV repair shop in the Chaveña Neighborhood of Ciudad Juarez, where all of his children, including my mother and aunties worked hard every day. = My late grandmother Pilar at her home in Cd. Juarez, Mexico My mother is one of 10 children, and she was the first in our family to graduate from college, receiving a degree in accounting. She began working in the maquiladoras of Ciudad Juarez and worked her way up to have a successful career in finance in the United States, primarily working for American companies that did business with Mexico. I watched her work hard every day to support our family, and she taught me the value of hard work, to respect all, and to help those in need. = My mother, Hortencia Bañuelos, myself, and my brother I’ve spent my career dedicated to public service, working hard to improve the lives of others and conserve our public lands and traditions, inspired by these women who sacrificed so much and struggled to achieve the American dream. I give thanks to all of the mothers and mother figures out there today who contribute so much to our lives and society. They deserve a representative in Congress who fights for their best interests — including reproductive rights and healthcare, affordable childcare, and equal pay for equal work — and with your support, I plan to be that leader come this time next year. Thank you, and have a happy Mother’s Day! — Gabe = | Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American and former City Councilor running for Congress to challenge Yvette Herrell and fight for New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District. He's building a people-powered movement to flip this critical House seat from red to blue and take his experience in office, passion for the environment, immigrant and civil rights, and economic justice to Congress for the people of New Mexico. | = | PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45061219/344300956/-74008005?refcode=20220506_Demings&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWRhZDBlOC1kNWNlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aoPHi3mGnCPE2TCvyMdYedIVS2i-ODxudCxKFoyoLQU=) Friend, I'm Val Demings, and I'm running for the U.S. Senate to defeat Marco Rubio and win better, stronger leadership for the people of Florida. Just 10,033 votes (0.2 percentage points) decided Florida's last Senate race – so I'll tell you the plain truth: **I cannot win this without you.** [**That's why I'm asking you to become one of the donors to my campaign for Senate by splitting a contribution between me and Serve America right now. Every dollar you can spare will help us build the strongest grassroots operation to defeat Rubio, flip Florida blue and defend our Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45061220/344300957/-74008005?refcode=20220506_Demings&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWRhZDBlOC1kNWNlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aoPHi3mGnCPE2TCvyMdYedIVS2i-ODxudCxKFoyoLQU=) Every day, I carry with me that I am a descendent of enslaved people, people who knew that they would not make it, but dreamed and prayed that one day I would. Their prayers carried me to this day – carried me through a life of public service as a social worker, as a law enforcement officer, the first Black woman to serve as Orlando's police chief, and as the proud representative of Florida's 10th Congressional district. **So hear me when I say this: Only in America can a little Black girl, the daughter of a maid and a janitor growing up in the South in the ’60s, have an amazing story of opportunity like mine.** The prayers of my parents propel me forward, even now, giving me the strength and courage it takes to do what's right. To impeach and prosecute a corrupt president. To never stop fighting for gun safety reform. To push for truth, accountability, justice. [**I stand on the side of our democratic institutions, on the side of everyday working Floridians – but I need your help to win this race. Will you split a contribution of $20 or more to Serve America and me to defeat Marco Rubio, win in Florida and defend our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45061221/344300958/-74008005?refcode=20220506_Demings&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWRhZDBlOC1kNWNlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aoPHi3mGnCPE2TCvyMdYedIVS2i-ODxudCxKFoyoLQU=) In my decades of public service, I've worked with some truly incredible individuals – champions of civil rights like my friend John Lewis, who said, "Each generation must do its part to create an even more fair, more just society." We're at an inflection point for our democracy that will decide if we live up to John Lewis' dream, friend. The modern-day Republican Party is committed to the exact opposite of what Congressman Lewis stood for. Marco Rubio and Senate Republicans grow more extreme by the day, more committed to a dangerous, anti-democratic agenda. Putting party over the future of our democracy, over the wants and needs of Florida's working families. You have my word, that when it comes to winning this race and delivering better leadership for Florida, I will fight like never before. Because when your friends and neighbors put their trust in you to be their voice, you work for them – and that's just not what we're seeing from Sen. Rubio. But it's only together that we'll have a shot at winning – so here's what I'm counting on: **6,112 donations, before 11:59 p.m. tonight. Are you in, friend?** [**Split a contribution between Serve America and me of $20 or more right now – whatever you can spare to fuel our battleground Senate race – so we can defeat Marco Rubio, flip Florida blue and defend our Democratic Senate majority!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45061222/344300959/-74008005?refcode=20220506_Demings&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWRhZDBlOC1kNWNlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aoPHi3mGnCPE2TCvyMdYedIVS2i-ODxudCxKFoyoLQU=) From the bottom of my heart, friend, thank you for being on my team. —Congresswoman Val Demings [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45061223/344300960/272679854?refcode=20220506_Demings&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWRhZDBlOC1kNWNlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aoPHi3mGnCPE2TCvyMdYedIVS2i-ODxudCxKFoyoLQU=) name: Republican Task Force
subject: Revealed: Plan to Transform America
body:
| **Why are Bezos and Musk Investing Billions to ‘Transform’ the American Economy? And What Does It Mean for Your Money?** Something strange is happening behind the scenes in our financial system. Right now, the mainstream media is completely ignoring what might be the most important story in the financial world that nobody is talking about. Amid the distractions caused by conflicts overseas, shortages, and inflation, Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen recently took the stage at an event called COP26 in Glasgow, Scotland to address some of the world’s most powerful people, including:
* U.S. President, Joe Biden...
* British Prime Minister, Boris Johnson...
* Canadian Prime Minister, Justin Trudeau...
* French President, Emmanuel Macron...
* ... and many more...
From the stage, Yellen called for world leaders to commit to a [$150 trillion ‘global transition’ of our economy. ](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyNj7tuxCAURL_G7mzBxca4oIgUbRN5q0gp0TVgLwoPC7D29-NNkTrSVDPSzBkjjTZIdeskEAAyEkHmcSBjL4CP88qNBhTbxEgzEPQ21z7b41y90xgrlu8tZW17nUL7kCDmQfANUcyGw8ApW_k0IdKNG2rY3H4takHnXdzvGKzMdVO5qBzUmmK0uasZY7kagxo70QEoaL181HqUhr01cLtUrD6z7XPaT2t1iik4XV77r5jdtDMNe18-PjkwSlkD3P45jMEAbZbmeDrvXeHT9WkPF9Avf_0Pzw-lP2Fo) Since then, Bank of America has committed, along with 131 countries, 234 cities, and 695 of the world’s biggest companies. Several billionaires, led by Jeff Bezos and Elon Musk have invested in this ‘transformation’ as well. What is it that Yellen, Biden, Trudeau, Bezos and Musk are pushing for with their ‘transformation’? And what does it mean for your money? Investigative journalist and renowned economist, Nomi Prins, who predicted the 2008 market meltdown has followed the money... And what she’s discovered is startling. It has nothing to do with a market crash... a new reserve currency... or the end of fiat. Prins says: **“While most Americans are distracted by mainstream media headlines, I’ve found evidence the elites are spending $150 trillion to ‘transform’ our economy into something we didn’t vote on... didn’t ask for... and very few are prepared for.** **In essence, we’re about to see a stranger, more extreme ‘new normal’ in America.** **Most people will be shocked when they see what happens in the months ahead.”** Prins considers this transformation so urgent, she has agreed to sit down for an interview to get her message in front of as many Americans as possible. For now, there’s no cost to watch. [Go here to see how this ‘transformation’ could affect you – and find out what it means for your money.](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyNj7tuxCAURL_G7mzBxca4oIgUbRN5q0gp0TVgLwoPC7D29-NNkTrSVDPSzBkjjTZIdeskEAAyEkHmcSBjL4CP88qNBhTbxEgzEPQ21z7b41y90xgrlu8tZW17nUL7kCDmQfANUcyGw8ApW_k0IdKNG2rY3H4takHnXdzvGKzMdVO5qBzUmmK0uasZY7kagxo70QEoaL181HqUhr01cLtUrD6z7XPaT2t1iik4XV77r5jdtDMNe18-PjkwSlkD3P45jMEAbZbmeDrvXeHT9WkPF9Avf_0Pzw-lP2Fo) [](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyNj7tuxCAURL_G7mzBxca4oIgUbRN5q0gp0TVgLwoPC7D29-NNkTrSVDPSzBkjjTZIdeskEAAyEkHmcSBjL4CP88qNBhTbxEgzEPQ21z7b41y90xgrlu8tZW17nUL7kCDmQfANUcyGw8ApW_k0IdKNG2rY3H4takHnXdzvGKzMdVO5qBzUmmK0uasZY7kagxo70QEoaL181HqUhr01cLtUrD6z7XPaT2t1iik4XV77r5jdtDMNe18-PjkwSlkD3P45jMEAbZbmeDrvXeHT9WkPF9Avf_0Pzw-lP2Fo)
