clean_body: | Why are Bezos and Musk Investing Billions to ‘Transform’ the American Economy? And What Does It Mean for Your Money? Something strange is happening behind the scenes in our financial system. Right now, the mainstream media is completely ignoring what might be the most important story in the financial world that nobody is talking about. Amid the distractions caused by conflicts overseas, shortages, and inflation, Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen recently took the stage at an event called COP26 in Glasgow, Scotland to address some of the world’s most powerful people, including: U.S. President, Joe Biden... British Prime Minister, Boris Johnson... Canadian Prime Minister, Justin Trudeau... French President, Emmanuel Macron... ... and many more... From the stage, Yellen called for world leaders to commit to a Since then, Bank of America has committed, along with 131 countries, 234 cities, and 695 of the world’s biggest companies. Several billionaires, led by Jeff Bezos and Elon Musk have invested in this ‘transformation’ as well. What is it that Yellen, Biden, Trudeau, Bezos and Musk are pushing for with their ‘transformation’? And what does it mean for your money? Investigative journalist and renowned economist, Nomi Prins, who predicted the 2008 market meltdown has followed the money... And what she’s discovered is startling. It has nothing to do with a market crash... a new reserve currency... or the end of fiat. Prins says: “While most Americans are distracted by mainstream media headlines, I’ve found evidence the elites are spending $150 trillion to ‘transform’ our economy into something we didn’t vote on... didn’t ask for... and very few are prepared for. In essence, we’re about to see a stranger, more extreme ‘new normal’ in America. Most people will be shocked when they see what happens in the months ahead.”** Prins considers this transformation so urgent, she has agreed to sit down for an interview to get her message in front of as many Americans as possible. For now, there’s no cost to watch. This message was originally sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com Sent to Republican Task Force subscribers. PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522

subject: Happy Mother’s Day!
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]
Dear Peter,
This Mother’s Day, we honor the incredible women who have made all the difference in our lives. I’m so grateful to have had an amazing mother, Janet Howell, for so long as I did. And I’m blessed to have two fantastic moms – my wife, Anne Maher, and our daughter, Abbe Franchot Borok – in my life today. These extraordinary women continue to make a profound difference not just in my life, but in the lives of so many.
From my family to yours, I’d like to wish you a relaxing and restful Mother’s Day.
Thank you,

Peter,

So today, I will be taking time to celebrate all the incredible moms in my life – especially Julia and my mom, Suzanne. I hope you'll do the same.

Thank you,

Seth

name: Elyse Casey
subject: My dad is fighting for moms like me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Will you join my dad and me in showing your support for paid family leave? [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45062229/344306158/-744169294?refcode=Header&ms=Header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjAzYjcyZS1kN2NlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T88GOder87aZZAlbvpVkVr1gR01f6o0t8u9cpt0f0rs=&emci=136bcae9-bbcc-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=d203b72e-d7ce-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=8943725) Peter,

It's hard to fully understand all of the joys and the challenges of being a mother until you become one. Trust me, as a relatively new mom, I’ve learned firsthand.

My dad has spent his career fighting for Pennsylvania’s children and families. As a daughter, that always made me extremely proud. Now, as a parent myself, I have a deeper appreciation of how vital his work is to ensure that every child has the best possible start in life.

Being a mom is one of the hardest and most important jobs a person can have. That's been especially true during the COVID-19 pandemic as we’ve juggled work, childcare, homeschooling, friendship, and the responsibility of keeping our families safe.

My dad understands the intense pressures that mothers are under. That’s why he fought so hard to help deliver an expanded child tax credit, a child care credit, increased unemployment benefits for people who lost their jobs, and checks that helped pay the bills, to help moms take care of their families during these last trying years.

But one more thing that would make moms' -- and all parents' -- lives easier is paid family leave. That special time after a new child arrives is critical not just for the immediate health benefits, but in forming a healthy, lifelong family bond. That's why nearly every other developed nation on the planet but ours offers paid leave to its parents. I was fortunate enough to benefit from paid family leave policies and I strongly believe that it is a right that every mother should be able to access.

In the Senate, my dad has been a leading advocate for paid family leave for all, but some of his colleagues have failed to join him in taking action.

That's why, this Mother's Day, I'm reaching out to you.

**[Will you join my dad and me in showing your support for paid family leave? Please add your name so we can build the pressure we need for paid family leave to become a reality.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45062231/344306161/-36872555?ms=em22_220509_momday_adv_gq_act___ec_ettx&refcode=em22_220509_momday_adv_gq_act___ec_ettx&source=em22_220509_momday_adv_gq_act___ec_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220509_momday_adv_gq_act___ec_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=qxJvPjLt5POwdHm0z1g%2Ft%2F9C7PFrNv4tIjRnU%2BtFHMNa4pfPPTfv86g1qktzTDfLuoJlRpAqQNu44%2F3Kn8S4tBLtKejJaua%2BK1h2Vpq8UZs0tUj9cUfoYOO9t4ePYrFlYefZrA31S9dKkujgKzMopl%2FNavcJcbEaNN20h3xDwFH64BA7HIFvstTzRtqYlUJv&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjAzYjcyZS1kN2NlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T88GOder87aZZAlbvpVkVr1gR01f6o0t8u9cpt0f0rs=&emci=136bcae9-bbcc-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=d203b72e-d7ce-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=8943725)**

Thank you for your support, and happy Mother's Day to all my fellow moms,

Elyse Casey | [Donate >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45062233/344306163/1676472420?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjAzYjcyZS1kN2NlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T88GOder87aZZAlbvpVkVr1gR01f6o0t8u9cpt0f0rs=)

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: Happy Mother’s Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
#

Hey there,
Like so many of you, I’m spending today thinking about my mother – and celebrating the woman who gave me life and loves me more than sometimes seems humanly possible.
I owe my mom everything. From an early age, she taught me to dream big and fight hard.
Growing up in the Village of Spring Valley, my mother taught me that I could be anything I wanted. It was a radical idea. At the time, my mom was working multiple jobs just to make ends meet, and our family relied on section 8 housing and food stamps to get by.
I took her words to heart and dreamed big. I earned degrees from Stanford University and Harvard Law School. I worked in President Obama’s administration at the Department of Justice, and served on the NAACP’s National Board of Directors and on the board of the New York Civil Liberties Union.
And now, I spend every day in Congress fighting hard in her honor. Whether it’s equal pay for equal work, paid family leave, universal child care, or protecting the right of women to make their own health care decisions, I carry my mom – and the sacrifices she made – with me in everything I do.
So this week, especially, I pray that we learn to appreciate and advocate for women on more than just Mother’s Day. I pray that we fight for the policies that will finally close the gender pay gap, allow all women economic independence, and protect women’s fundamental rights.
Finally, I pray that you and your loved ones have a very happy Mother’s Day.
Thank you,
Mondaire

name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: cupcakes for mother's day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
Happy Mother’s Day! I know that you've heard from me a lot recently about our race to defeat Sen. Grassley (R-IA) – but today I wanted to share a really special story about my mom. I hope you'll take a moment to read it.
So, back in 2019, when I had eight Democratic presidential candidates, five International Union presidents and hundreds of voters attending my first-ever Finkenauer Fish Fry event, there was a bit of pressure to say the least. We kept the day focused on infrastructure and jobs – and cupcakes.
We served walleye (Sen. Klobuchar was a big fan!) and of course, no Finkenauer event would be the same without mom’s famous cupcakes! **You see, I've got a campaign secret weapon: a mom who would do anything for anyone, and who just happens to be the best cupcake maker in the entire world.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45063332/344310071/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1044-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzQ5ZWFlMC1kN2NlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Wf2A9_emrogYxizX8sMPWus9jz4W4oc43ZQAWPxopzw=)
**My mom, Deb, baked nearly 1,000 cupcakes for our guests – chocolate, pumpkin, red velvet, you name it.** And when she ran out of space to store them in our freezer, she used my dad's pickup truck, the cold weather and some classic Iowan problem-solving to improvise a second freezer to fit them all. **I know that wasn't an easy task, and I'm so, so thankful, as were the folks in attendance!**
But trust me, 1,000 cupcakes are nothing compared to everything my mom and my family have done for me. I wouldn't be where I am today without them. They taught me the value of hard work and the power of a scrappy, passionate team. **That's how I was elected to the Iowa House of Representatives when I was just 25 years old, and how at 29 I became the youngest woman to flip a U.S. House seat from red to blue – and it's how I'm going to defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley to become the youngest woman elected to the Senate.**
Listen, the numbers are on our side: nearly two-thirds of likely voters here don't want to reelect Sen. Grassley. We can win but only with hardworking people like you who care about flipping this seat blue, fighting for working families and protecting our Senate majority. **[That's why today I'm asking you to make a contribution to my campaign of $5, or whatever you can spare, so that we have the resources to defeat Sen. Grassley, bring new leadership to Iowa and protect our Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45063333/344310072/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1044-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzQ5ZWFlMC1kN2NlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Wf2A9_emrogYxizX8sMPWus9jz4W4oc43ZQAWPxopzw=)**
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45063334/344310073/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1044-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzQ5ZWFlMC1kN2NlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Wf2A9_emrogYxizX8sMPWus9jz4W4oc43ZQAWPxopzw=)

I know that we're going to win this thing – one dollar, or one cupcake, at a time. Thank you for standing with me.

— Abby

name: Val Demings
subject: The things I learned from my mother and grandmother:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
Because of my mother, I learned to never tire in my fight for good
| | |
---
Friend,

I am the woman I am today because of my grandmother and mother.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45063538/344310964/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3068-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYTQ5ZWFlMC1kN2NlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CY4RVNFfo6k06gQUKoZFfNIEqrH7G_f02SRldfy9xbU=)
My grandmother didn’t know how to read or write, but she didn’t let that deter her from living the life she wanted. I would spend my weekends sitting with her for hours, writing letters to her sister for her and listening to stories of a life full of struggle, joy and determination.
Because of my grandmother, I learned to be resilient in the face of adversity and to never stop finding joy in the smallest things.
My mother had seven children and worked long, hard hours as a maid. If she was exhausted, she never showed it as she nurtured all of my biggest aspirations, helping me see myself as someone who belonged in any space I wanted to be in – no matter if the space was predominantly white and male.
Because of my mother, I learned to never tire in my fight for good, even if I wanted to accomplish things that you wouldn’t expect from the daughter of a maid in the 1960s.
I met my husband, Jerry, in the Orlando Police Department, and we married in 1988. He knew that I wanted to have both children and the career that I had worked so hard to build. Most women in the ’80s couldn’t have both – but Jerry never tried to discourage me. When I tucked our three children in at night and then went off to work night shifts patrolling the streets of Orlando, Jerry was always there, supporting my career every step of the way.
Because of Jerry, my children and my grandchildren, I learned what it feels like to love so hard that your heart could burst – and how important it is to build the best country we possibly can for them.
**Friend, I wanted to take a moment to wish you and all the people who have shaped who you are today a happy and special Mother’s Day. I hope that today, and every day, you feel loved and recognized for the hard work you do.**
Thank you for letting me share this special day with you,

Val Demings
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45063539/344310965/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3068-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYTQ5ZWFlMC1kN2NlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CY4RVNFfo6k06gQUKoZFfNIEqrH7G_f02SRldfy9xbU=)

clean_body: Because of my mother, I learned to never tire in my fight for good | | | Friend, I am the woman I am today because of my grandmother and mother. = My grandmother didn’t know how to read or write, but she didn’t let that deter her from living the life she wanted. I would spend my weekends sitting with her for hours, writing letters to her sister for her and listening to stories of a life full of struggle, joy and determination. Because of my grandmother, I learned to be resilient in the face of adversity and to never stop finding joy in the smallest things. My mother had seven children and worked long, hard hours as a maid. If she was exhausted, she never showed it as she nurtured all of my biggest aspirations, helping me see myself as someone who belonged in any space I wanted to be in – no matter if the space was predominantly white and male. Because of my mother, I learned to never tire in my fight for good, even if I wanted to accomplish things that you wouldn’t expect from the daughter of a maid in the 1960s. I met my husband, Jerry, in the Orlando Police Department, and we married in 1988. He knew that I wanted to have both children and the career that I had worked so hard to build. Most women in the ’80s couldn’t have both – but Jerry never tried to discourage me. When I tucked our three children in at night and then went off to work night shifts patrolling the streets of Orlando, Jerry was always there, supporting my career every step of the way. Because of Jerry, my children and my grandchildren, I learned what it feels like to love so hard that your heart could burst – and how important it is to build the best country we possibly can for them. Friend, I wanted to take a moment to wish you and all the people who have shaped who you are today a happy and special Mother’s Day. I hope that today, and every day, you feel loved and recognized for the hard work you do. Thank you for letting me share this special day with you, Val Demings | | = | | Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you’re critical to this grassroots campaign. To make sure you’re the first to get important updates, or text “JOIN” to 77076 to receive text updates. & . I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. So, please consider =. You can also click here to or click here to . Val Demings for U.S. Senate P. O. Box 536926 Orlando, FL 32853 United States Paid for by Val Demings for U.S. Senate

For the last **2 years** , you have consistently stood by House Republicans' side. You've supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we've seen.

**But it pains me to have to tell you that for the first time ever, you 've lost your support streak because you failed to renew your Republican Membership.**

There's good news though. I spoke with leadership about this special circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to **[11:59 PM TONIGHT](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60338946:JKVIfWoNh:m:1:3299561967:82EBAF97B87F3FFAF3719FABDB871E0E:r "11:59 PM TONIGHT")**.

Happy Mother’s day, friends! **On this day and every day, we honor and celebrate all the mothers, single parents, guardians, and caretakers who raise, support and sacrifice so much to keep our families and communities safe and healthy.** At a time when reproductive rights could be stripped away at a moment's notice, we are reminded of the trailblazers who came before us to fight for the right to choose. Now more than ever, we must continue advocating for reproductive rights for all, particularly our most vulnerable families. **I am running for Congress to fight on behalf of policies that will support ALL mothers — whether it’s paid family leave, universal childcare, affordable healthcare, better school funding, and so much more.** **[Together, we can build a brighter future for the next generation of our Commonwealth](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45064186/344313634/621050394?refcode=fl_email_na_20220508mothersday_AE_full_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTM4NThhZC1kOWNlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mtehOndFVtOyZpYqyVdv6yQqYuzvVc-7L1HDkb6C0io=) **— one that our children and mothers can all be proud of. I hope it’s a special day for you and your loved ones. — Ashley Ehasz | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45064187/344313635/621050394?refcode=fl_email_na_20220508mothersday_AE_full_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTM4NThhZC1kOWNlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mtehOndFVtOyZpYqyVdv6yQqYuzvVc-7L1HDkb6C0io=)

clean_body: | = Happy Mother’s day, friends! On this day and every day, we honor and celebrate all the mothers, single parents, guardians, and caretakers who raise, support and sacrifice so much to keep our families and communities safe and healthy. At a time when reproductive rights could be stripped away at a moment's notice, we are reminded of the trailblazers who came before us to fight for the right to choose. Now more than ever, we must continue advocating for reproductive rights for all, particularly our most vulnerable families. I am running for Congress to fight on behalf of policies that will support ALL mothers — whether it’s paid family leave, universal childcare, affordable healthcare, better school funding, and so much more. = — one that our children and mothers can all be proud of. I hope it’s a special day for you and your loved ones. — Ashley Ehasz | = | Ashley Ehasz is a U.S. Army veteran, Apache helicopter pilot, and Democrat running to unseat Republican Brian Fitzpatrick and represent Pennsylvania’s 1st Congressional District: to provide our communities with the services and opportunities they need to thrive, to create positive change, and to ensure the next generation will have a better future ahead of them. | = | Paid for by Ehasz for Congress Ehasz for Congress 1800 Byberry Road #1336 Bensalem, PA 19020 United States Ashley Ehasz is a former member of the U.S. Army. body:
Peter: You may think that the media finally reporting on Hunter Biden's Laptop is good news - I don't. Let me be clear. I believe everything that's on Hunter's laptop is true. It proves the Chinese funneling money to Joe Biden, aka "The Big Guy" as we suspected all along. **But ask yourself, "Why, now?" What after 2 years the media suddenly cares?** [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60337249:6YC8MWoNG:m:1:3317145305:96FE71EE70926FC886EFCA9BCAD2C7C2:r "Join the Fight")It's simple. They're trying to get ahead of the story now so that they can dismiss it as "old news" when the other shoe drops before November's election. But we can't wait a minute longer. Biden is a criminal and it's time to do something about it. **[That's why I filed a bill in Congress demanding the Impeachment of Joe Biden aka "the Big Guy" and I need your help to keep the pressure on Congress.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60337249:6YC8MWoNG:m:1:3317145305:96FE71EE70926FC886EFCA9BCAD2C7C2:r "That’s why I filed a bill
in Congress demanding the Impeachment of Joe Biden aka “the Big Guy” and I need your help to keep the pressure on Congress.")** **[Can I count on you to donate $25, $50, or $100 today?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60337249:6YC8MWoNG:m:1:3317145305:96FE71EE70926FC886EFCA9BCAD2C7C2:r "Can
I count on you to donate $25, $50, or $100 today?")** The Left and their allies in Big Tech and the media have long stopped caring about the truth. That was painfully evident the first time we found out about Hunter Biden's laptop. When the New York Post reported on Hunter's laptop, the Deep State unleashed its fury to discredit the story. 50 ~~intelligence operatives~~ Deep State hacks called it Russian disinformation, Facebook censored the story, and Twitter even banned the New York Post's account outright. Just like they've done to me and President Trump, they blocked the truth! If we don't impeach Biden soon, we'll never find out the full story and the Left's effort to protect Grandpa Joe is going to work. **[That's why I need your help to keep the pressure up on Congress to impeach Joe Biden. Can I count on you to chip in $100, $250, or $500 today?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60337249:6YC8MWoNG:m:1:3317145305:96FE71EE70926FC886EFCA9BCAD2C7C2:r "That’s why I need your help to keep the pressure up on Congress to impeach Joe Biden. Can I count on you to chip in $100, $250, or $500
today?")** They know I'm right which is why the Leftists are doing all they can to block my attempts to impeach Joe Biden. They will stop at nothing to shut me up to keep me from exposing the truth. That's why Big Tech has repeatedly banned my accounts from Twitter and Pelosi works hard to keep a microphone out of my hands on Capitol Hill. DC swamp monsters are even funneling campaign donations to both my Democrat and GOP challengers. It's like they know exactly how much the Chinese control Joe Biden through their bribes that they've funneled through Hunter. **[They're throwing everything AND the kitchen sink at me. That's why I need freedom-fighters like you to dig deep and help me continue the battle to impeach the criminal sitting in the Oval Office with your $100, $250, or $1,000 donation today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60337249:6YC8MWoNG:m:1:3317145305:96FE71EE70926FC886EFCA9BCAD2C7C2:r "They’re throwing everything AND the kitchen sink at me.
That’s why I need freedom-fighters like you to dig deep and help me continue the battle to impeach the criminal sitting in the Oval Office with
your $100, $250, or $1,000 donation today.")** **Bottom line, they 're scared to death that all of it will come out if Biden does get impeached. That's why it's imperative that you help me continue this fight.** I'm ready to expose the facts and impeach Joe Biden, but I can't succeed without your help. **[Please join my efforts today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60337249:6YC8MWoNG:m:1:3317145305:96FE71EE70926FC886EFCA9BCAD2C7C2:r "Please join my efforts today.")** Thank you. God Bless America.
Marjorie Taylor Greene

name: Wiley Nickel
subject: We need to fight for our mothers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for Congress Wiley Nickel for Congress
body:
Hey friends, this is Wiley and I wanted to take a second of your Sunday to talk about Mother’s Day and what it means to me. My mom was an incredibly important figure in my life. She set an important example for me. As one of the first female television news reporters in the 70’s, she broke glass ceiling after glass ceiling, and taught me that anything was possible if I put my mind to it. | | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45066345/344317286/-236034639?refcode=220508-email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzExNmE4MC1kYmNlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kari95gK4wJpRF34pkXvfjosissVa9-dviks0zQJoik=) Hey Peter, this is Wiley and I wanted to take a second of your Sunday to talk about Mother’s Day and what it means to me. My mom was an incredibly important figure in my life. She set an important example for me. As one of the first female television news reporters in the 70’s, she broke glass ceiling after glass ceiling, and taught me that anything was possible if I put my mind to it. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45066348/344317288/-236034639?refcode=220508-email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzExNmE4MC1kYmNlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kari95gK4wJpRF34pkXvfjosissVa9-dviks0zQJoik=) As a husband to Caroline, I’ve seen the care, kindness, and love she has for our kids and I see the sacrifices she’s made for our family every day. Mother’s Day means so much to me because it means we get to honor the women in our life who should really be honored every day. And as a country we aren't doing enough to help and support our mothers. Affordable childcare, putting nurses in every school, funding our public education, and paid family leave are just a few things we can do, and they’re also positions I’ll push when you elect me to Congress in November. So take today to honor the moms in your life, and also reflect on what more we could do for them. clean_body: Hey friends, this is Wiley and I wanted to take a second of your Sunday to talk about Mother’s Day and what it means to me. My mom was an incredibly important figure in my life. She set an important example for me. As one of the first female television news reporters in the 70’s, she broke glass ceiling after glass ceiling, and taught me that anything was possible if I put my mind to it. | | | = Hey Peter, this is Wiley and I wanted to take a second of your Sunday to talk about Mother’s Day and what it means to me. My mom was an incredibly important figure in my life. She set an important example for me. As one of the first female television news reporters in the 70’s, she broke glass ceiling after glass ceiling, and taught me that anything was possible if I put my mind to it. = As a husband to Caroline, I’ve seen the care, kindness, and love she has for our kids and I see the sacrifices she’s made for our family every day. Mother’s Day means so much to me because it means we get to honor the women in our life who should really be honored every day. And as a country we aren't doing enough to help and support our mothers. Affordable childcare, putting nurses in every school, funding our public education, and paid family leave are just a few things we can do, and they’re also positions I’ll push when you elect me to Congress in November. So take today to honor the moms in your life, and also reflect on what more we could do for them. Thank you so much, Wiley Find more information about voting in NC at = Follow Wiley Online: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for Congress Wiley Nickel for Congress PO Box 563 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

| Peter \-
Happy Sunday! We are [9 DAYS](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Lv4VEt65yA6LGssZBd1-Eq3xFIBSqYdKrEeS7NetJ39euckszll2tfe0hu4AesT6PAPWg4SHXLy34e4sbZO73gl_X4MGCK7Uh1Be1l8CG5Uy-28b91mmX-78mQQIRNhll78jlNu3By2s9H9Y73Po4XPag8Q9sQHKuXhqc5wxzI_jAuffmkzjPg==&c=ONum4Z86CfyRgDeSPF4Hy9n2tocLfdwpnRATlfa1kf1MNI0CDgOqzQ==&ch=0TiGWpPOwF5Xyq3vq75bKpOsPtNVNkA-64EYpt-jPLh8WBdkiXP7OA==) out from winning right now, and I thought I'd take this time to talk about the contrast between THIS campaign being backed by the PEOPLE, and my opponents' campaigns being backed by WEF Globalists.
[REAL Republicans](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Lv4VEt65yA6LGssZBd1-Eq3xFIBSqYdKrEeS7NetJ39euckszll2tfe0hu4AesT6PAPWg4SHXLy34e4sbZO73gl_X4MGCK7Uh1Be1l8CG5Uy-28b91mmX-78mQQIRNhll78jlNu3By2s9H9Y73Po4XPag8Q9sQHKuXhqc5wxzI_jAuffmkzjPg==&c=ONum4Z86CfyRgDeSPF4Hy9n2tocLfdwpnRATlfa1kf1MNI0CDgOqzQ==&ch=0TiGWpPOwF5Xyq3vq75bKpOsPtNVNkA-64EYpt-jPLh8WBdkiXP7OA==) don't have connections to the World Economic Forum, but my opponents do. The WEF is the dangerous organization behind the Great Reset whose vision of 2030 is LITERALLY "You will own nothing and you will be happy." They've created a scoring system for companies called ESG (Economic, Social, Governance) and financial institutions have already begun using this metric when evaluating loans to corporations.
They plan to implement this rating system on YOU, cutting you off from resources if you don't meet their environmental or social quotas.
Needless to say, this does NOT align with [AMERICAN](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Lv4VEt65yA6LGssZBd1-Eq3xFIBSqYdKrEeS7NetJ39euckszll2tfe0hu4AesT6PAPWg4SHXLy34e4sbZO73gl_X4MGCK7Uh1Be1l8CG5Uy-28b91mmX-78mQQIRNhll78jlNu3By2s9H9Y73Po4XPag8Q9sQHKuXhqc5wxzI_jAuffmkzjPg==&c=ONum4Z86CfyRgDeSPF4Hy9n2tocLfdwpnRATlfa1kf1MNI0CDgOqzQ==&ch=0TiGWpPOwF5Xyq3vq75bKpOsPtNVNkA-64EYpt-jPLh8WBdkiXP7OA==) values and it CERTAINLY does not align with my values.
We have [9 DAYS](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Lv4VEt65yA6LGssZBd1-Eq3xFIBSqYdKrEeS7NetJ39euckszll2tfe0hu4AesT6PAPWg4SHXLy34e4sbZO73gl_X4MGCK7Uh1Be1l8CG5Uy-28b91mmX-78mQQIRNhll78jlNu3By2s9H9Y73Po4XPag8Q9sQHKuXhqc5wxzI_jAuffmkzjPg==&c=ONum4Z86CfyRgDeSPF4Hy9n2tocLfdwpnRATlfa1kf1MNI0CDgOqzQ==&ch=0TiGWpPOwF5Xyq3vq75bKpOsPtNVNkA-64EYpt-jPLh8WBdkiXP7OA==) left to make this push against the WEF. When I say this is the most important race in our country today, I mean it. We need all hands on deck right now. Please donate whatever you can [RIGHT NOW!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Lv4VEt65yA6LGssZBd1-Eq3xFIBSqYdKrEeS7NetJ39euckszll2tfe0hu4AesT6PAPWg4SHXLy34e4sbZO73gl_X4MGCK7Uh1Be1l8CG5Uy-28b91mmX-78mQQIRNhll78jlNu3By2s9H9Y73Po4XPag8Q9sQHKuXhqc5wxzI_jAuffmkzjPg==&c=ONum4Z86CfyRgDeSPF4Hy9n2tocLfdwpnRATlfa1kf1MNI0CDgOqzQ==&ch=0TiGWpPOwF5Xyq3vq75bKpOsPtNVNkA-64EYpt-jPLh8WBdkiXP7OA==) They're not stopping, so we can't either. name: Liz Oakley (Imani's Mom)
subject: Imani’s letting me take over for the day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oakley for Congress
body:
Peter,

In honor of Mother’s Day, Imani’s letting me take over her email for the day.

While I love celebrating Mother’s Day with my daughter, this year more than most, I’m reminded of the burden mothers — and all women — are facing in this country.

I raised Imani on my own, working as a preschool teacher. And I know firsthand that motherhood can be a struggle, that working class women and women of color don’t get the support they need to raise a family.

And Imani knows it too.

I can’t tell you how proud I am to have such a passionate, dedicated, and determined daughter. It’s been a privilege to watch her run this campaign, fight for what she knows is right, and, most importantly, put in the work to make a real difference for families like ours.

This district, this state, and this country need a leader who understands the challenges women face — who will show up every day and fight for us. And I can guarantee you that Imani will be that leader. So, in honor of Mother’s Day, can you make a donation to support my daughter and join her fight for progress? clean_body: Peter, In honor of Mother’s Day, Imani’s letting me take over her email for the day. While I love celebrating Mother’s Day with my daughter, this year more than most, I’m reminded of the burden mothers — and all women — are facing in this country. I raised Imani on my own, working as a preschool teacher. And I know firsthand that motherhood can be a struggle, that working class women and women of color don’t get the support they need to raise a family. And Imani knows it too. I can’t tell you how proud I am to have such a passionate, dedicated, and determined daughter. It’s been a privilege to watch her run this campaign, fight for what she knows is right, and, most importantly, put in the work to make a real difference for families like ours. This district, this state, and this country need a leader who understands the challenges women face — who will show up every day and fight for us. And I can guarantee you that Imani will be that leader. So, in honor of Mother’s Day, can you make a donation to support my daughter and join her fight for progress? [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. name: Mike Thompson
subject: Honoring moms everywhere
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress unsubscribe: https://support
body:
# [#]
Peter,
# [#]
Happy Mother’s Day! Mother’s Day is the perfect day to celebrate moms everywhere and thank them for their sacrifices, words of encouragement, and unconditional love.

A mother always puts the demands and choices of her child before anything else, which is why they deserve representatives in Congress who will put their needs first. Today, and every day, I am focused on being a strong advocate for mothers and delivering meaningful change to improve their lives.

I hope you will join me in honoring all mothers today and showing love to the special women in your lives. From my family to yours, I hope you have a loving, restful Mother’s Day.

Warmest wishes,

Mike

subject: The woman who inspires me the most
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Congress
body:
---
| | Hi friend. This is an email about my mom, Maria. I know this can be an uncomfortable day for some folks, so if you'd prefer to skip the read, I understand.**[If you click this link, you'll be taken to my campaign website.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45070359/344322981/-277689547?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWQ5Mzc4Yy1kZmNlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QXwk9xcl9Ri0lGIwZhIOI7ItFu3gqFG6AP3agUbTciM=&emci=a7463db2-64cd-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=6ad9378c-dfce-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=5999589)** – Haley Friend, Today, I want to talk about the woman who is my biggest inspiration and supporter – my mom, Maria. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45070362/344322986/-1044029751?refcode=EM_BS_STE_220508_FR_MothersDay_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWQ5Mzc4Yy1kZmNlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QXwk9xcl9Ri0lGIwZhIOI7ItFu3gqFG6AP3agUbTciM=) My mom is the epitome of a strong, hard-working, independent woman, and I am who I am today because of how she raised me. My mom never let obstacles get in the way of pursuing her dreams. She washed dishes to put herself through college, and later on in life, she became an executive for one of Michigan’s top ad agencies (while raising me!) She’s one of the biggest reasons I felt comfortable running for office in the first place. No one in my family was supposed to go to Congress, friend, but because of my mom’s support I felt confident enough to put everything on the line to run against the far-right agenda and flip MI-11 blue. She’s attended several of my campaign events, volunteered her time to knock on doors and meet voters, and has been my biggest cheerleader since day one of my campaign. Happy Mother’s Day to my mom and all of the moms in MI-11 doing one of the hardest jobs out there. I appreciate all that you do. – Haley | | | [Donate ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45070373/344322997/-1044029751?refcode=EM_BS_STE_220508_FR_MothersDay_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWQ5Mzc4Yy1kZmNlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QXwk9xcl9Ri0lGIwZhIOI7ItFu3gqFG6AP3agUbTciM=)

clean_body: | | Hi friend. This is an email about my mom, Maria. I know this can be an uncomfortable day for some folks, so if you'd prefer to skip the read, I understand. – Haley Friend, Today, I want to talk about the woman who is my biggest inspiration and supporter – my mom, Maria. = My mom is the epitome of a strong, hard-working, independent woman, and I am who I am today because of how she raised me. My mom never let obstacles get in the way of pursuing her dreams. She washed dishes to put herself through college, and later on in life, she became an executive for one of Michigan’s top ad agencies (while raising me!) She’s one of the biggest reasons I felt comfortable running for office in the first place. No one in my family was supposed to go to Congress, friend, but because of my mom’s support I felt confident enough to put everything on the line to run against the far-right agenda and flip MI-11 blue. She’s attended several of my campaign events, volunteered her time to knock on doors and meet voters, and has been my biggest cheerleader since day one of my campaign. Happy Mother’s Day to my mom and all of the moms in MI-11 doing one of the hardest jobs out there. I appreciate all that you do. – Haley | | | = | | = | If you'd like to support Haley Stevens for Congress, you can = We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: Remembering my mom this Mother’s Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
#
Friend,
I’m thinking a lot about my mom today. I miss her every day, but her memory and legacy are also my motivation to keep fighting for families like ours. I got into public service for people like my mom.
I think of her commitment to service even as we struggled. She raised us in North Philly, and we moved around a lot to avoid eviction. I had to watch my mom ration her insulin because — even though she worked in health care as a home health aide — she couldn't afford the co-pay.
She’d always remind me: _“Nobody can do everything, but everybody can do something. You always have more than someone else.”_
I reflect on her taking out payday loans and borrowing from loan sharks to provide for me and my siblings — knowing it would push her further into debt but never wanting us to spend a day on the street.
I remember her tough love and soft embrace, pushing me to go big — never allowing humble beginnings as an excuse for me or those around her to not succeed.
I think of her pushing me to get involved. As an 11-year-old, I complained about trash and blight on the block we were living on and she snapped back, _“if you care so much, go do something about it.”_
I ran for junior block captain and my own commitment to service was born.
I’m still proud of her for going back to school and getting her associate's degree from Harcum College after learning disabilities and shame kept her from completing her B.A. at Delaware State.
And every day I’m grateful for all she poured into me and taught me. Every day I wish she was here to give an encouraging word or recite the perfect bible verse for inspiration and wisdom. I miss her every day.
But I also know there are so many other Kelly Kenyattas out there — working hard, but never enough to get ahead. Hardworking moms and mom figures who deserve so much more than they ever got.
This movement is about them.
Malcolm
Malcolm Kenyatta is running to represent working people from Pennsylvania in the U.S. Senate. [This campaign is powered by everyday people giving a few bucks at a time. Could you chip in to fuel our movement and elect a working-class champion to the Senate?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45070570/344323569/-1561822662?refcode2=4fcdeab4-dfce-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&refcode=em220508-1-30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZmNkZWFiNC1kZmNlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iIgVE0E39QcIsQB5ive1wuMQbCCMMm3qmqtVFjNJPO0=) **[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45070571/344323570/-1561822662?refcode2=4fcdeab4-dfce-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&refcode=em220508-1-30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZmNkZWFiNC1kZmNlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iIgVE0E39QcIsQB5ive1wuMQbCCMMm3qmqtVFjNJPO0=)**

name: John King
subject: To all the moms…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer
body:
If you’ll allow me, I’d like to share with you why I am so particularly grateful to the mother figures who shaped my life.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45070579/344323690/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220508-b1_hld_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220508-b1_hld_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220508&&&&utm_content=b1_hld_full&&&&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=79d9378c-dfce-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OWQ5Mzc4Yy1kZmNlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=24SfANfbM4EVWD9-A-gtxLmurNVO33bo8AHwvzIhw80=)
---
| To all the moms out there, Happy Mother’s Day! Losing my mom at a young age, I’ve always been particularly sensitive to Mother’s Day and I want to say to anyone else who struggles on this day: I see you and I feel you. So if this email will be difficult for you to read, I understand. **Though if you’ll allow me, I’d like to share with you why I am so particularly grateful to the mother figures who shaped my life.** **My mom, Adalina King,** was born in Ponce, Puerto Rico and became the first person in her family to graduate college. She then went on to become a school guidance counselor in the New York City public school system. Every day I still think about her spirit of love, kindness, and passion for education, and I am proud to carry on her legacy and love for learning. **My grandmother, Estelle Livingston Stansberry King,** was one of the first Black graduates from the University of Maryland Eastern Shore. After graduation in 1894, she became a nurse and championed to her sons, including my father John Sr., the importance of formal education and of working hard. In the face of deep discrimination, my grandmother broke barriers that would go on to change the trajectory of my entire family – and I do my best to take her example to heart by serving my community with dignity and passion. **My maternal grandmother, Sergia Santigo,** was one of the most courageous women I’ve ever known. As a young Puerto Rican woman in the 1940s, my grandmother bravely walked out of a fraught marriage and took a risk moving with her two young kids to the Bronx in New York City. Though she spoke limited English then, she was able to secure a job working in a garment factory and enrolled her kids in public school with the hope they would get to have the education she never did. To this day, nothing will ever taste better than her homemade arroz con pollo. **My wife Melissa** is the amazing mother to our two beautiful daughters, Mireya and Amina. Like so many moms, Melissa is the glue of our family. She exudes love and caring - from her career as a public school teacher and education researcher to her deep commitment to community and family - and has set an amazing example for our daughters as they grow. Mireya, Amina, and I could not be luckier, and nothing will ever bring me as much joy as time spent with Melissa and the girls. It was because of these incredible women — the sacrifices both of my grandmothers made in hopes of a brighter future, my mother’s love during my early years before she passed away, and Melissa’s support and partnership — that I have had such amazing opportunities throughout my life: graduating from three Ivy League schools, being a public school teacher and principal, serving as U.S. Secretary of Education, and now, running to be the first Afro-Latino governor in American history. **I am so lucky to follow in the footsteps of these women, and I hope to honor them by making history as the first-ever Black and Puerto Rican governor of Maryland.** Thank you and Happy Mother’s Day, John King
---

She then went on to become a school guidance counselor in the New York City public school system. Every day I still think about her spirit of love, kindness, and passion for education, and I am proud to carry on her legacy and love for learning. My grandmother, Estelle Livingston Stansberry King, was one of the first Black graduates from the University of Maryland Eastern Shore. After graduation in 1894, she became a nurse and championed to her sons, including my father John Sr., the importance of formal education and of working hard. In the face of deep discrimination, my grandmother broke barriers that would go on to change the trajectory of my entire family – and I do my best to take her example to heart by serving my community with dignity and passion. My maternal grandmother, Sergia Santigo, was one of the most courageous women I’ve ever known. As a young Puerto Rican woman in the 1940s, my grandmother bravely walked out of a fraught marriage and took a risk moving with her two young kids to the Bronx in New York City. Though she spoke limited English then, she was able to secure a job working in a garment factory and enrolled her kids in public school with the hope they would get to have the education she never did. To this day, nothing will ever taste better than her homemade arroz con pollo. My wife Melissa is the amazing mother to our two beautiful daughters, Mireya and Amina. Like so many moms, Melissa is the glue of our family. She exudes love and caring - from her career as a public school teacher and education researcher to her deep commitment to community and family - and has set an amazing example for our daughters as they grow. Mireya, Amina, and I could not be luckier, and nothing will ever bring me as much joy as time spent with Melissa and the girls. It was because of these incredible women — the sacrifices both of my grandmothers made in hopes of a brighter future, my mother’s love during my early years before she passed away, and Melissa’s support and partnership — that I have had such amazing opportunities throughout my life: graduating from three Ivy League schools, being a public school teacher and principal, serving as U.S. Secretary of Education, and now, running to be the first Afro-Latino governor in American history. I am so lucky to follow in the footsteps of these women, and I hope to honor them by making history as the first-ever Black and Puerto Rican governor of Maryland. Thank you and Happy Mother’s Day, John King | = * | | = Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer John King for Governor PO Box 8429 Silver Spring, MD 20907 United States | | | ---|---|--- = = If you would like to learn more about John King's historic campaign for Maryland governor, text PROGRESS to 48178 or visit our _. body:
| Peter –

I’m Harriet, and I’m so proud to say that I am Michele’s mother.

From the moment she was born, I knew Michele’s life was going to be an exceptional one, and wow has she lived up to that.

**_State representative. Public defender. Civil rights lawyer. A proud queer Black woman._ And now she’s running for Congress.**

[Today being Mother’s Day I wanted to help out the campaign and tell you a bit about my daughter. Before I dive in, I have to ask: Will you chip in $3 to Michele’s campaign today? Her team tells me they need to raise $2,000 this week to stay competitive:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45070598/344323735/1210045690?amount=3&refcode=MRFC_20220508_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmQ5Mzc4Yy1kZmNlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_U5V9pnDRJGqZ-B7JdlEybMx9FQEiqZ8yrAXV4UgQ8U=) | [CHIP IN $3 TO ELECT MICHELE RAYNER TO CONGRESS »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45070608/344323745/1210045690?amount=3&refcode=MRFC_20220508_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmQ5Mzc4Yy1kZmNlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_U5V9pnDRJGqZ-B7JdlEybMx9FQEiqZ8yrAXV4UgQ8U=)
---
Like Michele, I’m no stranger to being the first in your field – _and the resolve it takes to break barriers for those after you._

My husband and I were among the first Black students to attend the University of South Florida in the early 1960s, and I went on to become one of the first Black social workers in St. Petersburg.

We instilled the value of community service to Michele from a young age. My husband always told her “Help others. Do the right thing. And most importantly always keep your head up high.” And I’m so impressed with how much she has done for the people of Florida, Peter.

[Michele’s going all in for the people of Pinellas County, Peter. Not the powerful, not the big corporations, but the people just like you and me. I know she can deliver real results for the people of Florida, not the same old band-aid solutions that barely get us by. »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45070611/344323753/1210045690?amount=3&refcode=MRFC_20220508_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmQ5Mzc4Yy1kZmNlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_U5V9pnDRJGqZ-B7JdlEybMx9FQEiqZ8yrAXV4UgQ8U=)

body:

**Welcome to the Ron DeSantis Round Up where we help you stay up-to-date with America's favorite Governor!**
---
|
---
On Friday, Governor DeSantis signed the largest tax relief package in Florida history. Click******[here](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=60dedc625cf0c1699bb8eac3f918efc8ac28b4de5a57084e1cea58ee064ee9608e4e06a9225910c7163346c633782fff6eec5a97063399bfc39aee86fc0b8edf)** to find the full list of the Sunshine State's new tax-free holidays.

|

**[WATCH](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=60dedc625cf0c169f10a88cf50c432a77a1f88cb3c95e28c21265a0fbecaa47653d9d5c095e7786a20152462c3ac4c3b38a6a6884166d20fddfcdbfb99b3bf06)** : Governor DeSantis blasts the media for lying about him attending the White House Correspondents' Dinner:

---
| [](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=60dedc625cf0c1691e35f943767b70032df20adf4a357fe15e7ab2ed54f3653ad17fd001f92c9fe22adeb13f13ab8a327ba9a212fb416d473ac171e03678b470)
---

**_" Here they are saying how important they are, that they are somehow these paragons of truth, and yet there they are lying about something that is readily verifiable."_**
**Watch the Governor's comments here**: **[I Would Never Attend That](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=60dedc625cf0c169f10a88cf50c432a77a1f88cb3c95e28c21265a0fbecaa47653d9d5c095e7786a20152462c3ac4c3b38a6a6884166d20fddfcdbfb99b3bf06)**

---
|
---

Governor DeSantis brought his oldest daughter Madison, _and her stuffed manatee_ , with him when he signed a record $30 million in funding for efforts to protect Florida's manatees. The new legislation includes:
* Restoration of habitats
* Rescue and recovery efforts
* Expansion of acute care facilities
* Restoration efforts for access to warm spring waters

---
|
---

---
|
---

In an announcement on Wednesday, Governor DeSantis reaffirmed his commitment to combatting red tide and investing in Florida's beaches with nearly $14 million in funding to support red tide research and innovative mitigation technologies. From the Governor:
**_" We're fortunate to be Floridians. You have a lot of people that work hard, they save to be able to come to Florida to have fun and to bring their families. We welcome that and we're really happy that we have such beautiful beaches here. Particularly, I think, in this stretch, some of the best beaches in the world are right here in our own backyard."_**

---
|
---

Governor DeSantis has worked to champion fatherhood and families across the Sunshine State. [**Listen**](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=60dedc625cf0c1698820219c87a8cb51c1dfa222fd38e7986b7a1bc0310530c87f3d6335db25565881f59e2563ca31f889e86cceec5ae0f51543617499e370e5) to him discuss his favorite parts of being a father on **_ The Truth with Lisa Boothe Podcast._**

---
| [](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=60dedc625cf0c16914eebdba42967b8e0f0e6587bbb7e183f89d29f7f0e1e7f0542d27a3c5182827e2e1b2a0589cd30afa17db758c3d65e198ef060790a3462c)
---

---
|
---

This week, Governor DeSantis signed legislation that will provide funding to aid Florida's coastal and inland communities.
**_" Our $20 million investment will fund assessments important to strengthening Florida's infrastructure to withstand the impacts of flooding and storm surge. My administration will keep up the momentum to support resilience efforts for communities across the state."_**

---
|
---

**From the reelection campaign:** _" As Joe Biden and the Democrat Party continue to lose their footing with the Hispanic community, Republicans are gaining and growing. Spanish-speaking Hispanics in Florida and across the country are moving toward Governor Ron DeSantis because of his emphasis on economic opportunity, education, public safety, and other family-focused policies."_

**Read the Fox News article _[here](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=60dedc625cf0c16945f44495d96e58e7ded573d2bd2bcdb0fe7233a76be9f56a5a1624d9ba8b8878ec1e8b3ffa7f6b67170e56af7fe52798e049fdf3f13bdb6b "here")_.**

---
|
---

Governor DeSantis has been traveling across the Sunshine State speaking with dedicated leaders who are working hard to ensure conservatives are elected statewide this November. Special thanks to Leon and Pinellas counties for hosting the Governor this week!

---
|

Thank you for being a strong supporter of our movement to keep Florida FREE. **We couldn't do it without you.**

subject: McMullin Clown Car
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
Utah Democrats are piling into the Evan McMullin Clown Car! [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6970%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=Lr7LRO7rMxWKrchua8%2fTVQ&sysid=1)

Fellow Conservative: Utah Democrats are piling into the **Evan McMullin Clown Car!**
No seriously! The Utah Democrat Party recently held its convention to pick a candidate to run against conservative Senator Mike Lee. They knew they couldn’t beat one of the most effective leaders in the Senate, so they voted _not to nominate any candidate in 2022_. Instead, they _**endorsed**_ preening, never-Trump fraud, Evan McMullin.
**[Even McMullin is a liberal and we can't let him trick the voters in Utah. Please take action now to support Mike Lee.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61898%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=e7%2bXjLuW4uFCmzfP7pIIUA&sysid=1)**
You may remember Mr. “McMuffin” from his “Hey Look At Me!” presidential campaign in 2016. He pretended to be the “principled” Republican in the race! But he quickly showed he was just another Beltway RINO - and spent the last six years throwing Twitter tantrums about Donald Trump’s historic success in the White House.
Deprived of the attention he craves, McMullin decided he wasn’t so conservative after all - and began plotting a run against Mike Lee. Of course, he could never beat Mike Lee in a Republican primary so he filed to _**run as an independent and immediately started working with Democrats to get their endorsement.**_
**[Please support Mike Lee's conservative campaign today!](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61899%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=snIRf3Iu8JPBdI7wPMgPwQ&sysid=1)**
Mike Lee is one of the most principled conservatives in elected office today. He stands for the Constitution, for secure borders and elections, for the rights of the unborn, religious believers, and against Swamp Corruption. So, of course, the Democrats can’t stand him.
But the GOP Establishment is opposed to Mike Lee too! He's a genuine, principled, fighting conservative - so he’s as much a thorn in the side of Mitch McConnell as he is to Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer. _**(That’s why Mitt Romney refuses to endorse Lee!)**_
**[Stop the establishment's McMullin Clown Car!](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61890%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DqvSAtIsibtdXVCkIz%2bkog&sysid=1)**
Mike Lee was one of SCF’s first endorsements in the 2010 Tea Party election, and he has continued to fight for our values year after year. He is precisely the kind of fighter and leader conservatives need if we’re ever to rescue America from the woke, socialist cabal now running Washington.
**[Help Mike Lee defeat Evan McMullin with a generous contribution of $25, $50, $100, or more today.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61891%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RLCQt53RdDbFJYZ%2b%2b5r2Aw&sysid=1)**
_SCF will pay all processing fees and transfer 100% of your contribution to Lee's campaign. You can also support any of our other endorsed candidates in the same online transaction._
Thank you for considering this request and for doing so much to help us build a conservative Senate. Sincerely,

name: Dr. Kermit Jones
subject: For my mother
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kermit Jones for Congress
body:
| | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45071698/344328906/1690235765?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220508mother_dkj_90da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjAyNTQzZS1lMWNlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YBRWQNRDpvtd-ZEUw06ADICG7Q_7jBnxxwkQKOGKhfU=)
---
Growing up, I’d tag along with my mom, a home-health nurse, as she visited patients around our town. I loved how she could make folks feel so at ease, and I thought all of the medical terms she knew were so snazzy. **I wanted to be just like her.** So I went to medical school, and after 9/11 deployed as a Navy surgeon to Iraq. I was working at a California hospital when we found out my mother had lung cancer. For the first time, I was on the other side of the exam room, and it was terrifying. I took on navigating the health care system for my mother — advocating for her to her doctors, fighting with the administrators to order more tests, and the insurance companies to cover her care. My mother’s cancer was serious, and she is alive today because we had a doctor in the family who knew how to navigate the health care system. That’s not acceptable to me. **You shouldn’t need a doctor in the family to receive the treatment you deserve.** **To my community:** The experience of caring for my mother through her fight against cancer is a large part of why I’m running for office and why I have put out a peer-reviewed plan to increase access, lower health care costs and make treatments available. I pledge to fight for you and your family like I did for my mother. **To my mother:** thank you for making me the doctor I am today. For teaching me how to treat patients like family, and never give up fighting for a cure. With love, Kermit

| | Kermit Jones is a Democrat, doctor, and Navy veteran running for Congress in California's 3rd District.
[Help him flip this seat by donating today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45071699/344328916/1690235765?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220508mother_dkj_90da_xx_ftrlnk&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjAyNTQzZS1lMWNlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YBRWQNRDpvtd-ZEUw06ADICG7Q_7jBnxxwkQKOGKhfU=)

clean_body: | | = Growing up, I’d tag along with my mom, a home-health nurse, as she visited patients around our town. I loved how she could make folks feel so at ease, and I thought all of the medical terms she knew were so snazzy. I wanted to be just like her. So I went to medical school, and after 9/11 deployed as a Navy surgeon to Iraq. I was working at a California hospital when we found out my mother had lung cancer. For the first time, I was on the other side of the exam room, and it was terrifying. I took on navigating the health care system for my mother — advocating for her to her doctors, fighting with the administrators to order more tests, and the insurance companies to cover her care. My mother’s cancer was serious, and she is alive today because we had a doctor in the family who knew how to navigate the health care system. That’s not acceptable to me. You shouldn’t need a doctor in the family to receive the treatment you deserve. To my community: The experience of caring for my mother through her fight against cancer is a large part of why I’m running for office and why I have put out a peer-reviewed plan to increase access, lower health care costs and make treatments available. I pledge to fight for you and your family like I did for my mother. To my mother: thank you for making me the doctor I am today. For teaching me how to treat patients like family, and never give up fighting for a cure. With love, Kermit | | Kermit Jones is a Democrat, doctor, and Navy veteran running for Congress in California's 3rd District. = | = | Paid for by Kermit Jones for Congress Kermit Jones for Congress PO Box 713 Roseville, CA 95661 United States Kermit Jones is a former member of the U.S. Navy. | Peter,

Happy Mother’s Day! I wanted to tell you about my grandma, Valerie, who I call my GiGi. She’s the best grandma ever, and I love her so much! She is always there for me when I need her. I am very thankful for her.

I wanted to share three things my GiGi tells me every day. First, my GiGi always tells me to try my best. Secondly, she tells me always to treat others with kindness. Lastly, she tells me to always check up on our neighbors and make sure they are okay. (Just like she does!)

My GiGi is such a great grandma, so I know she would be a great member of Congress too! [_**Can you please help me make sure my GiGi has a fantastic Mother’s Day by giving to her campaign today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45071990/344330353/2085084876?refcode=BLU-VFC-20220508-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjIxYTQzOC1lMmNlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7Ik30Y0W5LkUOyyvsSNi9o7B9yby86I6ctSvr88fHDk=) I know she would really appreciate your support, just like I appreciate hers!

clean_body: Happy Mother’s Day! I wanted to tell you about my grandma, Valerie, who I call my GiGi. | = | Peter, Happy Mother’s Day! I wanted to tell you about my grandma, Valerie, who I call my GiGi. She’s the best grandma ever, and I love her so much! She is always there for me when I need her. I am very thankful for her. I wanted to share three things my GiGi tells me every day. First, my GiGi always tells me to try my best. Secondly, she tells me always to treat others with kindness. Lastly, she tells me to always check up on our neighbors and make sure they are okay. (Just like she does!) My GiGi is such a great grandma, so I know she would be a great member of Congress too! = I know she would really appreciate your support, just like I appreciate hers! | = Thank you so much! I hope you have a great day! Stanley Foushee III Age 6 * | | = Paid for by Foushee for Congress Valerie Foushee for Congress PO Box 16446 Chapel Hill, NC 27516 United States | | ---|--- Email is a critical way for the Foushee campaign to stay in touch with you. body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/RN9dzHUt4G_v7M0iR1DcjKAZHWsFaS1QMrPMTQSORBQ=/vXNgHjW4Whe4FIC4Ev7kHVlz6x4is3r5thDo3o-GjVQ=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20220508-1-EM&amount=25)
---
| Peter,

Happy Mother's Day!

Today, I am happily celebrating with my mother - a woman who has modeled tenacity, resilience, and the importance of a good sense of humor throughout my life - and my daughters - young girls who challenge, inspire, and motivate me each day.

They motivate me to work hard and believe in the possibility and promise of the future. The work I do in Congress is for their generation - to ensure a better and safer world, a healthier planet, a strong and vibrant country, and a future of boundless opportunity and promise. These are lofty and idealistic goals, but future generations deserve us to believe these things are possible.
Abigail

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45072152/344331525/-1922217643?refcode=em_fr_2022.05.08_b1_mamm_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDFhNDVjMS1lM2NlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gPU6e70sq_Z8JduNKuWZ84bcD53LM0G_M09SQUp82_s=) **We decided to take over our mom’s email today to wish her, and all the wonderful Iowan moms reading this, a Happy Mother’s Day!** Watching our mom work towards her goals has always empowered us. We’ve been rooting for her our entire life, and we want to see young women inspired by her, in the way that she has always inspired us. She handles every punch thrown at her with grace and dignity. She gives everything she has to serve the people of Iowa, and we know that as a congresswoman, she will never stop fighting for you. Liz Mathis is a strong woman who has always pushed us to be our best selves, and we are so proud to call her our mother! name: Emilia Sykes
subject: My mom taught me about public service
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emilia Sykes for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45072192/344331606/-1747990279?refcode=em_msg_2022.05.08_b1_es_all&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTNkNDdkNC1lM2NlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1KQhoVTwxI8tQ38YypFO59IoZ5nv5SJbziDODNItTsk=)
Peter,

I wanted to take a moment today to wish every mother a very happy Mother’s Day. My whole life, my mom has been my sounding board, my source of inspiration, and my biggest supporter.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45072193/344331607/-1747990279?refcode=em_msg_2022.05.08_b1_es_all&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTNkNDdkNC1lM2NlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1KQhoVTwxI8tQ38YypFO59IoZ5nv5SJbziDODNItTsk=) _My mom and I at a city council meeting. The mug says “The best man for the job is a woman.”_
I like to joke that most parents expose their children in utero to classical music and reading certain books, but I was exposed to city council meetings.

While as a child I never planned to become a lawmaker myself, my parents inspired me to give back to my home and fight for the things that really matter.

**Now as I run for Congress, it’s my mom’s love for public service and deep-seated commitment to this community – the community that raised me – that has helped shape who I am today and how I see my own public service.**

Thank you and I hope you have a peaceful and relaxing day with the ones you love.

Emilia
---

**A native of Akron, Ohio, Emilia Sykes has deep roots fighting for Ohioans. She learned from a young age how to use her voice and the power of the people to create change.** **As the _State Representative for Akron_ and _Ohio's State House Minority Leader_ , _Emilia cut through the divisiveness to deliver results_.**

[**Can we count on you to chip in a few dollars to Emilia's campaign?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45072194/344331608/-1747990279?refcode=em_msg_2022.05.08_b1_es_all&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTNkNDdkNC1lM2NlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1KQhoVTwxI8tQ38YypFO59IoZ5nv5SJbziDODNItTsk=) | [**DONATE »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45072195/344331609/-1747990279?refcode=em_msg_2022.05.08_b1_es_all&&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTNkNDdkNC1lM2NlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1KQhoVTwxI8tQ38YypFO59IoZ5nv5SJbziDODNItTsk=)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Fairness Project The Fairness Project
body:
We see you, we support you, and we will never stop fighting for you. | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/45072481/344333442/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTlkMDhmNS1lNmNlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fB0e3KfaQS1iEqOCcwEmwcEoyrQsy4KKA0ZVa57NG60=&emci=fe19d566-8ecc-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=299d08f5-e6ce-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=561582) | _Mother’s Day can be a challenging time for many of us – especially for those who cannot be with their moms or who have lost loved ones. Our team is thinking of you today. Please make sure to look after yourself and feel free to skip this message if you need._ Hey, Friend! It’s been quite the week, but we wanted to take a second to celebrate all the wonderful moms, grandmas, stepmoms, and moms-to-be out there and wish you a very Happy Mother’s Day! Moms are the backbone of many of our families, essential to our workforce, and on the front lines of fighting for our progressive values. **Moms do so much for us.** That’s why we are investing in ballot measures that will impact the lives of moms across the country, especially women of color and sole-income earners, by raising wages, increasing access to health care, expanding paid family leave policies, and codifying reproductive rights. So, this Mother’s Day to all the moms out there: We are so proud to have you in this fight with us. **We see you, we support you, and we will never stop fighting for you. ** Thank you for all that you do and have a very happy Mother’s Day!! In solidarity, Fairness Project Team
---

clean_body: Check his shameful record at RealTomKean.com [] , Tom Kean is hypocrisy at its finest. He’ll look you in the eye and say he’s a “conservative” and a “Republican”, but we have the receipts. When you get to know the Real Tom Kean, you’ll discover he’s woke on gender, anti-Second Amendment, and pro-CRT. But even worse, Kean is Pro-China. SEND PHIL RIZZO TO FIGHT FOR YOU [] China is undoubtedly the biggest national security threat to the United States. And you’d think that Tom Kean would agree based on what he says: [] But actions speak louder than words, and Kean’s actions will give you hearing damage. Kean might say China needs to be held accountable, but here’s what Kean DOES: Holds stock in and profits from China’s Alibaba Group, a company with deep ties to the Chinese Communist Party policies. And that same company was recently caught [] promoting facial recognition technology to allow the Chinese government to identify and target the Uyghur Muslim poplution. If Kean is okay investing in a company that assists [] the CCP in silencing dissent and creating a surveillance state, what makes you think he wouldn’t support Biden’s “Disinformation Governance Board”? And if you thought that was bad, that’s not even close to Kean’s whole record! See his full radical, woke, Leftist record here []. MEET THE REAL TOM KEAN [] Tom Kean has been selling out New Jersey for over 20 years. The people deserve to know the truth about Kean. Kean doesn’t represent our values and doesn’t deserve to represent the people of New Jersey in Congress. STOP THE SELLOUT, VOLUNTEER FOR PHIL [] Forward this email to 5 friends or family members who live in our district so they can know the truth about the Real Tom Kean too. Join the fight for our state, [] Phil Rizzo P.S. It’s quick, secure, and ABSOLUTELY vital that I have your support. Let’s keep this momentum going. We need every patriot in our corner. Please donate here []. PAID FOR BY PHIL RIZZO FOR CONGRESS. As you know, Elaine is a very busy person.
Before she was in Congress, she balanced owning a small business and being a mom. And before all of that, she was overseeing nuclear reactors for the Navy.
So, every day I try to take a little bit off of her plate. Sometimes that means doing our daughter’s hair.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45072698/344335489/1679455200?refcode=EM_BS_LUR_220508_FR_MothersDay_A0_na_U1_X2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjM2MyZTlmMi1lN2NlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i5NWr69FG-y-YTkl1B8RCO72dwX_jEVSy-W4T7hQzkQ=)
But right now, that means helping out with fundraising.
**Elaine let me know her Republican opponents are getting attention from folks like twice-impeached former President Donald Trump, and that VA-02 is now thought to be one of the most likely House districts to flip in 2022. **
So I want to help Elaine boost her fundraising ahead of the primary election so she can show national Republicans that she has the resources and the grassroots team that it takes to hold her seat.

As a matter of fact, as TPUSA contributor Drew Hernandez recently documented at the gates of Disneyland, the Leftists will _VICIOUSLY_ attack parents and concerned Americans who dare defend their right to protect children from harmful Left-wing ideology. That's why it is CRITICAL that Real Americans like you and me fight back by boycotting the companies who are trying to sexualize and indoctrinate our children! TPUSA Faith is on the front lines in the fight against these destructive forces -- chief among them Disney -- and we need you in the fight as well! Make no mistake, Fellow American -- Disney is actively working to break the generational cycle of liberty that has kept America free. _They're undermining not only the innocence of precious children, but the very fabric of American society._ We **_CANNOT_** let them continue unopposed! name: Michelle Lujan Grisham
subject: I want to tell you about my mom.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by New Mexicans for Michelle, John Wertheim, Treasurer
body:
My mom was truly one of a kind
| | |
---
It's Mother's Day, Peter – so I want to tell you a little bit more about how my late mother, Sonja Lujan, inspires me endlessly.
My mom was truly one of a kind. Like so many caring and devoted mothers, she became a dedicated advocate for my sister Kimberly and children with disabilities across the country. She worked to right every wrong and fought for the best standard of care, refusing to back down when she knew there was more that could be done.
My mother taught me to fight hard – she's the one who inspired me to ensure that no one is left behind, that no family lacks the support they need and deserve. Her determination in the face of seemingly insurmountable challenges has inspired me every single day of my adult life.
It's because of my mom that I had the tenacity and courage to become the first Democratic Hispanic woman Governor, expand our state's free child care program, sign a groundbreaking law to provide free higher education, and strengthen primary education.
Today is the first Mother's Day I've spent without my mom. She passed last month, surrounded by the people that she loved. We treasured every minute with her – and I will miss her very, very much.
I know this day can be bittersweet for so many families. So, whether you're commemorating your own late mother, gathering with your children, or meeting with the whole family, I hope that you are able to find joy in celebrating the women who raised you today.

Happy Mother's Day,

Michelle Lujan Grisham

subject: Celebrating mothers and caregivers!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45073700/344340350/-2134616058?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220508mothersday_yc_allop_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjJiMzJjMS1lOWNlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nWeRzAYUqx8A9aP721SNwVN3tkIX1PgEyDKg7G2yHeE=)
