Peter, I wanted to take a moment to wish a Happy Mother’s Day to all who celebrate – including my own mom! I wouldn’t be the woman I am today if it weren’t for my mom’s guidance and love. My mom is truly one of the most caring people I’ve ever met. She has a way about her that makes her feel like everyone’s mom. She’s the person we all go to for advice, and whether it’s opening her home to others, or just making sure that we all have a delicious meal at the end of the day, caring for others is something that she’s excelled at since she was a young girl caring for her siblings on a ranch in Mexico. She set an example for me on what it means to take care of others and it’s what led me to become a pediatrician, a state legislator, and with your help, hopefully the first Latina Congressperson from Colorado. Peter, if elected to Congress, I promise to continue pushing for these values my mother instilled in me. My commitment is to the working families of Colorado, and to all those whose voices have long been ignored in Washington. [**If you can, please make a contribution today so I can continue this fight in Congress for Colorado’s new 8th district.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45073701/344340351/-2134616058?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220508mothersday_yc_allop_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjJiMzJjMS1lOWNlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nWeRzAYUqx8A9aP721SNwVN3tkIX1PgEyDKg7G2yHeE=) | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: | = Peter, I wanted to take a moment to wish a Happy Mother’s Day to all who celebrate – including my own mom! I wouldn’t be the woman I am today if it weren’t for my mom’s guidance and love. My mom is truly one of the most caring people I’ve ever met. She has a way about her that makes her feel like everyone’s mom. She’s the person we all go to for advice, and whether it’s opening her home to others, or just making sure that we all have a delicious meal at the end of the day, caring for others is something that she’s excelled at since she was a young girl caring for her siblings on a ranch in Mexico. She set an example for me on what it means to take care of others and it’s what led me to become a pediatrician, a state legislator, and with your help, hopefully the first Latina Congressperson from Colorado. Peter, if elected to Congress, I promise to continue pushing for these values my mother instilled in me. My commitment is to the working families of Colorado, and to all those whose voices have long been ignored in Washington. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = = Thanks for your continued support, Yadira | Yadira Caraveo is a pediatrician, state representative, and daughter of immigrants. Her parents raised her and her siblings on her father’s construction worker’s salary in Adams County. In the legislature, Dr. Caraveo has delivered for working Coloradans by standing up to the biggest corporate bullies and entrenched special interests. Now, Dr. Caraveo is running for Congress to stand up for hard-working families she sees falling through the cracks. Dr. Caraveo would be the first Latina to represent Colorado in Congress and the only physician in Colorado’s congressional delegation. = | = | PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS Caraveo for Congress PO Box 953 Eastlake, CO 80614 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Rick Scott
subject: Happy Mother’s Day!
body:
Peter, I wanted to take a moment to wish all the women raising future patriots a happy Mother’s Day.

I especially want to thank my wife Ann, who has been the most amazing wife, mother, and grandmother to our family. _In a time when the socialist Left wants to erase gender and the nuclear family. Now is a great time to recognize moms who do so much for their families._

Take a moment today to thank your mother and do something special for her. She deserves it. Thank You, Rick Scott Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida Contributions to this committee are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Rick Scott for Florida. Fellow Conservative, I couldn’t let today go by without wishing all the amazing patriotic moms out there a **Happy Mother’s Day.** You have undertaken a critical duty to raise strong, upstanding citizens who will carry America into the future. With the state of the country currently looking dire, your job is more important than ever. And that is why your work in shaping the lives of the country’s children should be celebrated not only today but every day. We should take time today to recognize the vital contribution of mothers across America and let them know how special they are. Have a Happy Mother’s Day! —John Kovacs
---

---
| | Happy Mother’s Day, Peter! Today, I am celebrating the past, present, and future mothers, grandmothers, step-mothers, and honorary mothers. They all play a critical role in raising our future generations and deserve to be recognized today and every day. I am honoring my mother, Vicki Levin. Even 14 years after her passing, I remember the dedication to social and educational justice she demonstrated throughout her life. She was so devoted to babies, kids and public education, and she worked to advance research on children’s mental health for decades. Mom taught me to fight for every child to receive a quality education and have a warm, safe place in the world. I miss her dearly. I’m also celebrating Mary — my life partner, high school sweetheart, and mother of our four kids. She has taught six grade, started successful nonprofits for at-risk girls and English language learners, led PTAs, run a clean energy business. I’m telling you, there is nothing this woman can’t do! She is my most effective advocate on the campaign trail. We raised our family here in Michigan’s new Eleventh District and it’s an honor to be on this journey with her. Peter, I acknowledge that this holiday can also be difficult. I want to honor all mothers today — from chosen families, to people who have lost their mothers — and those who choose not to be mothers. This day is for all of you. Let’s go! Andy

---

clean_body: Today, I am celebrating the past, present, and future mothers, grandmothers, step-mothers, and honorary mothers. | | | | | Happy Mother’s Day, Peter! Today, I am celebrating the past, present, and future mothers, grandmothers, step-mothers, and honorary mothers. They all play a critical role in raising our future generations and deserve to be recognized today and every day. I am honoring my mother, Vicki Levin. Even 14 years after her passing, I remember the dedication to social and educational justice she demonstrated throughout her life. She was so devoted to babies, kids and public education, and she worked to advance research on children’s mental health for decades. Mom taught me to fight for every child to receive a quality education and have a warm, safe place in the world. I miss her dearly. I’m also celebrating Mary — my life partner, high school sweetheart, and mother of our four kids. She has taught six grade, started successful nonprofits for at-risk girls and English language learners, led PTAs, run a clean energy business. I’m telling you, there is nothing this woman can’t do! She is my most effective advocate on the campaign trail. We raised our family here in Michigan’s new Eleventh District and it’s an honor to be on this journey with her. Peter, I acknowledge that this holiday can also be difficult. I want to honor all mothers today — from chosen families, to people who have lost their mothers — and those who choose not to be mothers. This day is for all of you. Let’s go! Andy | | | | | = | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | | ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Andy Levin for Congress | Andy Levin For Congress P.O. Box 1050 Birmingham, MI 48012 United States | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you believe you received this email in error or wish to no longer receive emails from us, .

name: Katie Hill
subject: For all the moms out there 💜
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/NMaCZGeo3Te6ZTANy6SZhIAL_cRSFWinshtxaIDhhRA=/9eXvouqoUYGo0TV-ksX4a5CRvx6sZoGaTEOzljkjQSU=)
---
Happy Mother's Day, Peter!
This is my first Mother's Day as a mom, which I'm *very* excited about.
It's a total cliche, but it's true. _Being a mom is the hardest job in the world_ -- especially in a country with so little maternal support. **That being said, it 's also the best, most rewarding, and most important job. **
So today, I'm celebrating all the moms out there, in all the forms they come in. From all of us at HER Time: Happy Mother's Day!
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/NMaCZGeo3Te6ZTANy6SZhIAL_cRSFWinshtxaIDhhRA=/KNiOoqRVEn2OrHelutW3Tg2OMR4Tv8D4GaVTxdPVHK0=)
---
**[You can support the amazing moms in Congress fighting to lift women up by chipping in now >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/NMaCZGeo3Te6ZTANy6SZhIAL_cRSFWinshtxaIDhhRA=/mahuoqLHKidWmBhpdcq5q6eA6RkhhxW_CbcuER4xRww=?refcode=X_050822_MothersDay)**
Thank you!
-- _Katie_

* * *
In 2018, Katie Hill beat the odds and flipped CA-25 blue for the first time in over two decades. Her message of systemic change resonated with voters, and though she's no longer in Congress, she's still fighting to make a difference. **After stepping down from her seat, Katie founded HER Time to help elect candidates like her: women who are overlooked and underestimated.** **You can help HER Time **[**support Democratic women up and down the ballot by donating now**](https://act.myngp.com/el/NMaCZGeo3Te6ZTANy6SZhIAL_cRSFWinshtxaIDhhRA=/Z4wTHGJorhEvAyUaXU8HRKfOCjGbYG4UzhXhIkCvn7Q=?refcode=footer)**, and **[**learn more about our mission here**](https://act.myngp.com/el/NMaCZGeo3Te6ZTANy6SZhIAL_cRSFWinshtxaIDhhRA=/9eXvouqoUYGo0TV-ksX4a5CRvx6sZoGaTEOzljkjQSU=)**.** | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

name: Matt Putorti
subject: Happy Mother’s Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Putorti for Congress
body:
My own mother models a life that has inspired this Congressional run.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45074128/344343119/-1336798533?refcode=BLU-PUT-20220508-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTEwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTU1ZTA1Ni1lZmNlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jlA9n8h1GUYcglx3_1byzyJKgntvEzFxgQA2yy8kVHA=)
---
| Happy Mother’s Day!

Today, we celebrate the impact and influence of our mothers – biological or chosen, those with us and those who no longer are.

My own mother models a life that has inspired this Congressional run. She is compassionate, selfless, hardworking, and welcoming. She cares deeply about her community.

I could tell you many stories about her and her acts of service, but one that really encapsulates her essence is how she founded an organization that reimburses teachers for out-of-pocket expenses they incur when they see students in need.

Teachers are often best equipped to notice if a student needs new sneakers or snow pants or school supplies. And so often, teachers would spend their own money. My mother wanted to make sure students were getting what they needed, and she didn’t want our teachers to have to bear that burden.

Even though she no longer has her own kids in the school, she saw a need and sprang into action. I don’t even know if most people know that she oversees this organization. She wants it that way. She just wants to quietly help her community.

I am very grateful for all she’s taught me, and I am committed to continuing her service to our communities by representing us in Congress next year.

Please join me in celebrating mother's today!

Matt

clean_body: My own mother models a life that has inspired this Congressional run. | = | Happy Mother’s Day! Today, we celebrate the impact and influence of our mothers – biological or chosen, those with us and those who no longer are. My own mother models a life that has inspired this Congressional run. She is compassionate, selfless, hardworking, and welcoming. She cares deeply about her community. I could tell you many stories about her and her acts of service, but one that really encapsulates her essence is how she founded an organization that reimburses teachers for out-of-pocket expenses they incur when they see students in need. Teachers are often best equipped to notice if a student needs new sneakers or snow pants or school supplies. And so often, teachers would spend their own money. My mother wanted to make sure students were getting what they needed, and she didn’t want our teachers to have to bear that burden. Even though she no longer has her own kids in the school, she saw a need and sprang into action. I don’t even know if most people know that she oversees this organization. She wants it that way. She just wants to quietly help her community. I am very grateful for all she’s taught me, and I am committed to continuing her service to our communities by representing us in Congress next year. Please join me in celebrating mother's today! | | In honor of Mother’s Day, I want to tell you about my mom. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45074252/344344627/1092196856?refcode=20220508_em_fr_b1_greg_30_v2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzY1ZmU1MC1mMGNlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=StpyyB8HwvUygCaawUWu_DOuGSpKjqN833fa4615kgk=) _Lee Hamill, Greg's mom_
---
My mom inspires me every day to fight for those who often struggle the most.
She taught special education in public schools for years, where she fought to make sure each student had a chance to succeed.

She believed in her core that every young person had God-given talents -- and that it was up to the adults to identify and lift up those talents.

Her students were being forced into one-size-fits-all testing that wasn’t serving them at all.

So she decided to take a bold step and turned her entire classroom into a cafe where her students would learn skills that would benefit them for the rest of their lives.

Throughout my career in education and public service, I’ve always kept my mom’s determination to take on tough odds and make a difference for families struggling to get by.
**_[But I’ve watched Republican Congressman Chabot fight against us every step of the way. We need a voice in Washington who will fight to increase funding for public schools -- not fight to stop the funds we needed to reopen schools safely. I need 850 supporters to chip in before midnight to help me fully fund my campaign and defeat Steve Chabot. We’re thrilled to report that we’ve already raised more than $1.5 million overall and that’s without accepting a dime from corporate PACs. Our average donation is $38 – a testament to the grassroots power fueling our campaign. Thank you. But that’s not all: **We have nearly twice the amount of cash on hand as Cawthorn.** This is because of you and all the ways you have stepped up with us. We’re investing your grassroots donations directly into reaching voters across Western North Carolina. Meanwhile, Cawthorn has blown through thousands of dollars in campaign donations on lavish trips to Florida, extravagant food bills, and even a shopping trip at Vineyard Vines. In contrast, we are using our resources to build an organizing program that is reaching every corner of our district. Western NC deserves real leadership, and Jasmine is the candidate who’s going to bring true representation of our values to Congress. Grassroots momentum is on our side, and that’s why it’s critical we don’t slow down now. clean_body: | = | | Peter – I have some exciting news about our race to defeat insurrectionist Republican Madison Cawthorn. We’re thrilled to report that we’ve already raised more than $1.5 million overall and that’s without accepting a dime from corporate PACs. Our average donation is $38 – a testament to the grassroots power fueling our campaign. Thank you. But that’s not all: We have nearly twice the amount of cash on hand as Cawthorn. This is because of you and all the ways you have stepped up with us. We’re investing your grassroots donations directly into reaching voters across Western North Carolina. Meanwhile, Cawthorn has blown through thousands of dollars in campaign donations on lavish trips to Florida, extravagant food bills, and even a shopping trip at Vineyard Vines. In contrast, we are using our resources to build an organizing program that is reaching every corner of our district. Western NC deserves real leadership, and Jasmine is the candidate who’s going to bring true representation of our values to Congress. Grassroots momentum is on our side, and that’s why it’s critical we don’t slow down now. = If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = We’re so proud of this grassroots team for stepping up when needed. – Luke Luke Tonat Campaign Manager Jasmine for Congress | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. Truly, my race could decide whether Democrats keep the House -- and we can win. But Bacon is still outraising me by hundreds of thousands of dollars -- and he’ll wipe me out if I can’t pick up the pace before my End of Week Deadline at midnight. Can you rush in $15 in the next 11 hours to close my fundraising gap? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45074420/344344887/1129282168?refcode=20220508_em_fr_b1_tony_30&amount=15&amounts=25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjM0MDA1Ny1mMGNlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bOOOcZGIp3HgU0muAP1PHa-zwpCSYzziHRP9XUKcC2Q=) Everything just changed. \-- The very first poll of this election showed me one point ahead of Don Bacon. \-- I earned the support of the _Omaha World-Herald_. **[\-- And now, Politico just released a projection saying I’m the only one that can beat Bacon.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45074421/344344888/1129282168?refcode=20220508_em_fr_b1_tony_30&amount=15&amounts=25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjM0MDA1Ny1mMGNlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bOOOcZGIp3HgU0muAP1PHa-zwpCSYzziHRP9XUKcC2Q=)** I’ll be blunt: If I win, Democrats will hold the House. Tony Vargas is a State Senator, public school teacher, and Dad running to represent Nebraska’s Second Congressional District and unseat Republican Don Bacon.

This fight is personal. The American Dream made Tony’s story possible. He refuses to sit on the sidelines while others struggle to achieve the same dream.

This fight is also high stakes. Joe Biden won the presidency because of Nebraska. Now, Tony’s fighting to finish what he started and flip this district blue.

Tony is proud to be endorsed by 314 Action Fund, BOLD Democrats, and Latino Victory Fund.

Email is the best way for Tony to keep his supporters up-to-date with happenings from the campaign trail. name: Christy Smith
subject: I hope you'll let me share this story about my mom
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress Christy Smith for Congress
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45074439/344344904/-1614289773?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDY1ZmU1MC1mMGNlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pYUCiq9BLYRKiL5q-vXy4Lr6CnyzdLE3Tscdy_Z6LfE=&emci=5c37e542-5dcd-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=ed65fe50-f0ce-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=11385749)

Hi Peter,

Happy Mothers Day! To all mothers, daughters, aspiring mothers, and people with complicated, traumatic, or nonexistent relationships with mothers and motherhood — _I see you._

The current news cycle and leaked SCOTUS opinions adds more weight to an already trying day for many.

But, today, in light of the barbaric Supreme Court draft opinion that overrules _Roe v. Wade_ , I want to tell you a little bit about my own mother, Gail Fisher. She is the reason I'm here today, in fire and fury, **fighting for a better future for my daughters and the people of this district.** And if you'll let me, I want to tell you a little bit about her.

My mom didn't have an easy life. Adopted by distant cousins when she was 7, she was raised in a very conservative home, where she was taught that all she could ever be was a good wife. She married young and did her best to be the best wife and mother she could be, even though her life-long dream was to be a nurse.

All of her best intentions couldn't prevent her from being a victim of domestic violence. Knowing she needed a way out and a way to support 3 kids on her own, she went back to school to pursue her nursing degree, while living with the abuse. She graduated nursing school with honors and as the president of her class and finally left her marriage to give her children a better life and more opportunity.

As a nurse, she was a tireless advocate for the people in her care — **and she taught me that dedicating yourself to serving others is the best way to leave a mark on this world.** I wouldn't be here today if it weren't for the deep sacrifices she made, for her unwavering kindness, and the tremendous courage she exemplified throughout my life.

In 2015, my mom passed away from untreated Type 2 diabetes. Despite working in the healthcare industry for the better part of her adult life, she had little savings because she raised 3 kids on her own. We found out in her final days that she rationed or skipped insulin rather than ask her children for help. Affordable insulin could have saved her life.

This is a trying time for our country. So many of our institutions have failed working people — especially mothers, including my own. But I'd be letting her down if I let the challenges we face stand in the way of working to make it better. She never gave up, and neither will I.

So, today, on Mother's Day, and in honor of Gail Fisher, I make this commitment to you: **I will never stop fighting for a more just, equitable, and compassionate future for _all,_ especially for women, trans-women, LGBTQ+ individuals, for mothers, and for every person struggling to make ends meet in this country. **

In loving kindness,

Christy [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45074440/344344936/1076724892?refcode=em22_220508_MothersDay_FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDY1ZmU1MC1mMGNlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pYUCiq9BLYRKiL5q-vXy4Lr6CnyzdLE3Tscdy_Z6LfE=) [DONATE MONTHLY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45074441/344344939/1076724892?refcode=em22_220508_MothersDay_FR&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDY1ZmU1MC1mMGNlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pYUCiq9BLYRKiL5q-vXy4Lr6CnyzdLE3Tscdy_Z6LfE=)

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: My mother
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
A story about my mother’s courage — and a call for what we need to do to actually support mothers in this country. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45074401/344344858/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ4Z_MOT_E_20220508_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWU2ZDEzNy1mMGNlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lw8SyKHlUKFofh5cWrrCN-Dcx1I_R1-2nFrA3SUi-AA=&emci=94e6d137-f0ce-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=99e6d137-f0ce-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=9027908)
---
I hope you’re having a good Mother’s Day, and if this holiday hits you hard, my heart goes out to you. I’m thinking about my mother today. Specifically, I’m thinking about a time when she dug deep to take care of our family. After my daddy had a heart attack, he couldn’t work for a while. Bills piled up. We lost our family station wagon. It looked like the house would be next to go. At night, I’d overhear my parents talk, and that's when I learned words like “mortgage” and “foreclosure.” One day, I walked into my parents’ bedroom. My mother’s face was red and puffy. A dress was laid out over the bedspread — the dress that only came out for weddings, graduations, and funerals. "We are not going to lose this house,” she kept saying. “We are not going to lose this house.” She’d never worked outside the home. She was terrified. But she knew what she had to do. She put on that dress, she walked down the street to Sears, and she got a minimum wage job that saved our house and saved our family. **This Mother’s Day, I’m remembering her courage. I’m thinking about all the mamas fighting for their families. And I’m thinking about all the ways the deck is stacked against them:** Today, a minimum wage job won’t keep a mama and her baby out of poverty. That is wrong, and that is why I am fighting to raise the minimum wage and put more power in the hands of working moms and working people everywhere — which includes strengthening unions. Most women who get abortions are already mothers. Many are working multiple jobs that don’t pay enough to support their children. Abortion bans make it even harder for those families to make ends meet. That is why I am madder than hell that our reproductive rights — and freedom to decide when and if we raise a family — are being attacked right now, and why I’m fighting for reproductive justice for all. Without quality, affordable child care, mothers have been shoved out of the workforce in this pandemic. They will feel the consequences — in lost earnings, in lower Social Security benefits — for the rest of their lives. That is why I am fighting for universal child care in our country. I’m going to keep up those fights, and more, like paid family leave, to honor my mother and mothers everywhere. And, look: I’m sure that social media right now is chock-full of Republican politicians waxing poetic about how much they love mothers. But I don’t want to see any tributes from them today unless they’re actually going to do something — anything — to improve the lives of mothers tomorrow. **Thank you for being a part of our grassroots movement to make real change — to put our government on the side of mothers and families.** Happy Mother’s Day, Elizabeth | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45074402/344344860/-491974535?refcode=EMZ4Z_MOT_E_20220508_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWU2ZDEzNy1mMGNlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lw8SyKHlUKFofh5cWrrCN-Dcx1I_R1-2nFrA3SUi-AA=)
---

They will feel the consequences — in lost earnings, in lower Social Security benefits — for the rest of their lives. That is why I am fighting for universal child care in our country. I’m going to keep up those fights, and more, like paid family leave, to honor my mother and mothers everywhere. And, look: I’m sure that social media right now is chock-full of Republican politicians waxing poetic about how much they love mothers. But I don’t want to see any tributes from them today unless they’re actually going to do something — anything — to improve the lives of mothers tomorrow. Thank you for being a part of our grassroots movement to make real change — to put our government on the side of mothers and families. Happy Mother’s Day, Elizabeth | = | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren Democrats All content © 2022 Warren Democrats, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

name: Rushern Baker
subject: the mother of my children
body:
http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2 [http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]

Friend,
Mother’s day feels very different this year. It is our first without our beloved Cis and her absence is felt deeply. While I can’t help but feel sadness, I also feel proud. I know that what we are doing with this campaign is exactly what she lived for. She was an advocate to her core and she was never afraid to stand up to injustice.
While she may no longer grace us on this earth, her presence will remain an everlasting light in our movement. I will never give up, and I will never back down. It’s what Cis would have wanted.[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93538/images/IMG_6582.JPG]
May every mother be celebrated today and every other day. Happy Mother’s Day!
Thank you,

Peter,
For me today is bittersweet. While my mother is no longer with us, the impact she had on my life will be everlasting. She showed me what it’s like to be both strong and independent, yet nurturing and empathetic. She will always remain a guiding force in my life, and I know she is with me on the campaign trail.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wdfcemail?refcode=5/8fr [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wdfcemail?refcode=5/8fr] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wdfcemail?refcode=5/8fr [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wdfcemail?refcode=5/8fr]
I decided to run for Congress because I want to continue to help people – and I believe that’s why she became an ER nurse. If I’m elected to Congress, I promise to bring the same fierce advocacy that Mom brought to everything she did. It’s time for northwest Georgians to feel like our voices are being heard.
If you’d like to support my campaign, please consider making a contribution today. And to all the magnificent mammas out there, Happy Mother’s Day! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wdfcemail?refcode=5/8fr]

subject: We're so proud of the work she's doing
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANN ROE FOR CONGRESS Ann Roe for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45075091/344348211/-766995749?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDE2NWJhZi1mM2NlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XHoPYuiqSZZ-seUOccV1j7UAMLS70JknLqb0xiMM2ZQ=&emci=08fe4d78-b1cc-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=f0165baf-f3ce-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=15639879)

Hi team,

It’s Catherine and Charley Roe here!

Our mom, Ann, has been so busy on the campaign trail, we are not even sure she remembers what today is! So we are going to surprise her with a card from all of us.

Words simply can’t do justice when it comes to explaining how great our mom is. She is the light of our family and we are so proud of all that she’s accomplished these last few months on this journey of running for office.

**[Her work and drive inspires us so much and we want her to know how much she is appreciated. So, can you please join us in wishing her a Happy Mother’s Day by signing her Mother’s Day card?>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45075092/344348212/683974148?sourcecode=em22_220508_mothersday&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDE2NWJhZi1mM2NlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XHoPYuiqSZZ-seUOccV1j7UAMLS70JknLqb0xiMM2ZQ=&emci=08fe4d78-b1cc-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=f0165baf-f3ce-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=15639879)**
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45075093/344348213/683974148?sourcecode=em22_220508_mothersday&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDE2NWJhZi1mM2NlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XHoPYuiqSZZ-seUOccV1j7UAMLS70JknLqb0xiMM2ZQ=&emci=08fe4d78-b1cc-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=f0165baf-f3ce-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=15639879)
---
[SIGN THE CARD](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45075094/344348214/683974148?sourcecode=em22_220508_mothersday&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDE2NWJhZi1mM2NlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XHoPYuiqSZZ-seUOccV1j7UAMLS70JknLqb0xiMM2ZQ=&emci=08fe4d78-b1cc-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=f0165baf-f3ce-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=15639879)
We've known our mom our whole lives, and trust us when we say: _nothing_ gets past her. She's kind and caring, but when she says she's no-nonsense, **she means it.** That's exactly what's going to make her such a great member of Congress. She is going to fight tooth and nail to get things done for Wisconsin, and America.

We can’t wait to celebrate her win as a family, and with all of you.

name: Ron Johnson
subject: DECISION MADE ✅
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc
body:
| |
---
| | | Peter,

This is a longer email than usual but for the past months, I have become the #1 target of the Left, the liberal biased media, and Big Tech giants like Facebook, Twitter, and YouTube.

I have been smeared again and again by media companies like The New York Times, Washington Post, and the Milwaukee Journal Sentinel where they distort my comments, twist them through a liberal prism, and omit most of what I actually say.

I have been silenced, censored, and suspended by the social media oligarchs because I tell the truth, and oftentimes, it is the truth the liberal mainstream media does not want to hear. It counters their narrative, and they refuse to allow it. So they silence free speech.

Yet, despite all of this unconstitutional collusion between these far-Left parties working for political gain at the expense of the American people, I will not give up. They will not deter me.
And that is why I decided to run for re-election.

I am running for a third term for the simple reason that I believe I am the best person for the job. I believe that I am the best candidate to address the national debt, work to lower inflation, secure the border, and fight for America First policies. I believe I am the best candidate to put an end to the Biden administration's constant record of misinformation and their continued lack of transparency with Congress, the press, and you, Peter. I believe I am the best candidate for Wisconsin because I tell the truth and speak for the minority, even when the majority is doing everything they can to silence me.

Now that I have announced, the Left will seize every opportunity to destroy me politically. They will continue to write manipulative hit pieces and orchestrate smear campaigns across all mediums. They will attack and distort my record of success, my record of searching for the truth, and my record of fighting for the people of Wisconsin in any way they can. The Democrats even placed a $2M ad buy just moments after I announced my campaign for re-election.

And that's why I need your help.

_**[Any help you can provide will make an enormous difference and will be greatly appreciated. $5, $10, $25, or even $35 will help me respond to these hit pieces and smear campaigns. It will take all of us working together to defeat the Left and their dishonest tactics.

Can I count on you to chip in? We need to start working right now.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60337375:JRluXWoNJ:m:1:3317145305:436A45C6E2937CBCC48FB44C564A2537:r "Any help you can provide will make
an enormous difference and will be greatly appreciated. $5, $10, $25, or even $35 will help me respond to these hit pieces and smear campaigns. It
will take all of us working together to defeat the Left and their dishonest tactics.Can I count on you to chip in? We need to start working right
now.")**_

Ron Johnson
---
| | | [Fight for Freedom](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60337375:JRluXWoNJ:m:1:3317145305:436A45C6E2937CBCC48FB44C564A2537:r "Fight for
Freedom")

| |

---
| Peter, It's Ron Johnson.

I have just announced my campaign for re-election to the U.S. Senate.

I never could have imagined our country would be where it is today. From out of control spending to reckless liberal mandates, America is on the precipice of disaster.

This will not be an easy win but I am ready to fight to **SAVE AMERICA** from the Democrats.

**[Can I count on you to join me?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60337375:JRluXWoNJ:m:1:3317145305:436A45C6E2937CBCC48FB44C564A2537:r "Please click here to donate now")**

name: Adam Hattersley
subject: Today is a special day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Adam Hattersley, Democrat, for Chief Financial Officer
body:
Happy Mother's Day!
https://www.adamforflorida.com/ [https://www.adamforflorida.com/]
Peter,
Today is Mother’s Day, and I’m so lucky to be able to spend the day with my beautiful and strong mom, Roz.
I owe so much to her — my mom’s guidance, care, and wisdom made me who I am today.
I hope everyone can take some time today to thank the moms, caretakers, and maternal role models in their lives!
https://www.adamforflorida.com/ [https://www.adamforflorida.com/]
Whether you are celebrating motherhood or you are the one being celebrated today, I want to wish everyone a very Happy Mother’s Day!
— Adam Hattersley

701 S. Howard Avenue #106-823
Tampa, FL 33606

body:
2022 Democratic Focus Group
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45075353/344349424/268452084?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk663-su-nd&refcode=jtk663-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTk4MjUzNy1mNWNlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qXSSm2yyL8_wKEKJz2FbSOMrPiiXQw6-NLfT8CShZo8=&emci=8c7f43f4-62cd-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=59982537-f5ce-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=6085109)
---
Friend,
Now that we've officially made the ballot, it's more important than ever that we build a campaign strategy that can defeat GOP extremism and finally flip Arizona blue. We know exactly what will happen if we don't: **Arizona Republicans have made our state ground zero for their most dangerous ideas, and losing this race would give them a mandate to _expand_ their extremism.**
We _can_ win this race, flip Arizona blue and finally end the era of failed GOP leadership from extremists like our Trump-backed opponent Kari Lake (R). Arizona delivered Joe Biden the presidency and helped flip the Senate blue – but we _still_ have a Republican governor. This is the year to change that, but we need your help.
**My team and I put together an exclusive digital focus group – and you’ve been handpicked to participate, friend. Your input today can change the future of Arizona, so please, review your record and share your thoughts before the midnight deadline:**
**2022 DEMOCRATIC FOCUS GROUP**
SUPPORTER TIER: **TOP SUPPORTER**
SURVEY STATUS: **NOT STARTED**
REQUESTED ACTION: **[START NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45075354/344349425/268452084?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk663-su-nd&refcode=jtk663-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTk4MjUzNy1mNWNlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qXSSm2yyL8_wKEKJz2FbSOMrPiiXQw6-NLfT8CShZo8=&emci=8c7f43f4-62cd-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=59982537-f5ce-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=6085109)**
DEADLINE: **11:59 P.M.**
| | [START YOUR FOCUS GROUP](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45075355/344349426/268452084?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk663-su-nd&refcode=jtk663-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTk4MjUzNy1mNWNlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qXSSm2yyL8_wKEKJz2FbSOMrPiiXQw6-NLfT8CShZo8=&emci=8c7f43f4-62cd-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=59982537-f5ce-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=6085109)
---
Thanks for your input – it means a lot to me.

– Marco Lopez
* * *
**Please read on for a personal message from Democrat Marco Lopez:**
Friend, I’m so grateful you’re part of our people-powered movement to flip Arizona blue. But I have to be honest: I’m counting on your help now more than ever. I’m a proud Democrat, former border city mayor and Obama administration alum – and I’m running for governor to build a state that works for all our people. subject: Happy Mother's Day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MCKAYLA 2022 AND PROUDLY POWERED BY THE PEOPLE
body:
| | | Team, From my family to yours, I want to wish you a very happy Mother’s Day. Now more than ever, it’s time to take a moment to appreciate the moms in our lives. But we understand that today can be hard for some folks – and we’re thinking of you today. **I’d love to tell you a little bit about my mom.** My mom has always been a huge source of inspiration for me. Things weren’t always easy for her: I never got the chance to know my father because he was killed while she was still pregnant with me. But despite this, she showed incredible dedication and determination to be the best mom she could be. She leaned on my aunts to help raise me and my siblings, because she knew it would take a village. Now that I’m raising my two children as a working mom, I’m inspired by her to be the best mother that I can. **As we celebrate, let’s also take today to fight to better the lives of mothers across the country through concrete policy:**
* Let’s protect reproductive freedom so that becoming a mother is always a **choice**.

* Let’s pass federal paid parental leave so people aren’t forced back to work too soon.

* Let’s enact universal healthcare so that new mothers don’t receive a huge bill in the mail after giving birth.

* Let’s reinstate the expanded Child Tax Credit to help lift families out of poverty.

Let’s fight for change this Mother’s Day, Mckayla | [ DONATE

name: John Fetterman
subject: I’m hearing a lot of moaning and groaning
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
The midterm clock is counting.
#
Derek,
November 8, 2022 is literally just **six months** away. 🚨
The midterm clock is counting down fast.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220508-1?refcode=em20220508-5710&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=5710_434096_rcXSEY&akid=5710%2E434096%2ErcXSEY)
What worries me is this overwhelming feeling that the Democratic Party could be sleepwalking into a midterm slaughter. I don’t know about you, but I’m hearing a lot of moaning and groaning about how Dems are *definitely* going to lose.
I mean... are we giving up here?!
Heck no. I’m not going to sit around whining while we lose winnable races.
Not when abortion rights are on the line. Not when we’re just a couple Senate votes away from passing the rest of the Biden agenda. Not when Republicans are threatening to undo our democracy.
[**Are you with me, Derek? If so, can I beg you to rush a $5 contribution today to help us flip PA blue and save the midterms? With just six months left, we have to give this everything we’ve got.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220508-1?refcode=em20220508-5710&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=5710_434096_rcXSEY&akid=5710%2E434096%2ErcXSEY)
**[Donate Now »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220508-1?amount=5&refcode=em20220508-5710&refcode2=5710_434096_rcXSEY&akid=5710%2E434096%2ErcXSEY)**
Yeah there’s some shitty polls out there for Democrats. But you know what? We have six months to turn this around.
Voters support our policies. They don’t want tax cuts for the rich, less health care, or ending a person’s right to choose. They just want to know we’re fighting as hard as possible for each and every one of them.
**We can win the midterms — especially here in Pennsylvania — if we get our message out loud and proud.** But that’s going to take a ton of resources... and we can’t let self-funding Republicans like Dr. Oz and David McCormick drown us out on the airwaves with tens of millions of dollars of misleading ads.
[**So please, if you, like me, are not ready to give up on the midterms, make a donation to help us flip PA blue and expand our majority in the U.S. Senate.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220508-1?refcode=em20220508-5710&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=5710_434096_rcXSEY&akid=5710%2E434096%2ErcXSEY)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220508-1?amount=5&refcode=em20220508-5710&refcode2=5710_434096_rcXSEY&akid=5710%2E434096%2ErcXSEY)**
I promise this election isn’t a foregone conclusion. It is what _we_ make it.
If Democrats like you and me work hard, get our message out, donate, volunteer, and vote... we WILL win.
Let’s commit to giving these next six months everything we’ve got.
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220508-5710-footer&t=1&refcode2=5710_434096_rcXSEY&akid=5710%2E434096%2ErcXSEY)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

clean_body: The midterm clock is counting. Derek, November 8, 2022 is literally just six months away. 🚨 The midterm clock is counting down fast. What worries me is this overwhelming feeling that the Democratic Party could be sleepwalking into a midterm slaughter. I don’t know about you, but I’m hearing a lot of moaning and groaning about how Dems are definitely going to lose. I mean... are we giving up here?! Heck no. I’m not going to sit around whining while we lose winnable races. Not when abortion rights are on the line. Not when we’re just a couple Senate votes away from passing the rest of the Biden agenda. Not when Republicans are threatening to undo our democracy. Yeah there’s some shitty polls out there for Democrats. But you know what? We have six months to turn this around. Voters support our policies. They don’t want tax cuts for the rich, less health care, or ending a person’s right to choose. They just want to know we’re fighting as hard as possible for each and every one of them. We can win the midterms — especially here in Pennsylvania — if we get our message out loud and proud. But that’s going to take a ton of resources... and we can’t let self-funding Republicans like Dr. Oz and David McCormick drown us out on the airwaves with tens of millions of dollars of misleading ads. I promise this election isn’t a foregone conclusion. It is what we make it. If Democrats like you and me work hard, get our message out, donate, volunteer, and vote... we WILL win. Let’s commit to giving these next six months everything we’ve got. John John Fetterman Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: The most important lesson from my mom
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elissa Slotkin for Congress
body:
Elissa Slotkin for Congresssecure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq22022?refcode=email20220508&amount=28 [secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq22022?refcode=email20220508&amount=28]
Friend,
I wanted to send you a quick note this Mother’s Day with the most important lessons I learned from my mom. You may have heard me share this one before, but it’s such a classic lesson that I think of it every year:
You don’t ask, you don’t get.
I’ve been thinking about my mom a lot lately as we process the news of a draft Supreme Court opinion that would overturn Roe v. Wade. It’s hard to imagine how upset she’d be — I know she is rolling in her grave thinking about the ways that we’re turning back the clock on women’s freedom to make choices about their lives.
My mom was lively, spirited, and ahead of her time in so many ways. She taught me to be independent, assertive, and to seek out opportunities to challenge myself, to push myself, and to grow.
That advice has carried me through my career, my personal life, and everything in between. I can remember very specific instances when this mattered: In 2005, I was working as the intelligence briefer to the ambassador in Iraq 2005. I remember the day he told me he would soon be nominated to be the first Director of National Intelligence. I asked if I could work for him. His response? “We leave for DC on Monday.”
It was a tough thing to ask – my heart was racing the entire time – but I couldn’t ignore my mom’s voice in my head. It’s what she would have wanted me to do. That opportunity led to many others. So that one question, and a lot of hard work, led me to where I am today.
I’m now in a position where young people, just beginning their careers, ask me for my advice. My answer is simple: you don’t ask, you don’t get.
Forever grateful,
Elissa

Elissa Slotkin is fighting for Michigan's working families, but she's already one of Republicans' top targets for 2022. Consider contributing today to help us defend her seat.

You may have heard me share this one before, but it’s such a classic lesson that I think of it every year: You don’t ask, you don’t get. I’ve been thinking about my mom a lot lately as we process the news of a draft Supreme Court opinion that would overturn Roe v. Wade. It’s hard to imagine how upset she’d be — I know she is rolling in her grave thinking about the ways that we’re turning back the clock on women’s freedom to make choices about their lives. My mom was lively, spirited, and ahead of her time in so many ways. She taught me to be independent, assertive, and to seek out opportunities to challenge myself, to push myself, and to grow. That advice has carried me through my career, my personal life, and everything in between. I can remember very specific instances when this mattered: In 2005, I was working as the intelligence briefer to the ambassador in Iraq 2005. I remember the day he told me he would soon be nominated to be the first Director of National Intelligence. I asked if I could work for him. His response? “We leave for DC on Monday.” It was a tough thing to ask – my heart was racing the entire time – but I couldn’t ignore my mom’s voice in my head. It’s what she would have wanted me to do. That opportunity led to many others. So that one question, and a lot of hard work, led me to where I am today. I’m now in a position where young people, just beginning their careers, ask me for my advice. My answer is simple: you don’t ask, you don’t get. Forever grateful, Elissa [#] About Elissa Elissa Slotkin is fighting for Michigan's working families, but she's already one of Republicans' top targets for 2022. Consider contributing today to help us defend her seat. CONTRIBUTE [] Contact Elissa P.O. [](http://links.yeslivegaforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=876a4969a9724ab8bc814d84bfee8268&_m=be3594eef67f401e8abc38658371e6e2&_e=i5ZGZfXTmgF443P_JIAC3tfntKz2dnlQMb20TsRzp5Zt6OxZMZSLc0uHKmVh9XmZ-8pVYIoc6ljSyZDmKS9VrvT17jfK0KhqyRVdjmZ9BsVd1SYUe2Du3ojenTpFFHbZ6FlGNSMz-mn1Ixie7HapHqWckqM4Ljc3hfEAaG6Wmq0chPTzMQnO-mblW2_r9YzGPNAt0nir5YOw_PK1103ac_Fop22mEKUkvlVBBewXtDB2hukNn5K8bsAsewHlKNC_T5bVezi0fvXCn3ujlZKO4vU6k4zs2KVYhjNatczxSr7TRSn49roINyUlqngpRenTxeZjxSF8jij0t0dogJSUPuZNKRiGY_qCpieTDEPulIZ5175hONsXw8E1XPtPhOvnLjh76Sl38haB1BdPV-md9XcOrk6v5cXmzcUPl8GMiE_txw9_8cw4kwtZ7hFy9JFwzsaANOm3YZHoYn1qKQ9fZWrCzmkuSF3WpLGlICU4P5NPN4betyQmphFb4sf0rdl_)
To all of the mothers in Virginia and beyond - _**thank you for all that you do for your family.**_

It’s mothers like you that raise their children to be great members of our communities. A mother’s love enriches the lives of our children and our Commonwealth and our country.

**If you have a chance today, thank a mother for their hard work raising the next generation.**

Happy Mother’s Day.

body:
Our family is celebrating Deb today.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45076115/344353012/-600268740?refcode=ea.18fd36b4-f8ce-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.18fd36b4-f8ce-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOGZkMzZiNC1mOGNlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M7I2YnvlQwy-cvFLRLEgihsu_FTd9i_Q4YFrgWYCvIk=&emci=50cd5630-70cd-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=18fd36b4-f8ce-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=5944225) Peter,

I feel lucky to be married to Deb for so many reasons.

She is driven, compassionate, and absolutely brilliant. She’s a fearless leader who is committed to changing this world for the better.

Deb empowers our children to be their best selves and serve the world in their own ways.

During periods when my career in the military took me abroad, Deb was functionally a single parent back at home. We traded off when Deb needed to leave home for work herself.

Even when we’re apart, Deb is committed to keeping us all connected and making sure our children know how much we love them. A military family motto is “Home is where we are together.” And that can mean a phone call or letter - because home is a feeling, too.

**[Our family is celebrating Mother’s Day today for Deb, and the campaign has put together a card for her, too. As the only mother in this race, Deb will fight for families. clean_body: Our family is celebrating Deb today. | Peter, I feel lucky to be married to Deb for so many reasons. She is driven, compassionate, and absolutely brilliant. She’s a fearless leader who is committed to changing this world for the better. Deb empowers our children to be their best selves and serve the world in their own ways. During periods when my career in the military took me abroad, Deb was functionally a single parent back at home. We traded off when Deb needed to leave home for work herself. Even when we’re apart, Deb is committed to keeping us all connected and making sure our children know how much we love them. A military family motto is “Home is where we are together.” And that can mean a phone call or letter - because home is a feeling, too. | ** I hope you’re doing well, and thanks so much. Kevin | Deb McGrath is an Army Veteran, former CIA officer, and mother of three running for Congress in WI-03. She’s fighting for affordable health care, good-paying jobs, and common prosperity. Deb served our country for over four decades from all over the world. Now she’s being called to serve her hometown and western Wisconsin in Congress. name: Trump News HQ
subject: Standing up for life
body:
I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of h
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zndva4srga1lj477301cbi3kbee86q24ujv9hqg0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbpbaptnmpge8cljmsr78tr6mpi36c76mkqe9c9im3h66pbjclonepbks1qn1dln6v970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3i69j38oljc5jreoj662ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933clh60pj2c3h68oh5u)
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of human life. Our society has been infected by an anti-life ideology, treating its most vulnerable members as disposable objects. Abortion that was once thought of as a last resort in a medical emergency has become the new normal. Medicine tells us that life begins at the moment of conception. It also tells us when an unborn baby develops a heartbeat, brainwaves, and nervous system. Yet, despite all of this, the unborn are not treated as though they are alive or even human. **As a surgeon, I have operated on infants pre-birth. I can assure you that they are very much alive.** [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znv8jjs28dk16udden060sqq4qmskdk76tdhk4q8_rp22sh2s8i66pb2c1j64o72chh2bs)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ Life is a precious gift that has been given to us from our creator. No person is disposable, and every life is precious according to Him. I believe that everyone deserves life, even those who have been denied this right by our society. I believe that together we can make a difference and bring dignity and a voice to the unborn. I also believe that I’m not alone in this belief. I believe that you believe that too. I’ve started working with a group of like-minded individuals who are looking to change our culture. We want to build a society that values life but that takes people like you and I making a commitment. The first step is clearly stating what we believe and what we are willing to do to protect the lives of the unborn. [**Will you join me today and stand up for those who cannot do it for themselves?**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2u4l7hm5h5bcjj8mjeabveqq7uod07c8mi6t9sg_rp22sh2s8i66pb2c1j64o72chh2bs) I’ve created a new pro-life pledge; I’d love your support. Would you read the pledge below to see if you align with our shared goals and are willing to commit to fighting for the lives of the unborn? [https://offers.americancornerstone.org/pro-life-statement/](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8n3ea4e30umgvqd3sceaprjmabbt4somq5denu0_rp22sh2s8i66pb2c1j64o72chh2bs) Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2022 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

body:
Hi, it's Peggy Wood, writing to you today about my daughter, Senator Maggie Hassan.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45076445/344354605/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk909-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYWU5ZTg2My1mOWNlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TkYm9eHuLmpTprt9_Wl85ZxA0pLpKRsW2sBYTxlPvUU=)
Hi there, it's Peggy Wood, writing to you today about my daughter, Senator Maggie Hassan.
When she was growing up, none of us knew that Maggie would make history as the second woman in America to be elected both Governor and United States Senator. But her father and I always encouraged her to make a real difference in the world, so I must admit that I'm not surprised.

Five years ago, I watched proudly from the Senate gallery as Maggie took her oath of office - and I’ve watched proudly every day as she takes on tough fights to make a real difference for our country. Whether it's working to lower prescription drug costs or saving the Affordable Care Act, Maggie's never stopped fighting for what matters most.
**[_I know my daughter. And I know she'd prefer not to be asking you for money, but she really needs your help. Will you please donate $3 right now to defend Maggie's seat and the Senate majority? It'd mean a lot to me if you'd chip in._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45076446/344354606/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&amount=3&refcode=mh-jtk909-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYWU5ZTg2My1mOWNlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TkYm9eHuLmpTprt9_Wl85ZxA0pLpKRsW2sBYTxlPvUU=)**
Thank you for having Maggie’s back.

clean_body: Hi, it's Peggy Wood, writing to you today about my daughter, Senator Maggie Hassan. | | | = Hi there, it's Peggy Wood, writing to you today about my daughter, Senator Maggie Hassan. When she was growing up, none of us knew that Maggie would make history as the second woman in America to be elected both Governor and United States Senator. But her father and I always encouraged her to make a real difference in the world, so I must admit that I'm not surprised. Five years ago, I watched proudly from the Senate gallery as Maggie took her oath of office - and I’ve watched proudly every day as she takes on tough fights to make a real difference for our country. Whether it's working to lower prescription drug costs or saving the Affordable Care Act, Maggie's never stopped fighting for what matters most. = Thank you for having Maggie’s back. Peggy Wood | If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, =. = If you’re reading this from your phone, to automatically sign up for our SMS list. name: Caitlin Johnson, Campaign Manager
subject: Preparing for the future
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/qdoyjYqAgPEjGmWGnzFEtiBrMVZ1fmQTiLk15dePE9g=/iUwfj0-UuC4ipP6qkU9T8Kg7J0gMAriwUZQ_fXtFTHU=)
I wanted to make sure that I took a moment to introduce myself as a new member of Team Stanton.
Greg has spent his time in Congress fighting to make sure Arizona gets the investments it needs. With the Bipartisan Infrastructure Bill, he helped secure CRUCIAL funding that will have a major impact on our state.
**Thanks to his work, Chandler, Mesa, Phoenix, and more will be getting hundreds of thousands of dollars to invest in city projects.**
Some of these projects will have immediate positive effects -- like $500,000 for Tempe to expand homeless solutions. Others will benefit Arizonans long into the future -- like $990,000 to support water conservation in Chandler.
**These are the common-sense investments that Arizona needs to take on big challenges now, and to prepare for a better future.**
_[**Greg is in one of the TOUGHEST races in the country. If he 's going to keep fighting for big wins for Arizona, he needs your help. Will you support our campaign by chipping in now?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/qdoyjYqAgPEjGmWGnzFEtiBrMVZ1fmQTiLk15dePE9g=/Su1ofTzwnrtS0-smTIzlNf_aLhNBi50SVFuk687Y5BM=?refcode=X_050822_Infrastructure)_

name: Matt West
subject: A promise for Mother's Day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Matt West for Congress
body:
| Friend, Happy Mother's Day! I hope you're enjoying today with your loved ones. When I spoke with my mom this morning, I thought about the sacrifices she made for me growing up. I thought about how much I have to give back and to pass on because of her. She taught me to keep my promises. So I promise this: I won’t sell out our families for political gain. In Congress, I will fight for moms. We must pass paid family and medical leave, universal childcare, and public preschool. We must pass Medicare for All. We must reinstate the expanded child tax credit. And we must pass a Green New Deal to ensure our children and grandchildren have a planet to live on. Moms do a lot. They deserve all the help we can give them. I promise to give all I can. Best, Matt West

name: Team Blumenthal
subject: Breaking: the GOP convention is over
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=sFo94XwPJOMCjFSHVu4Xdyq9QUgcW0Mk&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
The Republican convention here in Connecticut just wrapped up - and the right-wing extremism that's taken root in the GOP across the country was on full display. Republicans here and across the country are trying not only to move us backward, but propel a twisted ideology that the vast majority of Americans reject. **They are hellbent on taking back majorities in Congress to put their dangerous agenda into action.**
With the Senate GOP's campaign arm sitting on more than $44 million in cash and Mitch McConnell's super PAC ready to flood the airwaves with misinformation, we must be more prepared than ever to fight off their attacks and defend Connecticut's must-win Senate seat. In a moment like this, we can't take _any_ Democratic seat for granted. [**That 's why we're asking directly: Will you chip in $5 or more now to help defeat Sen. Blumenthal's Republican opponent, keep this seat blue, and protect Democratic Senate control?**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal-email?refcode=jtk1177-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)
We know Mitch McConnell and the GOP will soon pull out every trick in their dirty campaign playbook to try and defeat us. They'll try to paint Sen. Blumenthal as radical. They'll distort and brazenly lie about his record. But with supporters like you fighting alongside us, we'll win. Supporters who know the truth: that Sen. Blumenthal has made it his life's mission to fight for the people of Connecticut and move the needle on issues that will improve life in our state, our country, and our world.
As a member of the Senate Committee on the Judiciary, Sen. Blumenthal leads the charge on common sense gun safety reform to save lives, has worked to uphold the rule of law in the face of vicious attacks from Donald Trump and his allies, and has helped put brilliant, fair-minded judges on the bench - including groundbreaking appointees like Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson. As a member of the Senate Armed Services Committee, Sen. Blumenthal recently traveled to the Ukrainian border with Poland, where he affirmed our solidarity and support with the Ukrainian people. He will _always_ remain committed to protecting our national security and holding bad actors accountable at home and abroad.
And with women's healthcare in peril like never before, you can be sure Sen. Blumenthal will continue to lead the fight to protect and defend the fundamental human rights of American women to make their own personal decisions about their own bodies.
**Now is not the time for inexperience or someone who will vote with McConnell to support the twisted ideology of an increasingly extremist Republican Party. And now is certainly not the time to let our guard down when it comes to protecting Democratic Senate control and driving progress for our nation. Not when two GOP senators are already talking about a nationwide ban on abortion if _Roe v. Wade_ is struck down this summer.**
[**So today, as our opponent will surely rally the national Republican establishment against us, we 're asking for grassroots support from people like you. Please, can you chip in a donation of $5 or whatever you can spare right now? We've set a goal to raise $10,000 by midnight so that we have the resources to fight Republican attacks and defend this Senate seat, and we can't hit this goal without your support.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal-email?refcode=jtk1177-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)
This is where the rubber meets the road. This is where we need all hands on deck to protect this must-win Senate seat - because if we don't get all the support we can, and if Mitch McConnell flips a single seat, he'll be back to calling the shots in Washington. We know this team of committed grassroots supporters won't let that happen!
The Republican message for Connecticut is clear - and they make no bones about it.
"Let's get together and turn America red." *
Think what that will mean for our nation.
We cannot let that happen.
* _Quote from Themis Klarides_
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=X1F0xPDMHJt9cpIq4EtRLyq9QUgcW0Mk&url=http%3A%2F%2Faction.richardblumenthal.com%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2Findex.sjs%3Funsubscribe_page_KEY%3D550%26Email%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)
Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut

[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

# Local leaders discuss rural broadband funding heading to WNC, and I was there to learn how to best help you!
###

To spend funds effectively and efficiently, NC Broadband Division is creating detailed maps, and they need your help to know where the nearly 800 million dollars are!

Take the 5-minute survey to bring these dollars to your area.

The survey can be taken online for users with internet access and by phone for users without service and will be available in both English and Spanish.

Participants can take the survey by phone to report locations without internet service.

Residents without internet service but with phones capable of text messaging can text "internet" to 919-750-0553
Standard text messaging rates will apply.

body:
Happy Mother’s Day! As a proud Mama’s Boy, I wanted to share with you a little bit about my mother, Berdetta Hodge.

| Happy Mother’s Day! As a proud Mama’s Boy, I wanted to share with you a little bit about my mother, Berdetta Hodge.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45077136/344358696/-1304906161?refcode=BLU-HODG-20220508-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDc3NzI1NS0wMmNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GTLeT95qNAinPz98jbq4rPiEHCr_TTkJjrPcdLoBkEU=)
My mother is my biggest inspiration and role model. She raised me and my brother by herself and instilled lifelong morals and values in us. She taught us so much about faith, leadership, and helping others. I’m the person I am today because of her, and I am so grateful for her.

My mom was the first Black woman elected in the City of Tempe, and now I have the opportunity to become the first Black member of Congress from Arizona. She showed me that anything was possible, and I’m running so the next generation can see that anything is possible too. [_**I hope you’ll consider contributing to our movement today so we can do this together.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45077137/344358697/-1304906161?refcode=BLU-HODG-20220508-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDc3NzI1NS0wMmNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GTLeT95qNAinPz98jbq4rPiEHCr_TTkJjrPcdLoBkEU=)

name: Team Kelly
subject: Your first donation is really important to this campaign.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Mark has already faced millions of dollars in attack ads, and we know that this is only the beginning.
#

$3.
That is the donation we are asking you to make today to help re-elect Mark Kelly this November.
Last year, more than 200,000 people contributed to Mark Kelly’s re-election campaign. It’s a number we’re VERY proud of.
But it’s a different race today. If Democrats lose even one Senate seat, we could wake up on November 9th with Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell.
And National Republicans know this, too. That’s why the NRSC spent $1,000,000 in ONE WEEK attacking Mark this early in the race.
So, flipping Arizona — a seat we won by only _2.4 points_ in 2020 — is clearly one of McConnell’s top priorities right now.
Mark has already faced millions of dollars in attack ads, and we know that this is only the beginning. It’s going to take a BIG team to hold this seat. So, we’re asking:
[**Can you please make your first $3 donation to help Mark hold this seat? We have to be ready for whatever comes next.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may22?refcode=em220508-1-15&t=1&refcode2=2778_6688874_6DziHJ&akid=2778%2E6688874%2E6DziHJ)

We know it’s hard to imagine Beto O’Rourke winning in Texas.

**But we must take threats like this seriously and stand with our GOP governors.**

Beto SHATTERED fundraising records in 2018, and came within three points of defeating U.S. Senator Ted Cruz. He built up a national fundraising machine in 2020 during his failed bid to become the Democratic nominee for president. And he hauled in $7.2 MILLION during his first 46 days in this race.

**[Step up today to stand with GOP governors like Greg Abbott to KEEP RED STATES RED! >>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zel1lnba6v4sjvmhr15l1eqt2ur0d8hmb2v72cto_rp22sh2s8i66pb2c1j66ob4cdh2bs)**
* Beto O’Rourke is a radical’s radical, plain and simple.

* He wants to confiscate firearms from law-abiding citizens;

* He wants to tear down the border wall;

* He’s a job-killing Green New Deal fanatic;

* And he’s an avowed enemy of religious freedom!

The left is targeting states like Texas in hopes of turning it into the next California.

**[We cannot let them win and it’s ALL HANDS ON DECK in our fight for GOP victory, in Texas and across our great nation!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z029atkrii4gld8b0fnk06fg7ucr2g9thhstost8_rp22sh2s8i66pb2c1j66ob4cdh2bs)**

clean_body: The race in the Lone Star State between Governor Greg Abbott and radical-left poster boy Beto O’Rourke is heating up! | | | Friend, The race in the Lone Star State between Governor Greg Abbott and radical-left poster boy Beto O’Rourke is heating up! We know it’s hard to imagine Beto O’Rourke winning in Texas. But we must take threats like this seriously and stand with our GOP governors. Beto SHATTERED fundraising records in 2018, and came within three points of defeating U.S. Senator Ted Cruz. He built up a national fundraising machine in 2020 during his failed bid to become the Democratic nominee for president. And he hauled in $7.2 MILLION during his first 46 days in this race. Beto O’Rourke is a radical’s radical, plain and simple. He wants to confiscate firearms from law-abiding citizens; He wants to tear down the border wall; He’s a job-killing Green New Deal fanatic; And he’s an avowed enemy of religious freedom! body:
As of today we are exactly six months away from the midterm elections. | | | [](https://an.primarysinema.com/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ylv71NjtRp9uAvapwZeG5Fwod7vf2Q19deFkSzINQB7pYO7Ed0TOwyvjuedJ39zpHIgPjZTod5LVCLRGJ5EuVnvDHqljinnhSRx27Y-QsvG6M20ZQaQYFyLcafJBZA0q97Z_RAyGGeFoX0NeNRPhDYQqYJOVWDXI_RVqHWSIY9Vhh3kIQ2FTO0-4zbeu0r4fb96aaMUS_K88YN3Fhpl2rsgH-LcYq9WY9jEw8fVgwMl32fl0zoNBwUDLFF9KD0VGPYvrxCvzK4tZjLz-_GtH-FiDtIRhLZjhN8zMr-csHIgqomdjU_3J_EKAEd_K1rz6yfD6nbKowYQRTKmUoCSZwX/3lv/ER6IlJLpTVyIJs7zYP-nkQ/h0/n_FskAaex6JgYlbjOnvdBNtKmzqQ978pFSW3ImNUPMM)
Peter, we only have _six months left_. It might be hard to believe but, as of today, **we are exactly six months away from the midterm elections.** The next six months will decide who controls Congress. The Democratic majority -- and the Biden agenda -- hang in the balance. That’s why, in addition to building a primary challenge against Kyrsten Sinema, we’re working so hard to elect more Democrats to the Senate, and why we’re asking for your help today. **_[One of the Democratic candidates we’re proud to support is Cheri Beasley, a strong advocate for reproductive rights, who is running for the open U.S. Senate seat in North Carolina. Will you split a gift between Primary Sinema and Cheri Beasley for Senate today?](https://an.primarysinema.com/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSAJ__T8WxjUwTlPf1dRopRb8zafPMtqz2FUqC8PJtQb8A-J1Eriz95t3C3_Kld7GhiHKQN0XA0ehMjSzSYQ3MFR4FIatf9e4SUlQEZJrX7onHLY8o92GeX2R7vPQbjKd4qm7FW-9JkitgczNr45SJdLEF6mxe3BAmPLouAscQl9npsblw3MnCevV8ex_QOxDNBe_Om_R42I4b7QKpPSCHUFVnzN1Z-A36Q-Ki7oRog2zhwIgLuc1H6nGDm7mNh8CoQDFAtMd2IUiZCk2nSqTEbdX-2s-YZaJgeYUGHB17gUnALP1HjsX1DKbReCiSECfi/3lv/ER6IlJLpTVyIJs7zYP-nkQ/h1/OuDBdLUcuj5JA6bvnNhEJQwqhmLDJ18Q8hSR3k1MYQ0)_**
**[Contribute $5](https://an.primarysinema.com/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSAJ__T8WxjUwTlPf1dRopRYnMHPYLAxifrpZMErkQpY6QEkSJeF0eGrL7bG9OB7rI1x03vES75HZHDvR-_ZPtYcYlLeK8RrO4X0XW0GkpvuJmZB2w9o0I6TqFDKddXiPXuf9VIG1BRcjk4Ut-KM94MTsIk08kbcCDwWiuFNOuBgQWzzsAnt8n-ugVzz1JB2t_mc0eVuqWq1cqPMb-Sa0erfmtPwxdEVA0MBsu4ddMa1EKWUthMxWYR1KROocryca54xnRCsXMqh-cCIUu5j67Bm-5-ts1H_xE-3iUHI4L_vHiVUQpkNdELoZ-3KeRWOsV/3lv/ER6IlJLpTVyIJs7zYP-nkQ/h2/OQNrPZAD2k-gmwj9lC7CVaDJa3XiH0SQPJkfquXh4NQ)** As we all know, ever since January of 2021, Kyrsten Sinema has stood in the way of Democrats making the progress we promised. She has prevented us from fully delivering on the Biden agenda. And right now, she’s blocking our chances of taking Congressional action to protect the right to choose. **The next six months is our chance to change all of that.** If we can send even just one more Democrat to the Senate, we can render Sinema and her obstructionism _completely irrelevant_. Cheri Beasley could be that one Democrat. As former Chief Justice of North Carolina, Cheri has spent over two decades in service respecting the Constitution and upholding the rule of law. We can trust her to protect our rights in the Senate — unlike Sinema Kyrsten Sinema isn’t on the ballot this year (sadly) but Cheri Beasley is, so we need to give her as much support as we can. **_[With just six months left until Election Day, will you split a gift between us and Cheri Beasley today? You could help us flip this Senate seat from red to blue and resign Kyrsten Sinema to irrelevance for the rest of her time in the Senate.](https://an.primarysinema.com/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSAJ__T8WxjUwTlPf1dRopRb8zafPMtqz2FUqC8PJtQb8k-P8IOHOCJ5R0H2HerNKFUY2OgPJxJOQHGy_TZE80RAxWbZ8_7TOPgwqzgXBogk3ozz1bVs2lO5wHj7nfESywDqDVJgDq-7pfUB3GbFdxw-6LltFUWWQg29wlHiibQCbJYfEReO1YXCSs5tmrIbu1FP1Xk96UmAaQO-rKU2Layto3IAZ0PBZ-IkRFSEmFwzGfB8Fg22sAw91f78GofC82JCJdxHLzMzSnpqL0bymM-MuaZFZL8vVd-GvQ1dWHHb1tTQyVS6lV63Uds1d5T1Ci/3lv/ER6IlJLpTVyIJs7zYP-nkQ/h3/_BVsBL92JaziwwPobbED0ED57jYL2frDQPXAWVZAFLg)_** Thanks, The Primary Sinema Project team

If we can send even just one more Democrat to the Senate, we can render Sinema and her obstructionism completely irrelevant. Cheri Beasley could be that one Democrat. As former Chief Justice of North Carolina, Cheri has spent over two decades in service respecting the Constitution and upholding the rule of law. We can trust her to protect our rights in the Senate — unlike Sinema Kyrsten Sinema isn’t on the ballot this year (sadly) but Cheri Beasley is, so we need to give her as much support as we can. Thanks, The Primary Sinema Project team | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options: PAID FOR BY CHANGE FOR ARIZONA 2024 PAC** | | Sent via . The right to abortion, and bodily autonomy, is under attack at the federal level. We need to come together and fight back.
