| | Team, I’m grateful for my mom for so many reasons — and especially this year, she’s a big part of the reason I’m running for Governor. My mom’s a former social worker and union member, and she’s a woman of faith. She spent her career helping women and children struggling on the margins of society, and raised me and my sisters as a single mom at the same time. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45077362/344359797/5769926?refcode=05_08_22_mothersday_fs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMThhMWFiNi0wNmNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5KRKTtKeoFafeZV2YHlpvGTKXqFvH6tAZdIcp9uI22k=) She knew how to make every penny count. We saw her stretch our grocery budget with powdered milk and soup nights. And even though she struggled to make do without a lot, she always found enough to give at church and to others in need. On days when fighting for families kept her at work past five o’clock, I’d go from school to her office to help where I could. She’d try to make the path a little less rocky for women in need — and take on the same broken systems again and again. She was always willing to go the extra mile for her kids’ futures and for families across our community. It was never easy, but she wasn’t afraid to take on tough challenges if it meant doing the right thing. My mom’s experiences lit a moral fire in me: To take on our broken systems. To stand up for those in need, every day. And to have the courage to take action to solve our biggest problems, even when it’s hard. [**If you believe in this movement we’re building, will you chip in $15 in honor of my mom?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45077363/344359798/5769926?refcode=05_08_22_mothersday_fs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMThhMWFiNi0wNmNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5KRKTtKeoFafeZV2YHlpvGTKXqFvH6tAZdIcp9uI22k=) Thank you, mom. For inspiring me and this campaign. Saludos, Sonia

clean_body: The right to abortion, and bodily autonomy, is under attack at the federal level. We need to come together and fight back. | | | | | Team, I’m grateful for my mom for so many reasons — and especially this year, she’s a big part of the reason I’m running for Governor. My mom’s a former social worker and union member, and she’s a woman of faith. She spent her career helping women and children struggling on the margins of society, and raised me and my sisters as a single mom at the same time. = She knew how to make every penny count. We saw her stretch our grocery budget with powdered milk and soup nights. And even though she struggled to make do without a lot, she always found enough to give at church and to others in need. On days when fighting for families kept her at work past five o’clock, I’d go from school to her office to help where I could. She’d try to make the path a little less rocky for women in need — and take on the same broken systems again and again. She was always willing to go the extra mile for her kids’ futures and for families across our community. It was never easy, but she wasn’t afraid to take on tough challenges if it meant doing the right thing. My mom’s experiences lit a moral fire in me: To take on our broken systems. To stand up for those in need, every day. And to have the courage to take action to solve our biggest problems, even when it’s hard. = Thank you, mom. For inspiring me and this campaign. Saludos, Sonia | | | | | = | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | | ---|---|---|--- | | By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution. This Mother’s Day, while authoritarian Republicans work to end the right to safe abortion, corporate Democrat Henry Cuellar is doing worse than nothing.

As THE ONLY anti-choice Democrat in the House, this pathetic excuse for “representative” voted with Republicans against codifying Roe v. Wade into law.

Despite Henry Cuellar betraying every woman in the United States, Nancy Pelosi still thinks it's a good idea to endorse him over progressive champion Jessica Cisneros. As the anti-freedom right grows in power, there is no excuse to be supporting incumbents like Cuellar anymore.

**[Peter Willis, Our Revolution is on the ground in Texas, knocking on doors, making phone calls, and doing whatever it takes to defeat Henry Cuellar and replace him with Jessica Cisneros](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5467?t=12&akid=2885%2E5885482%2EBuiA83)** _If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Our Revolution will process immediately._ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW »](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5470?refcode=OR_EM_FR_12MO_20220508_1_2&t=13&akid=2885%2E5885482%2EBuiA83)

The corporate establishment knows what’s at stake in these races and so do we. That’s why we are growing our ground game and waging the fight in each of these pivotal races.

Despite Henry Cuellar betraying every woman in the United States, Nancy Pelosi still thinks it's a good idea to endorse him over progressive champion Jessica Cisneros. As the anti-freedom right grows in power, there is no excuse to be supporting incumbents like Cuellar anymore. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Our Revolution will process immediately. | | | | | | | Working-class fighters like Jessica Cisneros are being targeted with expensive smear campaigns from every direction – from both corporate Democrats AND fascist Republicans. But, we have their back, and we know that the right to choose, Medicare for All, a living wage, and climate action are the true mainstream positions of the people in this country. The corporate establishment knows what’s at stake in these races and so do we. That’s why we are growing our ground game and waging the fight in each of these pivotal races. In solidarity, Aaron Chappell National Political Director | | | | | Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive group in America. name: Team Lira
body:
Peter,

We are in the middle of John’s “Boots on the Ground” tour! We set a goal on this tour for John to travel to all 29 counties and meet with constituents in every single one over the next few months.

Will you chip in $3.88 to cover a gallon of gas, or more if you can spare it, so we can fill up John’s tank and make sure he can keep up this moment and visit every county in the district? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lira-em-20220508?refcode=em20220508-fr]

Donate $3.88, 1 gallon » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lira-em-20220508?amount=3.88&refcode=em20220508-fr] Donate $19.40, 5 gallons » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lira-em-20220508?amount=19.40&refcode=em20220508-fr]
Donate $38.80, 10 gallons » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lira-em-20220508?amount=38.80&refcode=em20220508-fr]
Donate $77.60, 20 gallons » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lira-em-20220508?amount=77.60&refcode=em20220508-fr]
Donate another amount » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lira-em-20220508?refcode=em20220508-fr]

Taking this campaign on the road is about doing what a representative should do: meeting the people where they are to hear them out.This is John’s way of making sure he is doing just that.

He wants to make sure he’s setting an example early for how he plans to lead as representative of TX-23 — by listening to people’s concerns and taking action on the issues that matter most to the people of his district.

Making sure we can get John’s van to each and every county is one of the most vital logistics of this tour and to afford the rest of this trip, we need your help to fund the gas. Will you chip in and cover one gallon of gas for John today?

Let’s keep it up,
Team Lira

https://www.facebook.com/LiraforCongress [https://www.facebook.com/LiraforCongress] https://twitter.com/LiraforCongress [https://twitter.com/LiraforCongress]

John Lira for Congress
1721 WW White Rd, Suite 120
#8096
San Antonio, TX 78220
United States
John Lira is a retired member of the US Marines. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Marines or the Department of Defense.
Email is the most important way we keep in touch with our supporters. body:
Become a Senior Democratic Strategist today!
| [](http://go.dscc.org/go/7607?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220508-Christie-ActiveDemsGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220508-Christie-ActiveDemsGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=4045%2E9716520%2EC0ELiN)
---
Hi there -- When I looked through our past survey responses, I was very impressed with your level of enthusiasm. In fact, you were **more active than 92 percent of Democrats in our database!**

As one of our **_most active supporters_** , you're who we NEED to hear from to lock in our strategy to defend President Biden's Democratic Senate majority.

[**That’s why I’m proud to offer you my personal invitation to become a Senior Democratic Strategist and join an _exclusive_ focus group. Click here to start >>**](http://go.dscc.org/go/7607?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220508-Christie-ActiveDemsGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220508-Christie-ActiveDemsGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=4045%2E9716520%2EC0ELiN)

| | [START THE FOCUS GROUP](http://go.dscc.org/go/7607?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220508-Christie-ActiveDemsGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220508-Christie-ActiveDemsGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=4045%2E9716520%2EC0ELiN)
---

This high-priority focus group is ONLY open to Democrats who've proven their commitment to winning -- **fewer than 8% of our supporters made the cut, and you're one of them.**

Listening to our most active supporters was the most impactful decision we made in the last election. Your critical input helped us elect Raphael Warnock and Jon Ossoff, flip the Senate, and kick Donald Trump out of office -- and now we need you again to help finalize Senate Democrats’ official strategy to expand our razor-thin majority.

**So please, accept your invitation right away and join our focus group exclusively for Senior Democratic Strategists:**
**[www.dscc.org/SeniorDemocraticStrategists/members/#9716520](http://go.dscc.org/go/7607?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220508-Christie-ActiveDemsGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220508-Christie-ActiveDemsGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=4045%2E9716520%2EC0ELiN)**

I'm excited to have you on the team!

Christie
Executive Director, DSCC

One of our main priorities here at Samuels HQ is building Missouris's economy and driving innovation and investment right here in St. Louis. **[For 30 years Ann Wagner has failed to deliver for the people of Missouri. It is time for new leadership. Ben \---------- Original Message ---------- [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45072773/344335603/-1378727112?refcode=220507-email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGMyZTlmMi1lN2NlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QLez1eVmtx4bfxlGm7096rzuwxI13-Yggb9GJPi_2rE=) Did you know that Missouri is **26th** in unemployment? clean_body: | Hey there, I’m checking in with our online supporters because today marks six months until Election Day, and we’ve got a lot of important work to fund between now and then. As the NDRC’s Finance Director, I want to make sure we have the resources to do it all – but that depends on what people like you pitch in right now. Will you make a donation to help us keep up the fight for fair maps and voting rights? You can use this link to make sure your contribution counts immediately: = Thanks, Amanda Finance Director, NDRC | = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. She may hate political ads, but she knows what Montana needs to succeed. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45077659/344363097/1820125544?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTY1ZTdiOS0wOWNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lGJ3UUtf67KY_zFh1Oz4C3GI1EM9x2tT8v_MVqHrF1s=) Team, It’s been a busy start to May, but I wanted to take a moment and sincerely thank you for your support over the last month. We’re at a critical moment in our nation’s history, and your support has been instrumental in our success so far. **Now, I’m so excited to announce our latest campaign ad featuring one of my biggest supporters: my grandmother, Noonie.** [**You can watch it here, then chip in to help us keep it on the air.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45077660/344363098/-1099142980?refcode=em-5.8.22-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTY1ZTdiOS0wOWNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lGJ3UUtf67KY_zFh1Oz4C3GI1EM9x2tT8v_MVqHrF1s=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45077661/344363099/-1099142980?refcode=em-5.8.22-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTY1ZTdiOS0wOWNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lGJ3UUtf67KY_zFh1Oz4C3GI1EM9x2tT8v_MVqHrF1s=)

I’m so grateful to have my grandmother’s support, and it’s been a gift to raise my children with lessons from three generations of Montana women to live by.
For most of Noonie’s life, she and my grandfather were proud Republicans. She’s seen this state change over the last few decades, and has come around to see that it’s not about the party you support, but whether or not the person is willing to fight for issues that matter.
**[Take a minute to watch our new ad and get to know Noonie. Then, if you can, chip in $3 or more to help us keep her message on the air.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45077663/344363101/-1099142980?refcode=em-5.8.22-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTY1ZTdiOS0wOWNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lGJ3UUtf67KY_zFh1Oz4C3GI1EM9x2tT8v_MVqHrF1s=)**

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: What the chair of the DCCC said 👀
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

When Trump appointed his third far-right justice to the Supreme Court — we
knew that the court could overturn Roe v. Wade.

Rep. Sean Patrick Maloney, Chair of the corporate-funded, moderate,
progress-blocking Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee (DCCC),
thinks that Democrats can sit back and just blame Republicans. Look at
what he tweeted the morning after the draft SCOTUS opinion overturning Roe
was leaked:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/105923?refcode=em20220508-23256&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=23256%2E1203867%2EyOB08g ]Democrats: We’re angry and hurt, I know. But it’s not about filibuster,
size of the court or what the Senate hasn’t passed. It’s about
Republicans, not us. We can save our freedoms. But, it’s November, stupid.

Democrats have a majority in both houses of Congress. They could have
passed the Women's Health Protection Act, codified Roe v. Wade, and gotten
rid of the filibuster a year ago. Instead, they did nothing to actually
secure abortion rights for millions of Americans.

The Democratic Party has shown that even with the majority, they won’t do
what is politically necessary in order to fight for the lives and
liberties of the people. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/105923?refcode=em20220508-23256&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=23256%2E1203867%2EyOB08g ]If you’re with us in our work to
fundamentally transform the Democratic party, and elect leaders who will
fight for abortion access, will you make a $3 contribution
today?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/105923?refcode=em20220508-23256&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=23256%2E1203867%2EyOB08g ]Contribute

The Democratic Party has spent hundreds of millions of Wall Street, Big
Pharma, and fossil fuel dollars and countless years asking the American
people to give them governing majorities, and now they’ve failed in using
those majorities to pass meaningful legislation or reform anti-democratic
institutions.

We can’t let corporate Democrats like Sean Patrick Maloney continue to put
the responsibility of this moment on voters when it’s the inaction of the
Democratic party that has gotten us to his point.

We need to abolish the filibuster, codify Roe, and put everything on the
line to protect not just reproductive justice but LGBTQIA rights, voting
rights, and so much more. But in order to do that, we need to elect bold
progressive members of Congress who will do whatever possible to fight for
the people.

That’s exactly what we’re working to do in 4 more upcoming primaries
against the Democratic establishment. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/105923?refcode=em20220508-23256&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=23256%2E1203867%2EyOB08g ]Will you make a
$3 contribution to support the Justice Democrats 2022 slate
today and defeat corporate-backed, anti-choice incumbents like Henry
Cuellar?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/105923?refcode=em20220508-23256&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1024&akid=23256%2E1203867%2EyOB08g ]Contribute

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1025&akid=23256%2E1203867%2EyOB08g ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1026&akid=23256%2E1203867%2EyOB08g ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220508-23256-footer&t=1027&refcode2=23256_1203867_yOB08g&akid=23256%2E1203867%2EyOB08g

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1028&akid=23256%2E1203867%2EyOB08g

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

[ ]Contribute The Democratic Party has spent hundreds of millions of Wall Street, Big Pharma, and fossil fuel dollars and countless years asking the American people to give them governing majorities, and now they’ve failed in using those majorities to pass meaningful legislation or reform anti-democratic institutions. We can’t let corporate Democrats like Sean Patrick Maloney continue to put the responsibility of this moment on voters when it’s the inaction of the Democratic party that has gotten us to his point. We need to abolish the filibuster, codify Roe, and put everything on the line to protect not just reproductive justice but LGBTQIA rights, voting rights, and so much more. But in order to do that, we need to elect bold progressive members of Congress who will do whatever possible to fight for the people. That’s exactly what we’re working to do in 4 more upcoming primaries against the Democratic establishment. [ ]Will you make a $3 contribution to support the Justice Democrats 2022 slate today and defeat corporate-backed, anti-choice incumbents like Henry Cuellar? [ ]Contribute In solidarity, Justice Democrats Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [ ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [ ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department. Contribute to Justice Democrats:

name: Nan Whaley
subject: Can I count on you?

body:
We deserve better than to watch our elected leaders prioritize their wealthy friends’ pocketbooks before our kids’ futures.

Hey team,
We made history this week when we won the Democratic primary.
Now, we have a new challenge: **taking on Mike DeWine and taking back Ohio.**
I’m running for governor because I know that Ohio is ready for a change. For too long, Mike DeWine and his friends have ignored the needs of Ohio families. They’ve sat idly by and lined their own pockets while our jobs were shipped overseas and our communities hollowed out.
**[I’m running for governor to bring opportunity back to Ohio. Please, chip in $5 right now to kick off the general election with the strongest start possible.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45077822/344365213/-774123682?refcode=nw_em_220508_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmUzNjExNS0wZWNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JjxeaD2ko0dcb5Ow8EcbS-WuAR8bBbBQMafn3C_eVM0=)**
I’m proud to come from a working class family. But I’ve seen firsthand how working families have had to work harder and harder, while their pay goes down and their bills go up. Growing up, I watched as my dad, a union autoworker, got laid off, and my mom got work at a nearby laundromat to make ends meet.
Meanwhile, Mike DeWine has made millions while so many Ohio families have struggled to pay the bills.
We deserve better than Mike DeWine. We deserve better than to watch our elected leaders prioritize their wealthy friends’ pocketbooks before our kids’ futures. We deserve better than the corruption that has plagued Columbus.
But we’re not going to get that better future without a fight – not when we’re up against those same wealthy special interest allies ready to spend big to keep their friend in office. We have to hit the ground running if we’re going to compete.
**[It’s time for a change for Ohio – and I know we can deliver that change this year. Please, chip in $5 right now to kick off the general election>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45077823/344365214/-774123682?refcode=nw_em_220508_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmUzNjExNS0wZWNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JjxeaD2ko0dcb5Ow8EcbS-WuAR8bBbBQMafn3C_eVM0=)**

Nan Whaley

| | Hi, I'm Amelia, Andrea's daughter. **It's Mother's Day and only 9 days until the primary. I wanted to take a moment to share with you the kind of mother she has been to me.** I know that no one is going to work harder than my mom. I have seen that on a daily basis. She has always been fiercely protective of me and has never backed down from a fight when my best interest is at heart. She is compassionate and caring but also tough. I sometimes don't know how she keeps going in the face of so many challenges. But she is motivated by creating a better world for me and in doing so she is also fighting for my friends, classmates and all Oregonians. Your mom is supposed to always have your back and she has. She has also set a great example of what a smart, thoughtful, hard working compassionate woman can be. **In short, she has been a great mom and I know she will also be a great member of Congress**. clean_body: | | | Hi, I'm Amelia, Andrea's daughter. It's Mother's Day and only 9 days until the primary. I wanted to take a moment to share with you the kind of mother she has been to me. I know that no one is going to work harder than my mom. I have seen that on a daily basis. She has always been fiercely protective of me and has never backed down from a fight when my best interest is at heart. She is compassionate and caring but also tough. I sometimes don't know how she keeps going in the face of so many challenges. But she is motivated by creating a better world for me and in doing so she is also fighting for my friends, classmates and all Oregonians. Your mom is supposed to always have your back and she has. She has also set a great example of what a smart, thoughtful, hard working compassionate woman can be. In short, she has been a great mom and I know she will also be a great member of Congress. Amelia Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Andrea Salinas for Oregon. ---|--- | This email was sent by Andrea Salinas for Oregon PO Box 230985 Tigard, OR 97281 United States Email is an important way for Andrea Salinas to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. subject: Washington Post: Jocelyn's GOP opponent could steal your vote!
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
body:
Friend, we believe you know what Jocelyn’s race means for 2024 — but don’t just take our word for it — ask the Washington Post.

The Post’s editorial board did a deep dive on our race and concluded that Kristina Karamo’s endorsement means, “Trump could install a handpicked zealot in a key position leading up to the 2024 election, making it easier for him to steal electoral votes.”
Steal. Electoral. Votes.

Those aren't our words. One of the largest, most even-keeled newsrooms in the country is concerned that electing Karamo could hand the 2024 election to Trump regardless of the result! That’s the whole game right there.

Help us stop Karamo and make sure Jocelyn is there in 2024 to ensure a transparent, secure and accurate election, (again!) >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=050822]
-Team Benson

PS: If you haven’t read the full article yet, you can find it here [https://www.washingtonpost.com/opinions/2022/04/27/kristina-karamo-michigan-republicans-truth-lies-ballot/?emci=97ef92fe-48cd-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=] .

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: This Mother’s Day:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
My mom, Jerri-Ann, is one of the most amazing and hardest-working people I know.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45078947/344371345/-1925218157?refcode=BLU-SJC-20220508-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzExZjRmMC0xYWNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DCl1QYBSqWsm-nULeJ8LHi33Ls7DF6A4vf71QKum_PM=)
---
| Friend,

On the heels of the leaked draft decision of the Supreme Court overturning _Roe v. Wade_ , I’ve been thinking a lot about motherhood. About what it means, and who gets to decide.

My mom, Jerri-Ann, is one of the most amazing and hardest-working people I know. She dedicated her adult life to raising me and my three siblings. It was hard, constant work (we were an energetic bunch), and it was work that she chose and that she loved.

I’m so grateful for everything my mom did for me, for all the sacrifices she made, all the lunches she packed and sports teams she coached. And that’s why I know that no one should be forced to be a mother if it isn’t the right decision for them.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45078948/344371346/-1925218157?refcode=BLU-SJC-20220508-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzExZjRmMC0xYWNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DCl1QYBSqWsm-nULeJ8LHi33Ls7DF6A4vf71QKum_PM=)
So today, I’m thinking of all the mothers and mother figures across the country who do the incredibly important and difficult work of raising the next generation. And I’m more committed than ever to making sure that people can become parents when and how they choose, or if they choose not to at all.

Happy Mother’s Day!

Warmly,

Sara

clean_body: My mom, Jerri-Ann, is one of the most amazing and hardest-working people I know. | = | Friend, On the heels of the leaked draft decision of the Supreme Court overturning Roe v. Wade , I’ve been thinking a lot about motherhood. About what it means, and who gets to decide. My mom, Jerri-Ann, is one of the most amazing and hardest-working people I know. She dedicated her adult life to raising me and my three siblings. It was hard, constant work (we were an energetic bunch), and it was work that she chose and that she loved. I’m so grateful for everything my mom did for me, for all the sacrifices she made, all the lunches she packed and sports teams she coached. And that’s why I know that no one should be forced to be a mother if it isn’t the right decision for them. = So today, I’m thinking of all the mothers and mother figures across the country who do the incredibly important and difficult work of raising the next generation. And I’m more committed than ever to making sure that people can become parents when and how they choose, or if they choose not to at all. Happy Mother’s Day! Warmly, Sara * | | = Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress Sara Jacobs for Congress 660 Pennsylvania Ave SE Suite 202 Washington, DC 20003 United States | | | ---|---|--- = If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please

body:
Thirty years later ...
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45078942/344371338/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk991-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjExZjRmMC0xYWNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6xMnrJgLQr_wdh1dIZ46qaFIZCaZSwF96HURa4D4ySI=)
Peter – When this photo of me was taken, my opponent Sen. Grassley had _already_ been in DC for 17 years. Despite promises to the contrary, he'd also already turned his back on working families like the one I grew up in. Good-paying jobs started disappearing. People left Iowa.
Thirty years later, Sen. Grassley is _still_ in Washington and has done nothing to fight for our working families. Instead, Sen. Grassley bought himself a nearly million-dollar home in our nation’s capital.

**That little girl you see in the picture? Well, she grew up to be the youngest woman to flip a House seat from red to blue. Now, with your help, I'll defeat Sen. Grassley ****and become the youngest woman ever elected to the Senate.**
I know that unseating a seven-term incumbent doesn't happen overnight. But my family taught me that when there's work to be done or a problem to solve, you say yes – and right now, Sen. Grassley is causing a lot of problems for Iowa and our democracy. Rather than take action to protect our workers and unions, or at bare minimum protect the right to vote, Sen. Grassley is beholden to the far-right agenda of the former president who endorsed him at a rally here in Iowa.
**It's no wonder Sen. Grassley is facing record-low approval ratings. Iowans know it's time to show him the door, and I promise you nobody is going to work harder than me to do it. But to win in November and protect our Senate majority, I need your help.**
**[Please, before midnight tonight, will you make a donation of $5 or more right here and now to finally defeat Sen. Grassley, flip this seat blue and give working families a leader who will fight for them?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45078943/344371339/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk991-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjExZjRmMC0xYWNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6xMnrJgLQr_wdh1dIZ46qaFIZCaZSwF96HURa4D4ySI=)**

| You hear about my grandfather and father, and their influence on my life but I am also blessed with two amazing women as my role models. My mother, Virginia, grew up in Herndon, went to Herndon High and Wheaton College, and has been an educator all her life. My love of knowledge and the ability to be home schooled, while building my business was thanks to my amazing parents. My grandmother, Carolyn, just like she was for my grandfather, Congressman Frank Wolf, is an awesome campaigner and partner. Every one loves to speak with her to catch up on the latest Wolf Family news.
Please join me in recognizing the incredible energy, warmth, heart, courage, humor and life of our dear sweet mothers. Not just today, but these marvelous women should be recognized every single day!!
Happy Mother's Day to All Our Mothers in the 10th Congressional District and thank you for all you have done for the next generation of Patriots.

My campaign is focused on Country, Community and Common Sense. Country is ensuring that the United States remains an economic and military leader that stands as a beacon of hope for freedom seeking people around the world. Community is supporting the growth of the 10th District's dynamic economy and many small businesses and local organizations, which are the foundation of our society. And Common Sense is an understanding that we cannot continue with the fiscal irresponsibility of the past and must make the hardworking families of this district our main priority. Right now, working Americans suffer from the highest inflation rate in decades.

I look forward to standing up to the Biden Administration and Jennifer Wexton's failed policies which hurt every working family in the 10th Congressional District. As the Republican candidate, we will win in November, flip the House of Representatives from blue to red, and put government back to work for the hardworking families and business owners who call the 10th District home.

He founded one of Western Loudoun's largest landscaping companies and is the grandson of former US [Representative Frank Wolf](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011aPjHdLc6TwCxfvbJHbD3gTf0FbUWJQjNtisMQODkfxcyYvVefECKOUK9EAyzRgT5ZlYJGx8Wwe4_OW19YuY0cSewlK-aOHHffZaMeBp3f6eK3oMWC0FrYDvZGCPjZvNZCTMtVMfIJhgxCt3zoVRl6DeEnJHliMcYe1c-axUdrLCzisBtaQd5Dt7ITexJAX7&c=6GaYVOL2K1VdRsnmK5iUOKoiV5d0Uwi9AcT37iQh6FkQBxP23L_z5w==&ch=14uUSZXtZmjg2dV2zufSdNYg62AMPDwxJhjlSn7GufqpTQW_3aHioA==) who served the 10th Congressional District for 34 years, having been first elected in 1980.
Caleb continued his entrepreneurial activities with the purchase of the Pica Deli in Reston and the establishment of his home, a 40 head cattle beef farm, in Round Hill. He grew up as an active member of 4H in Loudoun County and is a member of the Virginia Farm Bureau and Blue Ridge Cattlemen's Association.
Like his grandfather, Caleb is passionate about the international human rights movement. He founded a national, bipartisan non-profit organization called the [Athenai Institute](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011aPjHdLc6TwCxfvbJHbD3gTf0FbUWJQjNtisMQODkfxcyYvVefECKHmK5BW6HuTmgc_a5h3U5eSMcpfECSgCTBjc8h0piU6VvbQKguGETrA8wAapyfpGmogsPaIPFp9kSUKhpVPx8uQ=&c=6GaYVOL2K1VdRsnmK5iUOKoiV5d0Uwi9AcT37iQh6FkQBxP23L_z5w==&ch=14uUSZXtZmjg2dV2zufSdNYg62AMPDwxJhjlSn7GufqpTQW_3aHioA==) and joined in starting Stand Against Chinese Communism (SACC). Both organizations are working to eliminate Chinese Communist Party influence on our college campuses. Caleb has taken a specific interest in fighting the genocide of the Uyghur Muslims and recently was recognized by the Virginia Muslim Association for his assistance to the Afghan refugee and Muslim community after President Biden's botched and deadly withdrawal from Afghanistan.
Caleb is ready to fight for you and all the citizens of the 10th Congressional District!! clean_body: Caleb Max - Working for Virginia 10 | | | | | | | | | | == | | == | Welcome to the Max Impact Team! Take Back the Tenth | FOLLOW CALEB ON SOCIAL MEDIA | == == == == | As you know, running for Congress takes resources -- if you stand with me, and want to see me elected to represent your values in the U.S. Congress, please consider making a donation! PLEASE DONATE TODAY | | | == | | | == | | | == | | HAPPY MOTHER'S DAY !! | | | | | | You hear about my grandfather and father, and their influence on my life but I am also blessed with two amazing women as my role models. My mother, Virginia, grew up in Herndon, went to Herndon High and Wheaton College, and has been an educator all her life. My love of knowledge and the ability to be home schooled, while building my business was thanks to my amazing parents. My grandmother, Carolyn, just like she was for my grandfather, Congressman Frank Wolf, is an awesome campaigner and partner. Every one loves to speak with her to catch up on the latest Wolf Family news. Please join me in recognizing the incredible energy, warmth, heart, courage, humor and life of our dear sweet mothers. Not just today, but these marvelous women should be recognized every single day!! Happy Mother's Day to All Our Mothers in the 10th Congressional District and thank you for all you have done for the next generation of Patriots. | | | == | | | | EARLY VOTING THIS THURSDAY ONLY OPPORTUNITY FOR ABSENTEE VOTING | | DON'T FORGET VOTE FOR CALEB MAX ONE DAY ONLY OF ABSENTEE IN-PERSON VOTING THIS THURSDAY, MAY 12TH FROM 4PM TO 8PM The Middleburg Barn 23320 Foxchase Farm Lane Middleburg, VA 20117 | | CALLING FOR VOLUNTEERS WE NEED YOU!! | | | We had quite a gang join us yesterday in our NEW campaign headquarters for a Super Saturday of contacting voters. We are operating every day and need your help reaching out to 10th CD Republicans with phone calls, door knocking, letter writing and delivering yard signs. If you can offer a half hour, hour, two or even more, it would be greatly appreciated. You can sign up == or below is a link to the volunteer page on our website. One of the Max Impact Team Leaders will contact you. Thank you for your continued support!! | | | == | | | ---|--- | JOIN US THIS FRIDAY Meet & Greet with 10th Congressional Dist. Candidate Caleb Max Hosted by Steve Carey. Special Guest Former Congressman Frank Wolf Friday, May 13th. 6 pm to 8 pm Please Join Us for a BBQ 4517 Sperryville Pike Woodville, VA Download the event flyer ==. This is a free event open to all. 5th Annual Loudoun Conservative Gala Saturday, May 14th, 7pm - 10pm Trump National Golf Club ==. And Many More To Come. Watch This Space! | | | == | | | | | == | ---|--- | HOW AND WHERE TO VOTE Scan the Code or == MARK YOUR CALENDAR FIREHOUSE PRIMARY SATURDAY, MAY 21 9 AM TO 4 PM VOTE FOR CALEB MAX The 10th CD Republican Committee has selected a party run process for selecting our Republican Congressional Candidate to challenge Nancy Pelosi's friend, Democrat Jennifer Wexton. The party canvass, often called a "firehouse or mini- primary" is an extremely simple process. Here is a link on my website about how to vote: == Please show up at the designated voting location in your county (this probably will not be where you normally vote) on May 21st between 9 and 4. You will find the 11 voting locations below and not in Loudoun and Prince William, that certain Magisterial Districts have designated voting locations (see == for exact precincts in Loudoun, Prince William and Fairfax counties): FAIRFAX COUNTY Clifton Town Hall, 12641 Chapel Road, Clifton, VA 20124 FAUQUIER COUNTY Fauquier High School, 705 Waterloo Road, Warrenton, VA 20186 LOUDOUN COUNTY Loudoun Valley High School, 340 N Maple Ave, Purcellville, VA 20132 (Leesburg and Catoctin Districts and selected Blue Ridge precincts) Broad Run High School, 21670 Ashburn Rd, Ashburn, VA 20147 (Algonkian, Ashburn and Broad Run Districts) Mercer Middle School, 42149 Greenstone Dr, Aldie, VA 20105 (Dulles and Sterling Districts and selected Blue Ridge precincts) CITY OF MANASSAS Grace E. Metz Middle School, 9950 Wellington Rd, Manassas, VA 20110 MANASSAS PARK Manassas Park Community Center, 99 Adams St, Manassas Park, VA 20111 PRINCE WILLIAM COUNTY Bull Run Middle School, 6308 Catharpin Road, Gainesville, VA, 20155 (Gainesville District) Gainesville Middle School, 8001 Limestone Dr, Gainesville, VA 20155 (Brentsville District) Lake Jackson Vol. Fire Department, 11310 Coles Dr, Manassas, VA 20112 (Coles and Occoquan Districts) RAPPAHANNOCK COUNTY Rappahannock Co. Elem. School, 34 Schoolhouse Rd, Washington, VA 22747 Present your ID to verify you are a registered voter. IF YOU ARE NOT REGISTERED TO VOTE, PLEASE DO SO ASAP - you can go to the == to check on your status or register to vote. The ballot will have you rank your choices, mark CALEB MAX as your first choice (more on rank choice voting ==). Submit your ballot and you may leave...simple. Bring your friends and family and have them vote for Caleb Max! If you are unable to attend and have a good reason, you can in person absentee vote early at the following location: IN-PERSON ABSENTEE VOTING Thursday, May 12, 2022 4 p.m. to 8 p.m. The Middleburg Barn 23320 Foxchase Farm Lane Middleburg, VA 20117 So Mark Your Calendar today for Saturday, May 21 to Vote for Caleb!! . | | On The Campaign Trail Visit Our Website == | I had the opportunity to meet with these 10th District voters who make up a part of the large College Republicans organization at Christendom College. This fired up group of young conservatives were very impressive and are excited about our generation going to Congress! Tuesday night, in Warrenton at the County Republican Committee meeting, I had the opportunity to speak to the County Republicans about our primary on May 21st and why I'm the candidate that will win in November. | | == | Our Meet & Greets continue across the District. The other night I was joined by neighbors in Purcellville. Have we spoken yet? If not, please contact mailto:Scheduler@MaxForVirginia.com to arrange a time for me to call. Thank you! Prince William County Police and the DEA recently seized several firearms and over 5,000 suspected counterfeit fentanyl-laced Percocet pills known to be distributed in our area. You can read the == on how China is a primary source of fentanyl and when I am in Congress, I will push to stop the Chinese Communists from shipping this deadly drug. We must stop the trafficking in this deadly substance. | | mailto:noah@maxforvirginia.com | | Country. Community. Common Sense. | | == | ---|--- | My campaign is focused on Country, Community and Common Sense. Country is ensuring that the United States remains an economic and military leader that stands as a beacon of hope for freedom seeking people around the world. Community is supporting the growth of the 10th District's dynamic economy and many small businesses and local organizations, which are the foundation of our society. And Common Sense is an understanding that we cannot continue with the fiscal irresponsibility of the past and must make the hardworking families of this district our main priority. Right now, working Americans suffer from the highest inflation rate in decades. I look forward to standing up to the Biden Administration and Jennifer Wexton's failed policies which hurt every working family in the 10th Congressional District. As the Republican candidate, we will win in November, flip the House of Representatives from blue to red, and put government back to work for the hardworking families and business owners who call the 10th District home. | | | == | | Learn More About Caleb | | Lifelong Loudoun County resident and business owner, Caleb was recently recognized by the == as a business and community leader. body:
These three could be U.S. Senators in less than one year.
#
Derek —
**J.D. Vance** \- The Republican nominee in Ohio. A former Never-Trumper turned MAGA Evangelist who won Trump’s endorsement with the help of Tucker Carlson. The same guy who said “I don’t really care what happens to Ukraine one way or another.”
**Dr. Oz** \- Trump’s endorsed candidate in Pennsylvania. Another fraud playing the role of MAGA Apostle in order to win the former president’s favor.
**Blake Masters** \- The guy Trump is likely to endorse in Arizona. Here’s another guy supported by Tucker Carlson who celebrated his endorsement from Marjorie Taylor Greene.
These three could be U.S. Senators in less than one year.
VoteVets will probably be running significant ad campaigns in each of these states.
Why, because our brand works in those places in a way other progressive groups don’t.
But we cannot do this alone. And with control of the Senate at stake, we have to ask:

Team -- Today marks exactly six months until Election Day, and **right now, we're in serious trouble.**

Mitch McConnell only needs **_one seat_** to shift power and take back control of the Senate, but FOUR of our Democratic senators are statistically tied with their Republican opponents!

**"Conor Lamb is the best choice Dems have to flip a Senate seat."
_-Philadelphia Inquirer Editorial Board, 05/08/22_** [DONATE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45079227/344372490/-863248123?refcode=em22_220508_inquirer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTU2ZDY2OC0xZmNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o-BSpKxBsi5QJnJVp-w-BogM7U34AHQ4GNREF0GsPmY=) Team –
**_In a HUGE show of momentum, the biggest newspaper in Pennsylvania just endorsed Conor Lamb for Senate._**
The Philadelphia Inquirer agrees that Conor is the candidate to flip this seat blue this November. But don't take it from us. Here's what the Inquirer had to say about our campaign:
> _"In just the past session, Lamb voted in favor of Build Back Better, the Women's Health Protection Act, the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act, and the For the People Act. Then there's the George Floyd Justice in Policing Act, the Protecting the Right to Organize Act, and the bill to make D.C. a state. There is no need to guess how he would vote on these bills; he's already done it.
>
> [...]
>
> It's hardly hyperbole to say that the election for U.S. Senate in Pennsylvania could help determine the course of the nation for years to come. We believe that Lamb has the ability to defeat a Republican in the fall and then join his Democratic Senate colleagues to protect abortion rights, expand the social safety net, and safeguard the right to vote." _
With the primary just over a week away, **we have to make sure we pick the Democratic candidate who can beat the Trump GOP in November.**

[**_There's not much time left, so chip in whatever you can to make sure we get this news out to voters and ensure we nominate a candidate who can win._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45079228/344372491/-863248123?refcode=em22_220508_inquirer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTU2ZDY2OC0xZmNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o-BSpKxBsi5QJnJVp-w-BogM7U34AHQ4GNREF0GsPmY=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45079229/344372492/-863248123?refcode=em22_220508_inquirer&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTU2ZDY2OC0xZmNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o-BSpKxBsi5QJnJVp-w-BogM7U34AHQ4GNREF0GsPmY=) | [Express Donate $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45079230/344372493/-863248123?refcode=em22_220508_inquirer&express_lane=true&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTU2ZDY2OC0xZmNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o-BSpKxBsi5QJnJVp-w-BogM7U34AHQ4GNREF0GsPmY=)

clean_body: | = "Conor Lamb is the best choice Dems have to flip a Senate seat." -Philadelphia Inquirer Editorial Board, 05/08/22 = Team – In a HUGE show of momentum, the biggest newspaper in Pennsylvania just endorsed Conor Lamb for Senate. The Philadelphia Inquirer agrees that Conor is the candidate to flip this seat blue this November. But don't take it from us. Here's what the Inquirer had to say about our campaign: "In just the past session, Lamb voted in favor of Build Back Better, the Women's Health Protection Act, the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act, and the For the People Act. Then there's the George Floyd Justice in Policing Act, the Protecting the Right to Organize Act, and the bill to make D.C. a state. There is no need to guess how he would vote on these bills; he's already done it. [...] It's hardly hyperbole to say that the election for U.S. Senate in Pennsylvania could help determine the course of the nation for years to come. We believe that Lamb has the ability to defeat a Republican in the fall and then join his Democratic Senate colleagues to protect abortion rights, expand the social safety net, and safeguard the right to vote." With the primary just over a week away, we have to make sure we pick the Democratic candidate who can beat the Trump GOP in November. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Conor has been working hard for the people of Pennsylvania, his record shows it, and the Inquirer confirmed it. But that's not the only reason we need to show up on May 17: The GOP is getting more vocal and extreme by the day. We can't leave this election, or our Democratic majority in the Senate, up to chance. = — Team Conor = = *

body:
Happy Mother’s Day!
#
Most people know her as Gisele or SLoP.
To us, she’s Mom. 💕
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220508-2?amount=5&refcode=em20220508-5696&refcode2=5696_434096_omawCx&akid=5696%2E434096%2EomawCx)
_Family photo or album cover?_
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220508-2?amount=5&refcode=em20220508-5696&refcode2=5696_434096_omawCx&akid=5696%2E434096%2EomawCx)
_Fine, here’s a throwback where everyone’s smiling 😂 _
Today, we want to say thank you to our mom, who is actually pretty cool most of the time.
(We’ll admit it today ONLY, ok???)
Also, from our whole FetterFam, we want to celebrate all of the amazing moms in Pennsylvania. 💐 There’s, like, a lot of them!
Ok, time to go hang with Mom + Dad. Later, Derek.
—August + Gracie + Karl Fetterman
_how DAR u forget us kiddos what the fluff? She is our mom + #soulmate too!!!!!! Gisele we love u much bestie. 💕 -Levi + Artie_

name: Eddie Geller (personal note)
subject: culture wars
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eddie Geller for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45079267/344372727/380755282?refcode=gel_headerlogo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWNmMGY4Ny0yMGNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2qkjFIVJlT4Ikcddd3lMzI7R_rE-wXLQuPQGekRaJco=)

| | This video made the rounds on Twitter a few weeks ago, but I keep coming back to it again and again so I wanted to take a few minutes to share a few thoughts.

First: If you haven’t seen the whole video, you should watch it. In just a few short minutes, Michigan State Senator Mallory McMorrow absolutely DEMOLISHES the entire bigoted agenda of today’s Republican party. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45079268/344372728/-1262028889?refcode=EM_BS_GEL_220508_FR_CULTUREWARS_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWNmMGY4Ny0yMGNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2qkjFIVJlT4Ikcddd3lMzI7R_rE-wXLQuPQGekRaJco=) I’m sick and tired of Democrats running away from the culture wars. We need to elect people who aren’t afraid to stand up, look the Republicans in the eye, and tell them we’re not buying their $#*% ANYMORE!

[No, we’re not trying to “groom” your children.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45079269/344372729/-1262028889?refcode=EM_BS_GEL_220508_FR_CULTUREWARS_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWNmMGY4Ny0yMGNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2qkjFIVJlT4Ikcddd3lMzI7R_rE-wXLQuPQGekRaJco=) We are trying to keep kids alive. Study upon study shows that the LGBTQ+ community — specifically trans folks — are at a much higher risk of suicide due to anti-queer attacks. Anti-trans legislation and Florida’s new “Don’t Say Gay” law hurt our kids.

[No, we’re not trying to “indoctrinate” your kids with “woke-ism.”](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45079270/344372730/-1262028889?refcode=EM_BS_GEL_220508_FR_CULTUREWARS_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWNmMGY4Ny0yMGNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2qkjFIVJlT4Ikcddd3lMzI7R_rE-wXLQuPQGekRaJco=) Rather, we’re trying to acknowledge how white supremacy and racism have and continue to impact our nation. If we hope to make headway on racial justice in this country, we must have leaders unafraid to address its root causes and propose real solutions.

[No, we don’t want to “take over” your kid's education.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45079271/344372731/-1262028889?refcode=EM_BS_GEL_220508_FR_CULTUREWARS_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWNmMGY4Ny0yMGNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2qkjFIVJlT4Ikcddd3lMzI7R_rE-wXLQuPQGekRaJco=) We want to make sure schools are fully funded, teachers are paid what they deserve, and that books aren’t banned!

[Democrats can’t keep running from the culture wars.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45079272/344372732/-1262028889?refcode=EM_BS_GEL_220508_FR_CULTUREWARS_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWNmMGY4Ny0yMGNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2qkjFIVJlT4Ikcddd3lMzI7R_rE-wXLQuPQGekRaJco=) We’re the party of family values. We’re the party that cares about kids. We’re the party that gives a damn about righting historical wrongs.

But my opponent, Jackie Toledo, dove headfirst into the culture wars. She’s accused Disney of being “perverted by a woke mob of liberal extremists” who are using our kids as “guinea pigs” and supports banning textbooks in our schools.

We can’t empower more far-right folks like Jackie Toledo who will use “culture war” issues as cheap tactics to win elections. So, I’m asking for your support.

[Please chip in $5 today to push back against the culture wars and defeat far-right Jackie Toledo.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45079273/344372733/-1262028889?refcode=EM_BS_GEL_220508_FR_CULTUREWARS_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWNmMGY4Ny0yMGNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2qkjFIVJlT4Ikcddd3lMzI7R_rE-wXLQuPQGekRaJco=) | | | [CHIP IN $5 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45079274/344372734/-191293105?refcode=EM_BS_GEL_220508_FR_CULTUREWARS_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWNmMGY4Ny0yMGNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2qkjFIVJlT4Ikcddd3lMzI7R_rE-wXLQuPQGekRaJco=)

clean_body: | = | | This video made the rounds on Twitter a few weeks ago, but I keep coming back to it again and again so I wanted to take a few minutes to share a few thoughts. First: If you haven’t seen the whole video, you should watch it. In just a few short minutes, Michigan State Senator Mallory McMorrow absolutely DEMOLISHES the entire bigoted agenda of today’s Republican party. = I’m sick and tired of Democrats running away from the culture wars. We need to elect people who aren’t afraid to stand up, look the Republicans in the eye, and tell them we’re not buying their $#*% ANYMORE! = We are trying to keep kids alive. Study upon study shows that the LGBTQ+ community — specifically trans folks — are at a much higher risk of suicide due to anti-queer attacks. Anti-trans legislation and Florida’s new “Don’t Say Gay” law hurt our kids. = Rather, we’re trying to acknowledge how white supremacy and racism have and continue to impact our nation. If we hope to make headway on racial justice in this country, we must have leaders unafraid to address its root causes and propose real solutions. = We want to make sure schools are fully funded, teachers are paid what they deserve, and that books aren’t banned! = We’re the party of family values. We’re the party that cares about kids. We’re the party that gives a damn about righting historical wrongs. But my opponent, Jackie Toledo, dove headfirst into the culture wars. She’s accused Disney of being “perverted by a woke mob of liberal extremists” who are using our kids as “guinea pigs” and supports banning textbooks in our schools. We can’t empower more far-right folks like Jackie Toledo who will use “culture war” issues as cheap tactics to win elections. So, I’m asking for your support. = | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you! Hello,
We have incredible news: **Lieutenant Colonel Alexander Vindman just endorsed Admiral Mike Franken to help him defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue!**
You probably know Lt. Col. Vindman from when he bravely testified to Congress during Trump’s first impeachment hearings after he overheard the infamous “perfect” phone call between Donald Trump and Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy. (You know, the one where Trump tried to withhold military aid to Ukraine...)
Now he’s endorsing Mike Franken because “we need to elect Admiral Mike Franken to the U.S. Senate to protect democracy here at home and abroad." With over 36 years of service in the Navy, Mike Franken would be the most senior military person ever elected to the Senate.
**All the early polls show a close race, but Mike’s not taking any corporate PAC money. So if he’s going to fight back against McConnell’s Super PAC lies and send Grassley packing this November, Mike’s counting on grassroots donors like you to give now:**
[**Please, will you join Lt. Col. Alexander Vindman and chip in $5 or more right now – every dollar you can afford before midnight tonight – to help Admiral Mike Franken defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45079669/344374600/-42398318?refcode=em20220508pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTY3NWM5ZS0yMmNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gheDz1Of_8pnl6g83zrV6aro-KJry0SBzn-NTi9ZrP0=)

name: Team Nikki
subject: ❗A $5 MILLION ad buy❗
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Peter —

Earlier this week, Ron DeSantis announced his first media buy of the 2022 election — $5 MILLION targeted toward Spanish-speaking voters.

And we know exactly what that money is for — spreading dangerous misinformation and heinous lies across the state.

We need to fight back, Peter.

DeSantis has an army of far-right mega-donors funding his campaign. But we have a grassroots movement by and for Floridians. With your help, we can keep the pressure on him, push back against his lies, and end his authoritarian regime. Can you chip in $10 right now to help us fight back? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-may-2022?refcode=508adbuy]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.
Express Donate $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-may-2022?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=508adbuy] Express Donate $20 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-may-2022?express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode=508adbuy] Express Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-may-2022?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=508adbuy] Express Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-may-2022?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=508adbuy] Express Donate $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-may-2022?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=508adbuy] Another Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-may-2022?refcode=508adbuy]

This week has shown us that we can’t afford another four years of Ron DeSantis. Hell — we can’t afford another four days.

But, unfortunately for us, DeSantis can afford to flood the airwaves with his authoritarian BS.

Every dollar we raise will help us combat misinformation, reach Florida voters, and defeat Ron DeSantis. If you’re sick of DeSantis’ lies, click here to chip in $10 today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-may-2022?refcode=508adbuy]

Thanks!
— Team Nikki

subject: It's Time To Join The Movement!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Jeff Warner For Congress
body:
Be Part Of A GREAT Team! | | | |
---
|
# **Newsletter-May 8 Vol. 2, #11**
---
| | |
##
8 May 22

**Happy Mother's Day to all of our GREAT moms. Thank you for your selfless sacrifice!**

**Only 10 Weeks Until The July 19 Primary.**
Although Jeff has two primary competitors, they are not campaigning or fundraising, yet we will not take anything for granted and we are actively and tirelessly campaigning...And **We Need Your Help!** The options are easy!

**Another In Person Meet & Greet**
The campaign recently covered over 1850 homes reaching Primary Voters in Beltsville, Burtonsville & Laurel.
Another Meet & Greet is scheduled for THIS, Thursday, May 12, 7-8p at IHOP-Greenbelt
7405 Greenbelt Rd., Greenbelt, 20770
This is a great opportunity to learn more about our winning strategy and how to get involved.
Invite others to attend (especially if you've attended a Meet & Greet), to meet and hear from Jeff!

**Door Hangers (NOT Door Knocking)**
THIS Saturday, May 14, you're encouraged to place door hangers at the homes of strategic voters for Jeff Warner For Congress.
10a-Noon
We'll meet promptly at Greenbelt Elementary School
66 Ridge Road, Greenbelt, 20770

**Sign Waving - One Power Hour**
THIS, Saturday, May 14, you're invited to sign wave for one power hour with the Jeff Warner For Congress campaign.
12:30-1:30p
Route 1 & Cherry Hill Road in College Park
You should be able to park in the large parking lot near Starbucks & Shoppers
4750 Cherry Hill Rd, College Park, 20740
Please park as far as possible from the buildings so we don't limit customer access.
Let's meet at the intersection of Route 1 & Cherry Hill Rd.
You should see Jeff there.

If you have a sign, please bring it. If you have a sign and are not planning on sign waving or posting, please let us know so we can put it to use and stretch our limited funds. Consider dressing layers and bring your BIG smile.
.
**Phone Calling**
A BIG THANK YOU, to everyone who is calling! We're making GREAT progress.

Please keep in mind, around 2% of calls, involve speaking with voters. The goal is to introduce the campaign through a pre-recorded message from Jeff Warner, their next Congressman, to the voter's voicemail.

You can make an impact no matter where you live in the nation. Please email the campaign at info@JeffWarnerForCongress.com if you’re in interested in getting trained. It's easy.

**Important Details:**
Phone calls are audio only, no video.
A sample script is provided.
The system is all online. Anyone in the USA can assist.
Serve from home (or anyplace you'd like). There is no call center.
Your phone and phone number are not used and are therefore protected.
You choose how much you'd like to call.

**Social Media**
The campaign is taking steps to build Jeff Warner's social media presence.
You can find Jeff under RepJeffWarner on Facebook (https://www.facebook.com/RepJeffWarner) & Twitter (@RepJeff Warner).
Be sure to like, share, subscribe, follow, etc. to help us grow his following.

Thank You for your support. The campaign continues to make and break records. Come and be a part of this amazing team. Imagine how good it will be to say you were part of this team in November as we celebrate our historic victory!

[**Donate Here**](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e2b757c427e67a891eab3e1b8&id=cb5ba508c1&e=12a37459a2)

Remember, Jeff Warner is standing with you and for you. Enough is Enough! Together, "We The People" can make a real difference. Now is our time to act. THERE IS HOPE!

Standing with you,

Jeff
---

---
|

**Our mailing address is:**
P.O. Box 634 Greenbelt, MD 20768

[info@jeffwarnerforcongress.com](mailto: info@jeffwarnerforcongress.com)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/profile?u=e2b757c427e67a891eab3e1b8&id=e50c016c4c&e=12a37459a2&c=be8333bb9c) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=e2b757c427e67a891eab3e1b8&id=e50c016c4c&e=12a37459a2&c=be8333bb9c).

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: [Sign the card] Thank the NM Legislature for protecting reproductive rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
Please add your name next to mine: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45079800/344375067/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_TAN_PET_AC_20220508_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTJmNmYzNi0yNWNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=52PmTTfp-coIxOW7rKLZnB_X5sor2eBXv819NthGew4=&emci=115ffff1-81cd-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=912f6f36-25cf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=252045)
---
Let’s be clear, folks: Your access to an abortion shouldn’t depend on your ZIP code or the amount of money you have in your bank account. And the same goes for contraception. That’s just one of the many reasons why the Supreme Court’s looming decision to potentially overturn _Roe v. Wade_ is so awful. But I am grateful that New Mexico is a pro-choice state. We will proudly be a haven for those seeking abortions from nearby restrictive states like Texas and Arizona. This didn’t happen overnight. Over the last few years, I've been proud to organize alongside reproductive rights advocates to help elect pro-choice Democrats to the New Mexico legislature and get an archaic abortion law off the books. Last year, the legislature finally repealed the state’s outdated abortion ban and passed the _Respect New Mexico Women and Families Act_ to keep reproductive healthcare decisions in the hands of women and their doctors. **Thanks to Democrats in the New Mexico legislature, abortion will remain legal in New Mexico even if _Roe_ is overturned.** [**Will you join me in thanking our pro-choice, Democratic New Mexico Legislature for proactively repealing the state abortion ban and protecting the right to choose? You can sign the thank you card here:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45079801/344375068/-2133766789?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_TAN_PET_AC_20220508_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTJmNmYzNi0yNWNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=52PmTTfp-coIxOW7rKLZnB_X5sor2eBXv819NthGew4=&emci=115ffff1-81cd-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=912f6f36-25cf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=252045) | [SIGN THE CARD](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45079802/344375069/-2133766789?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_TAN_PET_AC_20220508_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTJmNmYzNi0yNWNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=52PmTTfp-coIxOW7rKLZnB_X5sor2eBXv819NthGew4=&emci=115ffff1-81cd-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=912f6f36-25cf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=252045)
---
Thank you,
Martin
| Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate

Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. subject: Under attack on Mother's Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Lawson for Congress]( "Paid for and authorized by Lawson for Congress")
body:
We should be celebrating the hard work and dedication of the mothers.Unfortunately, women and girls everywhere are under attack ... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/d2bb03503752/under-attack-on-mothers-day?e=fc83fb200d)
---
| |
---
|
---
| [Donate](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=8e839b1ade&e=fc83fb200d "Donate")
---
|
Dear ,

This Mother's Day, we should be celebrating the hard work and dedication of the mothers who do so much for their families.

Unfortunately, women and girls everywhere are under attack by the radical left's attempts to do away with biological gender.

On a day when we should be celebrating, it seems like we are on the frontlines of a battle to save mothers and daughters. Men in women's sports, boys in girls bathrooms, and a Mother's Day that was defined by [pro-abortion protestors outside churches](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=472842432d&e=fc83fb200d) and [attacks on pregnancy clinics](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=7519a0e0fa&e=fc83fb200d) all demonstrate that we are under attack.

There is no better time than this Mother's Day to stand up and push back against these attacks.

That's why I am proud to have signed the [Women's Bill of Rights](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=d23f46a90f&e=fc83fb200d) \- a commitment to define the word "woman" on a biological basis and protect women's spaces from the left's dangerous agenda.

In Congress, I will always protect and honor our mothers and daughters in every context. I'll put an end to men encroaching in women's arenas and stop the radical pro-abortion left from targeting us.

We're all ready to celebrate Mother's Day again without these concerns - but I need your help to make that a reality.

I'm running for Congress to stop the attacks of the radical left. [Can I count on you to chip in just $100, $50, $25, or even just $10 to help me put protect mothers and girls from these dangerous attacks perpetrated by the left?](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=2635e06ae9&e=fc83fb200d)

---
| [Contribute $10](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=6f00a43a8a&e=fc83fb200d "Contribute $10")
---
| [Contribute $25](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=05718463a6&e=fc83fb200d "Contribute $25")
---
| [Contribute $50](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=1a56d4ad21&e=fc83fb200d "Contribute $50")
---
| [Contribute $100](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=3029fce653&e=fc83fb200d "Contribute $100")
---
| [Contribute any amount](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=8b380b690f&e=fc83fb200d "Contribute any amount")
---
|
I'm counting on you to help me protect mothers and celebrate Mother's Day next year without having to worry about the left's widespread attacks.

Thank you for standing with me, and I look forward to working together to save our country.

Warm regards,

Jeanine Lawson
Candidate for Virginia's 10th Congressional District
---

|
---

subject: How we’ll fight for reproductive freedom in Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
We have to get really serious about political power.
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/10849?t=6&akid=2186%2E878179%2Eh4WaZ0) We got some tough news last Monday night when we learned that the Supreme Court is readying to overturn _Roe v. Wade._

Since Texas has a “trigger ban” in place, this decision will completely ban abortion in our state, without exception for rape or incest. But we have an opportunity to channel our frustration and anger into action, and ultimately into victory. We must do so because winning political power is the only way to meet this challenge — the only way to overcome this crisis.

As governor, I will do everything in my power to guarantee that women have control over their own bodies, their own health care, their own futures. But, in order to win, I need your support to defeat Greg Abbott in November. [**Will you split a contribution between Voter Protection Project and this campaign to help me defeat Greg Abbott in November so I can fight to protect the right to abortion care in Texas?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/10850?t=7&akid=2186%2E878179%2Eh4WaZ0) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Beto O’Rourke and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $5 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/10851?t=8&akid=2186%2E878179%2Eh4WaZ0)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/10852?t=9&akid=2186%2E878179%2Eh4WaZ0)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/10853?t=10&akid=2186%2E878179%2Eh4WaZ0)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/10854?t=11&akid=2186%2E878179%2Eh4WaZ0)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/10849?t=12&akid=2186%2E878179%2Eh4WaZ0)
These extreme attacks on abortion have never been about life. If it were about life, then the current Texas governor wouldn’t allow so many kids to die in the foster care system in Texas — the worst run foster care program in the United States. This is about control. And this is about power.

Our side — the side of the people who believe in democracy, the constitution, and the rights of our fellow Americans — has to get serious about political power. It’s on us, the people of Texas. We must do everything in our power to organize, win, and protect reproductive health care.

I will fight for every person’s freedom to control their own health care, their own body, their own future. Friend, I need you in this fight with me to protect reproductive rights in Texas.
[**Please, split a $5 contribution between Voter Protection Project and our campaign and help me defeat an extremist governor who is actively tearing away people’s reproductive freedom.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/10850?t=13&akid=2186%2E878179%2Eh4WaZ0)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Beto O’Rourke and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $5 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/10851?t=14&akid=2186%2E878179%2Eh4WaZ0)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/10852?t=15&akid=2186%2E878179%2Eh4WaZ0)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/10853?t=16&akid=2186%2E878179%2Eh4WaZ0)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/10854?t=17&akid=2186%2E878179%2Eh4WaZ0)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/10849?t=18&akid=2186%2E878179%2Eh4WaZ0)
With your support, I know that we can win this race.

Thank you,
Beto
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=2186%2E878179%2Eh4WaZ0). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=2186%2E878179%2Eh4WaZ0).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=2186%2E878179%2Eh4WaZ0) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=19&akid=2186%2E878179%2Eh4WaZ0). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=2186%2E878179%2Eh4WaZ0)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=2186%2E878179%2Eh4WaZ0)
