subject: Masters: The Rundown 5/8
body:
Update from the Masters campaign trail
| | | | | Blake Masters for Senate | May 8, 2022
---
|
---
| The Rundown
---
| Welcome to The Rundown! Here's your monthly update from Blake Masters' campaign & a roundup of our national media coverage.
Counting down: We're exactly six months out from the General Election.
---
| | [Visit our Website](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kqV4RHWS3JSKz6i4X-r_3f-HOE8FsNaI1KtYX-CxDNjy5qXDQAPWoGiUxSzHvi2e_TFf6PX4dYzUalsORhNFDFnIPnUEISrdIIc8muVzH13gr61juSBEhAodlJnMTY_4P87jQmqH2EhSm6c8QUcFuw==&c=udcrcihSEL0SicrxJH6uFUG0smK8eLleeLvKD8ui4XXNuLcUqkZGvA==&ch=LRSaScqkaUqvCzCIoQ5XExqXM4HBF51Agu0awrlAVGC--dH9dYBiJg==)

| |
---
| From the Trail
---
Blake's campaign is on fire! It was a busy month with two endorsements, multiple debates, and dozens of events and media interviews. Blake continues to build momentum, as we race toward the August 2 primary.

| Endorsements
Senator Josh Hawley endorsed Blake for Senate
In a [statement](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kqV4RHWS3JSKz6i4X-r_3f-HOE8FsNaI1KtYX-CxDNjy5qXDQAPWoJKqrC86Z--rTI9U_ezYmvnPkeQJ8RlaN2DaoxfUC0i63_dBp-BD6DO0w57VtuLzVl8zwrBYGjOIAJVA7OQQ-qrXMiIH8j7gZT9HyMvsDRl6E17Su4MyIkw83Q5BzHzbIip5QfMuvhcDTXz_jWBg_HfIKxvgAlWRLCg1OVXuTYgXUC6t59haF56v6nJZmtX5aA==&c=udcrcihSEL0SicrxJH6uFUG0smK8eLleeLvKD8ui4XXNuLcUqkZGvA==&ch=LRSaScqkaUqvCzCIoQ5XExqXM4HBF51Agu0awrlAVGC--dH9dYBiJg==), Sen. Hawley praised Blake as a fighter and as a new leader who will fight for this country. Hawley's statement: "Blake Masters is serious about putting America First. He understands the threats our country faces -- from the Chinese Communist Party to the corrupt Big Tech monopolies to the political elite determined to take apart our way of life. We need new leaders who will fight for this country. That's why I endorse Blake Masters, and I look forward to working alongside him in the Senate."
Congresswoman Marjorie Taylor Greene endorses Blake for Senate
The Georgia Congresswoman released a short [statement](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kqV4RHWS3JSKz6i4X-r_3f-HOE8FsNaI1KtYX-CxDNjy5qXDQAPWoJKqrC86Z--r_he68pqin4Xb7nER_rmCz_o6ys7kc2QtwJm4kXqCtFNXf82M7VmJXjNx-LE7JkmwO5IJTFzIqQxMhgBMMUPm_DrT-Z4aUuSq4jGrjjJcHUZdPTjWLZdeUUqsxDQLw1UGYZHqVGmPMjr5cB30rZ826egXRYdLq_KieI_xL9bbeTBcER0DqfIzgw==&c=udcrcihSEL0SicrxJH6uFUG0smK8eLleeLvKD8ui4XXNuLcUqkZGvA==&ch=LRSaScqkaUqvCzCIoQ5XExqXM4HBF51Agu0awrlAVGC--dH9dYBiJg==): "Blake Masters is the guy we need to represent Arizona in the U.S. Senate. He is America First, he's smart, and he's fearless and loves God and his family."
---
| |
---
| New Video: Our government has given up
---
Traveling through Pinal County last week, Blake came across a Bureau of Land Management sign that read, "Smuggling and Illegal Immigration May Be Encountered in this Area." He put out a quick video, arguing, "This says the government gave up ... this sign should be warning me about rattlesnakes, not about criminal narcoterrorist organizations."

| Major Media: Highlights
On [The Ingraham Angle](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kqV4RHWS3JSKz6i4X-r_3f-HOE8FsNaI1KtYX-CxDNjy5qXDQAPWoJKqrC86Z--rRLhoQoJmEGLFRzuOJ3eIqugVrbYh_MXvbERkJzrM_6QlRkjQmHQkOm05MLIsOtGMdzLJovnQ-vemfshlYo-J6Gn1esQlIUgBh_sdtZdJzR1s9uZokkR7DQ==&c=udcrcihSEL0SicrxJH6uFUG0smK8eLleeLvKD8ui4XXNuLcUqkZGvA==&ch=LRSaScqkaUqvCzCIoQ5XExqXM4HBF51Agu0awrlAVGC--dH9dYBiJg==), Blake and Laura talked about the future of America First, abortion, JD's win in Ohio, and President Trump's effects on elections.
Blake went on [Bannon's War Room](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kqV4RHWS3JSKz6i4X-r_3f-HOE8FsNaI1KtYX-CxDNjy5qXDQAPWoJKqrC86Z--rmpodoRj3QqAxiybHmG3kdb4GX6DFlpbZcYOOUEyZZL2TSAPuyw9DbcllFtfxzvTXqwT_iyeYlh-0_WsC_7vGAA==&c=udcrcihSEL0SicrxJH6uFUG0smK8eLleeLvKD8ui4XXNuLcUqkZGvA==&ch=LRSaScqkaUqvCzCIoQ5XExqXM4HBF51Agu0awrlAVGC--dH9dYBiJg==) to discuss AG Mark Brnovich, who refused to debate Blake on election integrity.
Blake joined [Rob Schmitt Tonight](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kqV4RHWS3JSKz6i4X-r_3f-HOE8FsNaI1KtYX-CxDNjy5qXDQAPWoJKqrC86Z--rMl0rQbTdp8VWX3EaR1NjRdKhLSbGoQOyYCanSMJV3609X8ED_SmDPFG8e8JfmnSgZM9q18Xg4E6AZUFx7n-gEA==&c=udcrcihSEL0SicrxJH6uFUG0smK8eLleeLvKD8ui4XXNuLcUqkZGvA==&ch=LRSaScqkaUqvCzCIoQ5XExqXM4HBF51Agu0awrlAVGC--dH9dYBiJg==) to discuss Elon's successful bid for Twitter and the platform's future.
[Lou Dobbs](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kqV4RHWS3JSKz6i4X-r_3f-HOE8FsNaI1KtYX-CxDNjy5qXDQAPWoJKqrC86Z--rmfMtmmIzyfIkuMPuDO4LdnuC7SWbEEMMSME3AjnRGJwqnEuIix05becfJQgM8Iu_1_Pw9LNHrIg5A0BRF2zeEQ==&c=udcrcihSEL0SicrxJH6uFUG0smK8eLleeLvKD8ui4XXNuLcUqkZGvA==&ch=LRSaScqkaUqvCzCIoQ5XExqXM4HBF51Agu0awrlAVGC--dH9dYBiJg==) and Blake discussed the America First agenda, election integrity, Elon Musk, and gun rights on Real America's Voice.
Blake spoke about the rise in violence against law enforcement across the country on One America News' [Tipping Point](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kqV4RHWS3JSKz6i4X-r_3f-HOE8FsNaI1KtYX-CxDNjy5qXDQAPWoJKqrC86Z--rf0d-TsrXmIBNFXLvaACwzGgQqkM0imzQ4Ot16EgePVAfGaJpWB819Chfu9m0uuVWqqTg2a2gREP_ToMHedeScA==&c=udcrcihSEL0SicrxJH6uFUG0smK8eLleeLvKD8ui4XXNuLcUqkZGvA==&ch=LRSaScqkaUqvCzCIoQ5XExqXM4HBF51Agu0awrlAVGC--dH9dYBiJg==).
On [Sunday Morning Futures](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kqV4RHWS3JSKz6i4X-r_3f-HOE8FsNaI1KtYX-CxDNjy5qXDQAPWoJKqrC86Z--r2K_yvOwbluUNacSxZfIC92IQ34sXD0xfXm2jtJGvF6ars_wnsm77U0F7D_w1tgFT3gjPXwuJn3LQQZDckOknEQ==&c=udcrcihSEL0SicrxJH6uFUG0smK8eLleeLvKD8ui4XXNuLcUqkZGvA==&ch=LRSaScqkaUqvCzCIoQ5XExqXM4HBF51Agu0awrlAVGC--dH9dYBiJg==), Blake and Maria Bartiromo discussed the border crisis and Senator Mark Kelly's disastrous legacy. Recent Headlines
In a [Politico story](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kqV4RHWS3JSKz6i4X-r_3f-HOE8FsNaI1KtYX-CxDNjy5qXDQAPWoJKqrC86Z--rTI9U_ezYmvnPkeQJ8RlaN2DaoxfUC0i63_dBp-BD6DO0w57VtuLzVl8zwrBYGjOIAJVA7OQQ-qrXMiIH8j7gZT9HyMvsDRl6E17Su4MyIkw83Q5BzHzbIip5QfMuvhcDTXz_jWBg_HfIKxvgAlWRLCg1OVXuTYgXUC6t59haF56v6nJZmtX5aA==&c=udcrcihSEL0SicrxJH6uFUG0smK8eLleeLvKD8ui4XXNuLcUqkZGvA==&ch=LRSaScqkaUqvCzCIoQ5XExqXM4HBF51Agu0awrlAVGC--dH9dYBiJg==), Senator Hawley's endorsement of Blake was reported on. Hawley called Blake a fighter willing to take on the political elite of Washington.
A [RealClearPolitics](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kqV4RHWS3JSKz6i4X-r_3f-HOE8FsNaI1KtYX-CxDNjy5qXDQAPWoJKqrC86Z--r0kWWQOUhj2-N6Dz-ppCJ_A8K9MiEiK36Ta1k_3hZJK-jKwkzgZx8j2X6qkEqdK5zxOmSmMMQf8RnDZmSErFiOCzfMVeNbmnSp9QvvZGq-00yPAvzjc1ujE13-mPSQMeGZUQ8yYdFBg7MEFpax8fY5ee59fenptGG7UsPwrrwEJ7zvgKfxIbcJaPE1amoPUOdqSNu_mLpeqZRaDP_EV_DmCpugDqrN6pv&c=udcrcihSEL0SicrxJH6uFUG0smK8eLleeLvKD8ui4XXNuLcUqkZGvA==&ch=LRSaScqkaUqvCzCIoQ5XExqXM4HBF51Agu0awrlAVGC--dH9dYBiJg==) article covered Blake's response to Biden banning ghost guns. Blake posted a photo of his ghost gun and slammed the new rule as unconstitutional.
Blake argued Biden and Mark Kelly are in part to blame for the border crisis, thanks to their inaction and the White House's decision to repeal Title 42 in a [Breitbart piece](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kqV4RHWS3JSKz6i4X-r_3f-HOE8FsNaI1KtYX-CxDNjy5qXDQAPWoJKqrC86Z--r05hgr1xD1he81W0d3wZyU0Wg7bJ0Y1azu5RwVlGmUzYUlU1Vx8FHyvDBYysDCTub0aeIK8KXc5NF49Niis5052tRb6Eos9UI4UEefyYbkclHbIDjEeK7OlJXDdLqUIO0TUoPmOtBAY6km9HPQOlcHH3hQwYkHeuwMtfaO63DGraFAtmE84SxU55XD8VZSR6M-KJsds_PA_v1wUHQNkYwMCRtnKA0aVjPYsRVDIa5QMZh_Gv7qt71Xq67wfdb-pfWRan6icc7MHY=&c=udcrcihSEL0SicrxJH6uFUG0smK8eLleeLvKD8ui4XXNuLcUqkZGvA==&ch=LRSaScqkaUqvCzCIoQ5XExqXM4HBF51Agu0awrlAVGC--dH9dYBiJg==).
Blake challenged Attorney General Brnovich to a debate. When Brnovich refused to show up, the event became an election integrity rally. President Trump even called in to voice his support! The event was covered in the [Arizona Republic](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kqV4RHWS3JSKz6i4X-r_3f-HOE8FsNaI1KtYX-CxDNjy5qXDQAPWoJKqrC86Z--rnmIG-jiMCOInR1F3-BGR_ZFb9Rvz73fXLEOPogPkMoMonwvsrdHOfEd8gmEQDt_75SM78RlXbX5TCPniwtzTcMrzI03v4DMm4oquC1ZvgQu7UEL7xtORLpOzLnEN9xjTIhnaIwcVTV0zYXV3rauX8rCY7fP31Zgl3nEwzJNFXLFXTwiT1TXK2UkauHuwKNe-R0gDiuNH7j-Mv-GE5X4KO0e5XKuIApNbTR_CO8xcXqi48_GD1JRzwWhNlQd98X4Z&c=udcrcihSEL0SicrxJH6uFUG0smK8eLleeLvKD8ui4XXNuLcUqkZGvA==&ch=LRSaScqkaUqvCzCIoQ5XExqXM4HBF51Agu0awrlAVGC--dH9dYBiJg==).

name: Councilman JB Smiley, Jr.
subject: Happy Mother's Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Committee to Elect JB Smiley
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/committee-to-elect-jb-smiley-jr-1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/committee-to-elect-jb-smiley-jr-1]
Hi Friend,
Happy Mother's Day!
Today, I was able to tell my mother how blessed I am to have her in my life. Watching her love my father through his illness will be forever engraved in my heart as my earthy example of unconditional love.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92850/images/image0%20%282%29_2.jpeg]
I hope you were able to either spend time with the mothers in your life and/or reflect on the impact and good memories of your loved ones who have gone on. Mother's Day will always be a special day in my life and I hope you cherish this day as well. Again, Happy Mother's Day to every single mother. I wish you nothing but the best.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/committee-to-elect-jb-smiley-jr-1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/committee-to-elect-jb-smiley-jr-1]
Peace and Blessings,
JB Smiley, Jr.
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/committee-to-elect-jb-smiley-jr-1]
https://www.facebook.com/votejbsmiley [https://www.facebook.com/votejbsmiley] https://twitter.com/jbsmileyjr [https://twitter.com/jbsmileyjr] https://instagram.com/jbsmileyjr [https://instagram.com/jbsmileyjr] https://www.linkedin.com/in/jbsmileyjr/ [https://www.linkedin.com/in/jbsmileyjr/]
Democrat JB Smiley, Jr. is a native Memphian, lawyer, author, and member of the Memphis City Council running to build a Tennessee we can all be proud of. It's going to take all us of working together to defeat Bill Lee and elect JB Smiley. Jr.
Paid for by the Committee to Elect JB Smiley. Julian Bolton, Treasurer
Committee to Elect JB Smiley
901 Mississippi Blvd
Memphis, TN 38126
United States
JB believes that when we lock arms, put our differences aside, rally around common beliefs, and carry a unified message to every corridor and community, from the rural roads less traveled to the urban centers, we can build a Tennessee to be proud of, together. Will you make a donation to elect JB Smiley, Jr. as Tennessee's next governor? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/committee-to-elect-jb-smiley-jr-1]

clean_body: | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. | | | America is facing an unprecedented attack on Roe v. Wade. As a physician, I know what’s at stake. I am one of only three Democratic Physicians in Congress. I’ve seen first hand how important it is for patients to be able to access safe and legal abortion. I've fought my entire career to ensure patients have access to the health & reproductive care they need. That’s why the far-right is plotting to defeat me. | | | Caring for patients is what I’m called to do as a doctor. I took an oath to do no harm. But the Supreme Court wants to harm patients seeking an abortion. They want to CRIMINALIZE a standard, safe medical procedure. We must do everything we can to stop them and protect Roe. I know I’ve stressed how unique my seat is in Congress as one of the few Physicians. I stand ready to defend women’s right to choose and to ensure everyone can have a say in decisions that impact their bodies, lives, health, and futures. | | | | | | Together, \-- Dr. Raul Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. name: Herschel Walker
subject: Attacked for being a Black conservative
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
The simple truth is that the people attacking me know I pose a threat to the Democrat Party’s hold over Black voters. |
---

Fellow American,

**I'm sad to be writing to you - _yet again_ - about racist attacks against our campaign for U.S. Senate. **

First, a liberal commentator began his barrage of attacks against me by writing in _The Nation_ :

| _**"Herschel Walker's candidacy is a white insult to Black people."**_
---

Then he went on MSNBC to say:

_**"I make a hard distinction between Black conservatives and these tokens" - referring to Senator Tim Scott (R-SC) and me - "who are out here right now, shucking and jiving for their white handlers."**_
---

Now, _The Washington Post_ has published new attacks from other detractors:

_**"Walker has positioned himself into being a useful fool for those who don't have the best interests of Black people or this democracy at heart."**_
---

and

_**"[Herschel Walker's] irrelevant to the Black community, and we should treat him as such."**_
---

**[The fact of the matter is this: the racist attacks are not going to stop anytime soon.](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=108640ecc85b4dbf8f137f888632753c&_e=3ByHeYDLa5iqepJZ3VX7scF0E4qIX18UFxUDSevONwplQ95b6ty4fJhb-MSl8dY8PK4xz9iAMI41ZEPP6UQNrdMKXfM5KK9KagXffQqJ1wW387k3Fgtc6UOjIVfLl-uhJBgqH5c_CruAj4XbnYLNz2BiZi1ab-zCBwZ98Iwm8C_VkqnzYx_mgumr7E4ZUNpTR1qz0gRb335ro3k-7XDxk4SAx7mLzA8WBQ5bTtVyjD23xyme6zBumgOLriD-TLrACZwJhlliqKvvCT27ApjGWRkNKcn8Oftpw0p4TZJ4I_W0aT906pRrsaDkKKKXJ6trWyYxM7ASY5VpAbqGHKrJ7AkT6_lRbNB81nMR0ZJn4xGSKzL3TYoPeceGdY3iHMdB-XJ21CY7auYRDNP_UnQnXqfavCDIDk5L8Hy-Bitx7pTseXqbcRUxE-cxw-X4vANw9T6ZUp0Z61_HtXGNZp9Nl0pXu-e5Jp76JILkjGxGBT1UXq88PHEzpZ_p3UGtAWK0)** We need your help to fight back against them. We need to show the voters in Georgia how low some folks are willing to go to defame me and poison my image ahead of November's election.

If you reject the LIE that Black and Brown Americans are required to be Democrats, as some mistakenly believe, **[would you chip in $4, $10 or maybe even $25 right now to help our campaign set the record straight?](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=108640ecc85b4dbf8f137f888632753c&_e=3ByHeYDLa5iqepJZ3VX7scF0E4qIX18UFxUDSevONwplQ95b6ty4fJhb-MSl8dY8PK4xz9iAMI41ZEPP6UQNrdMKXfM5KK9KagXffQqJ1wW387k3Fgtc6UOjIVfLl-uhJBgqH5c_CruAj4XbnYLNz2BiZi1ab-zCBwZ98Iwm8C_VkqnzYx_mgumr7E4ZUNpTR1qz0gRb335ro3k-7XDxk4SAx7mLzA8WBQ5bTtVyjD23xyme6zBumgOLriD-TLrACZwJhlliqKvvCT27ApjGWTGvyWLHClF-Z08ryXi88YUjSBKAXn-R3IC-o-TKoPRGzOu3xaY9ph8RSJAD47h9NuHhAzLOni5Q_yGQMUiNNb_v2M39hnY_xFtKW8XwtnpUutkp7ZtYr3saY18oeZwvp9LhGCyfYRhbZZwAh5VFrK_Naox6KvuJ8VC5pFZkg-GOwDRnLG5A0Lvb2ffaDvIvB581an-gqJa02eM8-GLYe_yMwOitIPjB7IfmamczkJs9)**

President Biden believes this lie. You'll recall that he told a Black radio host in 2020 that, "If you have a problem figuring out whether you're for me or Trump, then you ain't Black."

**I categorically reject that mindset. It's garbage.**

_**Nobody tells me what to think or how to vote. I study the issues and make up my own mind informed by my faith and values.**_

The simple truth is that the people making these racist attacks against me believe I pose a threat to the Democrat Party's hold over Black voters. They're attacking because they're scared.

**[Please help our campaign fight back against these racist attacks by chipping in whatever you can right now.](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=108640ecc85b4dbf8f137f888632753c&_e=3ByHeYDLa5iqepJZ3VX7scF0E4qIX18UFxUDSevONwplQ95b6ty4fJhb-MSl8dY8PK4xz9iAMI41ZEPP6UQNrdMKXfM5KK9KagXffQqJ1wW387k3Fgtc6UOjIVfLl-uhJBgqH5c_CruAj4XbnYLNz2BiZi1ab-zCBwZ98Iwm8C_VkqnzYx_mgumr7E4ZUNpTR1qz0gRb335ro3k-7XDxk4SAx7mLzA8WBQ5bTtVyjD23xyme6zBumgOLriD-TLrACZwJhlliqKvvCT27ApjGWRpRepzECyvxtdw3ndq2C37Absq-4_Ei75EyDmbt5m66V3pDM3BkNFYxZJz_KuFt81vEXxMEovYmRoX_uSWW3Ii2VRNN2GpdN622HK9szgyuy_0Cb7Ml-ONPuyrWrgI_bKiSOKM20VwDJly-KdqdCU10EDyULIHGEDaQ5r882PsFH-fQmrVjwWmggvTeXjBuA3BVlDHxZZym2cd_MPaBhR5UicwHSBEBWnSfGKta2bh1)**

Thank you for helping us defeat these lies and win this critical Senate race.

Respectfully,

Then he went on MSNBC to say: "I make a hard distinction between Black conservatives and these tokens" - referring to Senator Tim Scott (R-SC) and me - "who are out here right now, shucking and jiving for their white handlers." Now, The Washington Post has published new attacks from other detractors: "Walker has positioned himself into being a useful fool for those who don't have the best interests of Black people or this democracy at heart." and "[Herschel Walker's] irrelevant to the Black community, and we should treat him as such." We need your help to fight back against them. We need to show the voters in Georgia how low some folks are willing to go to defame me and poison my image ahead of November's election. If you reject the LIE that Black and Brown Americans are required to be Democrats, as some mistakenly believe, President Biden believes this lie. You'll recall that he told a Black radio host in 2020 that, "If you have a problem figuring out whether you're for me or Trump, then you ain't Black." I categorically reject that mindset. It's garbage. Nobody tells me what to think or how to vote. I study the issues and make up my own mind informed by my faith and values. The simple truth is that the people making these racist attacks against me believe I pose a threat to the Democrat Party's hold over Black voters. They're attacking because they're scared. Thank you for helping us defeat these lies and win this critical Senate race. Respectfully, Herschel Walker PROUD AMERICAN | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: Beto for Texas
subject: Can we count on you with six months to go?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
Six months to organize. Six months to turn out the vote. Six months to win.
#
We have six months left to organize in all 254 counties.
Six months left to turn out millions of new and undecided voters.
Six months left to decide the future of Texas.
[**We have so much to accomplish between now and Election Day. Will you make your first $3 contribution to power Beto's campaign for Texas governor over the final six months of this election fight?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-20220508-2?refcode=ema20220508-188458&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&refcode2=188458_444211_rKzxSC&akid=188458%2E444211%2ErKzxSC)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-20220508-2?refcode=ema20220508-188458&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&refcode2=188458_444211_rKzxSC&akid=188458%2E444211%2ErKzxSC)**
We’re facing a lot of obstacles. The sheer size of Texas. Voter suppression. Greg Abbott’s plan to spend over $100,000,000 attacking Beto.
But if anyone can make history and defeat a corporate-backed incumbent like Greg Abbott, **it’s all of us.**
Thanks to our 67,000+ volunteers and 180,000+ grassroots donors, we’re building the biggest organizing operation that Texas has ever seen — one capable of reaching the millions of voters we need to win.
Beto is right in the thick of the work. He’s on the road constantly, listening, learning, and sharing his unifying vision for Texas.
And right now, we’re seeing a huge mobilization around our campaign as Beto brings Texans together to fight for a woman’s right to control her own body and future.
A recent poll had Beto and Abbott neck and neck, within the margin of error. **We have what it takes to win in November.**
Make no mistake — grassroots supporters like you will be the reason we defeat Abbott. A donation today is one of the best investments you can make in our fight to win in Texas, because it will allow us to build over time and reach our campaign’s full potential in the crucial days and weeks right before Election Day.
[**Anything you can give today will go directly toward scaling our organizing across Texas, electing Beto, and defeating Abbott once and for all. We hope you’ll pitch in today if you can.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-20220508-2?refcode=ema20220508-188458&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=188458_444211_rKzxSC&akid=188458%2E444211%2ErKzxSC)
Thank you in advance for your support,
Beto for Texas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20220508-188458-footer&t=22&refcode2=188458_444211_rKzxSC&akid=188458%2E444211%2ErKzxSC)**
---
Email us: info@betofortexas.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/bft-receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.betoorourke.com/sign/bft-personal-info/?t=23&akid=188458%2E444211%2ErKzxSC)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=188458%2E444211%2ErKzxSC)

name: Tim Ryan
subject: I’m facing off against JD Vance
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
#

Folks, it's official -- I’ll be facing millionaire right-wing extremist JD Vance in November.
Bring it on. But before I go any further, I need your immediate help.
[**My team has set a 20,000 General Election Founding Donor goal. Will you pitch in to my campaign and Cheri Beasley’s campaign in North Carolina to help us kick off the general election in the strongest position possible? We’ll need dedicated folks like you in our corner if we want to flip these seats blue and expand the majority.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-ryan-split?refcode=em220508-2-t1&refcode2=845.357359.pCkIWK&t=1&akid=845%2E357359%2EpCkIWK)
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-ryan-split?refcode=em220508-2-t1&refcode2=845.357359.pCkIWK&t=2&akid=845%2E357359%2EpCkIWK)**
You’d be hard-pressed to find a candidate more out-of-touch with hardworking Ohioans than JD Vance. He’s endorsed by Donald Trump and has the backing of Silicon Valley billionaire Peter Thiel’s $13.5 million super PAC.
But even with all of that on his side -- I have a one-point lead on him in the polls, proving we have the momentum to flip Ohio blue. **But I’m going to need a whole lot of help because the stakes of our battleground race just got a lot higher.**
Now that the Supreme Court vote to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ has been leaked, we can’t afford to let JD anywhere near the Senate. He called pregnancy from rape “inconvenient” and said overturning Roe would be a “victory.”
**JD has the full backing of the entire Republican Party on his side and they’ve committed to spending hundreds of millions to try to take back Senate control.**
[**I’m ready to take on JD Vance, but I’m going to need your help -- can you split a donation to become a Founding Donor of my general election campaign to flip Ohio and Cheri Beasley’s campaign to flip North Carolina?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-ryan-split?refcode=em220508-2-t1&refcode2=845.357359.pCkIWK&t=3&akid=845%2E357359%2EpCkIWK)

body:
Marco Rubio isn't going to fight for everyday Americans
| | |
---
Friend, I was born in a small home in Jacksonville – the youngest of seven children.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45080479/344397601/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3133-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzZmOGM1ZC0zM2NmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j1l5RMtiIUUE5i-UJ9Yc7OumepK4Cds5QNB_K0HZ2eU=)
Mom was a maid, and Dad was a janitor who worked seven days a week. They did everything they could to support our family and instill the meaning of hard work in me.
The work ahead of us – to defeat Marco Rubio and protect our Senate majority – is hard. It's probably the hardest race I've ever fought. But if I have the resources, and do the work, I will win.

**That's why I'm asking:** **[Can you make a grassroots donation to help me win this battleground Senate race, defeat Marco Rubio and expand our Democratic majority in the Senate?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45080480/344397602/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3133-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzZmOGM1ZC0zM2NmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j1l5RMtiIUUE5i-UJ9Yc7OumepK4Cds5QNB_K0HZ2eU=)**

If there's one thing I know for sure, it's that Marco Rubio isn't going to fight for everyday Americans like my parents, or you and me. He's legislating for GOP special interests and a handful of big donors, not Floridians – and he's even trying to silence voters like you by refusing to protect your voting rights.

Just 10,033 votes decided Florida's last Senate race – a margin of less than two-tenths of a percentage point. In close races like these, every dollar we raise, every phone bank we run, every voter we register – _ starting from day one _– will make a huge difference on Election Day.

**We're building momentum – but Election Day is just months away, and I'm still $6,223 short of my midnight fundraising goal with just hours left, and I'm counting on you, friend.**

**[So please, with my grassroots fundraising deadline in just hours, will you rush a contribution of $5 or more to help make up the shortfall? Whatever you can donate will go directly to defeating Marco Rubio and expanding our Democratic Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45080482/344397604/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3133-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzZmOGM1ZC0zM2NmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j1l5RMtiIUUE5i-UJ9Yc7OumepK4Cds5QNB_K0HZ2eU=)**

name: Chris Ramey
subject: Hi, I’m Andrea’s husband
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45079187/344372386/-1943795144?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWJmNzQ4Zi0xZWNmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JaoVDyFQwRx7Fg6_ClE17olbB_xk71Im_VBe5hBmm7o=&emci=f39e0f88-93cd-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=6abf748f-1ecf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=5643047)
---

| | Hi, I'm Chris Ramey, Andrea's husband. First of all, thank you for being part of this enormous effort to elect Andrea to Congress. It means so much to me to see so many friends – old and new – come together as a community to fight for her. **Today is Mother's Day, and I thought I'd share a little bit about Andrea, our family, and why we decided to take on this huge challenge.** Growing up, Andrea's parents didn't have a lot of money, but they worked hard to make a better life for their two daughters. They couldn't afford to send her to college, so Andrea juggled multiple jobs – she was a barista, she painted houses – and it took her _seven years_ to finish college. Seventeen years ago, our daughter Amelia was born, and I watched Andrea transform into a mom. Like her mom before her, Andrea became this powerful champion for her kid, with a deep determination to make the world a better place for her. **_Can I share something personal?_** You've heard a lot about this billionaire spending millions of dollars on TV ads. It's outrageous, of course. But you know what else? I've watched Andrea work late into the night, drive hundreds of miles across Oregon, and spend weekends pouring over research, all in the service of crafting critically important policies taking on climate change, protecting abortion rights, defending workers, and more. So, when some billionaire comes along and tries to elect _his brother's unqualified, inexperienced friend_ to Congress – it feels like a slap in the face to Andrea, and everyone she's worked with to make the world a better place for our daughter and everyone's daughters and sons. On this Mother's Day – just nine days out from Election Day – thank you for standing with Andrea. It means so much to me, to Andrea, and to our family. clean_body: | | | Hi, I'm Chris Ramey, Andrea's husband. First of all, thank you for being part of this enormous effort to elect Andrea to Congress. It means so much to me to see so many friends – old and new – come together as a community to fight for her. Today is Mother's Day, and I thought I'd share a little bit about Andrea, our family, and why we decided to take on this huge challenge. Growing up, Andrea's parents didn't have a lot of money, but they worked hard to make a better life for their two daughters. They couldn't afford to send her to college, so Andrea juggled multiple jobs – she was a barista, she painted houses – and it took her seven years to finish college. Seventeen years ago, our daughter Amelia was born, and I watched Andrea transform into a mom. Like her mom before her, Andrea became this powerful champion for her kid, with a deep determination to make the world a better place for her. Can I share something personal? You've heard a lot about this billionaire spending millions of dollars on TV ads. It's outrageous, of course. But you know what else? I've watched Andrea work late into the night, drive hundreds of miles across Oregon, and spend weekends pouring over research, all in the service of crafting critically important policies taking on climate change, protecting abortion rights, defending workers, and more. So, when some billionaire comes along and tries to elect his brother's unqualified, inexperienced friend to Congress – it feels like a slap in the face to Andrea, and everyone she's worked with to make the world a better place for our daughter and everyone's daughters and sons. On this Mother's Day – just nine days out from Election Day – thank you for standing with Andrea. It means so much to me, to Andrea, and to our family. I know we've asked a lot of you, and we're going to ask more of you in the days to come. But, there's one thing I know: Andrea is an amazing mother, and she's going to be an incredible member of Congress.= Thank you. body:
From the Pine Belt to the Coast, I invite you to keep up with us along the campaign trail. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/bricewiggins/campaign-updates-8984761?e=698f056321)

| [DONATE TO OUR CAMPAIGN](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=c8ef3c73a4&e=698f056321)
---
Happy Mother’s Day! Hello, I’m Brice Wiggins, and I’m running for Congress in the Republican Primary Election on **June 7th** to represent the people of South Mississippi’s 4th Congressional District in Washington D.C.Our campaign to clean up D.C. won’t be easy, but I know how to win a tough fight. I’ve done it on the sports field, I’ve done it in the courtroom, and I’ve done it in the Mississippi legislature. I’m ready for the next fight in the U.S. House of Representatives–and I am ready to show up for Mississippi, in person. You can learn more about me, my record, and my campaign [**HERE**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=223db52a4f&e=698f056321). From the Pine Belt to the Coast, I invite you to keep up with us along the campaign trail. Below are some highlights from this past week.

# Walkin’ with Wiggins
Taking Grassroots campaigning to heart by coming to a neighborhood near you! [**#WalkinWithWiggins**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=e03486600b&e=698f056321) is going door to door from the Pinebelt to the Coast to earn your vote on June 7th.[**WATCH HERE**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=24aa7f4d66&e=698f056321) to see where we’ve been and other highlights from this past week below.

# Campaign Trail Highlights

[](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=2a525aff5b&e=698f056321)
We had a great showing in the audience and on the stage on Tuesday! I can't thank everyone enough. Without you, I wouldn't be here. Positive change for CD-4 is on the horizon - Vote Wiggins on June 7th! [**#TeamWiggins**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=75197d2e36&e=698f056321)

## Happy Teacher Day!
On Tuesday, we recognized Teacher Appreciation Day by thanking teachers we know - posting this: Happy National Teacher Appreciation Day! Be sure to thank the special teachers in your life who have shaped you into the person you are today. In 2022, I helped pass the largest teacher pay raise in Mississippi history. I will continue to take care of our educators while in Congress, as they so graciously take on the responsibility of molding [**our future generations.**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=f483ca421d&e=698f056321)
---
| | | | | |
## Brown Water Banter
I enjoyed sitting down with the guys from [**Brown Water Banter Podcast**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=7975c89eea&e=698f056321) to discuss topics ranging from Star Wars, Medical Marijuana, the Wind Pool, and why I set out to become your next U.S. Congressman. ## National Day of Prayer
As always, on [**#NationalDayofPrayer**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=eb877a5877&e=698f056321) , which was Thursday of this week, we look to the Word for guidance."Just as you received Christ Jesus as Lord, continue to live in him, rooted and built up in him, strengthened in the faith as you were taught, and overflowing with thankfulness.” Colossians 2:6-7

## Final Note...
As a leader, serving others and taking action to create real change that positively impacts the people I am elected to represent is my mission. Mississippi, I’m ready to work for you and with you to build a nation we can once again be proud of.I hope you will consider my passion and strong record of getting things as I ask for your vote and support on June 7.

## Primary Election Voting Information
### The Primary Election is on June 7.
Click [**HERE**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=d6b899766b&e=698f056321) for the Secretary of State Voter Information Guide for Details.
### Are you registered to vote? Find out [HERE](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=65c207e74f&e=698f056321).
If not, no worries. You have until May 9th to register to vote either in person or by mail. Click [**HERE**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=e30abb931e&e=698f056321) to download a voter registration application. If you choose to mail in your voter registration application to the Circuit Clerk’s Office located in the county of your residence, be sure it is postmarked before May 9th (30 days before the election).
### Out of town on June 7th?
IN-PERSON ABSENTEE VOTING - Visit your [**County Circuit Clerk’s Office**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=59dadbf936&e=698f056321) to absentee vote in person from April 23 to June 4.MAIL-IN ABSENTEE VOTING - Contact the Circuit Clerk’s Office located in the county of your residence and request an Official Application for Absentee Elector’s Ballot be mailed to you. The Application and Ballot may be mailed together depending on how close to the election date is when the ballot is requested.*Mail-in absentee ballots must be postmarked on or before Election Day and received on or within five (5) business days of the election, June 14th, for them to count.[**Click HERE for a step-by-step guide for Absentee Voting.**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=7433d41048&e=698f056321)

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Apparently, I’m Trump’s “useful fool”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
The simple truth is that the people attacking me know I pose a threat to the Democrat Party’s hold over Black voters. |
---

Fellow American,

**I'm sad to be writing to you - _yet again_ - about racist attacks against our campaign for U.S. Senate. **

First, a liberal commentator began his barrage of attacks against me by writing in _The Nation_ :

| _**"Herschel Walker's candidacy is a white insult to Black people."**_
---

Then he went on MSNBC to say:

_**"I make a hard distinction between Black conservatives and these tokens" - referring to Senator Tim Scott (R-SC) and me - "who are out here right now, shucking and jiving for their white handlers."**_
---

Now, _The Washington Post_ has published new attacks from other detractors:

_**"Walker has positioned himself into being a useful fool for those who don't have the best interests of Black people or this democracy at heart."**_
---

and

_**"[Herschel Walker's] irrelevant to the Black community, and we should treat him as such."**_
---

**[The fact of the matter is this: the racist attacks are not going to stop anytime soon.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=c839d688a7524c17bbd47420da37c4da&_e=Bua3NIOz1_KlrnkMVxf54dQFWtPkYIj6Xexar75F84_Pwd8HC69IDMZmGAZJvXofbYLSDB-QXNQIljhJyS5QAQkzL7_dPSczVzEnKBpfXBUfjkkB3NwxadZV8UUAMG4bgf2Xw1fgvTt6V7eJId4DDnXq8H5KyJBic_h0S4B1cIOFvx8mwfF3Y_IP2iBYh4qzL5gcgC6w_1A8zaN-fmqE5-ZoOsaxsd6A7bKKr1QcIBYdRK8sKB35Ob4rffOhFX5h0fNZME32XEFc1z-QXm5eGgAZVjGrQGWbTOjSoSzkxgUzHUwiO_J6DxHeE0hfzqy-NRKvAZ-gJ10IjTCU0m2fq2LeUYZXOEPTqjWCAgIqUlRJm7tJi4TNoo40fxyRraVdqZoFXNE_OY35qtgDWObOLECB5-aLPR0RZWCfIMOHSWioCtAaDClV4NedPp5aSjJFpUghw6LyQgGWluhgOMr6XTns9Ig22JmlXfmxKPXBH7ittT1Jr4Jg8VOWrdaePABh)** We need your help to fight back against them. We need to show the voters in Georgia how low some folks are willing to go to defame me and poison my image ahead of November's election.

If you reject the LIE that Black and Brown Americans are required to be Democrats, as some mistakenly believe, **[would you chip in $4, $10 or maybe even $25 right now to help our campaign set the record straight?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=c839d688a7524c17bbd47420da37c4da&_e=Bua3NIOz1_KlrnkMVxf54dQFWtPkYIj6Xexar75F84_Pwd8HC69IDMZmGAZJvXofbYLSDB-QXNQIljhJyS5QAQkzL7_dPSczVzEnKBpfXBUfjkkB3NwxadZV8UUAMG4bgf2Xw1fgvTt6V7eJId4DDnXq8H5KyJBic_h0S4B1cIOFvx8mwfF3Y_IP2iBYh4qzL5gcgC6w_1A8zaN-fmqE5-ZoOsaxsd6A7bKKr1QcIBYdRK8sKB35Ob4rffOhFX5h0fNZME32XEFc1z-QXm5eGgAZVjGrQGWbTOjSoSzkxgXvHVo03G8-d8-zU5IxDqmg95xw9vwpJxWsL_-Ztz4QjoQWVGFYXYxLqkIddIkr-8uYtywHYSYn3J6DyC6QwH5LFtND-bdXuwd3XDe2lumpP2bMjAeodhWZEopkm9I0Bu-C8rR-R6upiy_szaJEm4e4YyEWpAYCi7u3j9IZ9dc6WV9ZiguN5qiHeiRKj-mTnrUIs_39sge8vKIr_W74LGul)**

President Biden believes this lie. You'll recall that he told a Black radio host in 2020 that, "If you have a problem figuring out whether you're for me or Trump, then you ain't Black."

**I categorically reject that mindset. It's garbage.**

_**Nobody tells me what to think or how to vote. I study the issues and make up my own mind informed by my faith and values.**_

The simple truth is that the people making these racist attacks against me believe I pose a threat to the Democrat Party's hold over Black voters. They're attacking because they're scared.

**[Please help our campaign fight back against these racist attacks by chipping in whatever you can right now.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=c839d688a7524c17bbd47420da37c4da&_e=Bua3NIOz1_KlrnkMVxf54dQFWtPkYIj6Xexar75F84_Pwd8HC69IDMZmGAZJvXofbYLSDB-QXNQIljhJyS5QAQkzL7_dPSczVzEnKBpfXBUfjkkB3NwxadZV8UUAMG4bgf2Xw1fgvTt6V7eJId4DDnXq8H5KyJBic_h0S4B1cIOFvx8mwfF3Y_IP2iBYh4qzL5gcgC6w_1A8zaN-fmqE5-ZoOsaxsd6A7bKKr1QcIBYdRK8sKB35Ob4rffOhFX5h0fNZME32XEFc1z-QXm5eGgAZVjGrQGWbTOjSoSzkxgW8Ec2VwhZBgOr5qp91yMnMV_qGWXpAE2t8QoLIWqal2XGjHHj8do_lWOP50K_5UhrcrryAbp0Kf7V4-QnOU9XRv8zGQ4PzdWg0Y3UHRj8AdqYIyLka2xzNYp4EUXBAesWk-o8vT-98XbowazZ3WgkZbKs0RtL_YnSZ0ex6AAJjvi2nTaMlTqbq7_IkyiHmD45OcnSLVzIlYCebf5tbFhli)**

Thank you for helping us defeat these lies and win this critical Senate race.

Respectfully,

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=c839d688a7524c17bbd47420da37c4da&_e=Bua3NIOz1_KlrnkMVxf54dQFWtPkYIj6Xexar75F84_Pwd8HC69IDMZmGAZJvXofbYLSDB-QXNQIljhJyS5QAQkzL7_dPSczVzEnKBpfXBUfjkkB3NwxadZV8UUAMG4bgf2Xw1fgvTt6V7eJId4DDnXq8H5KyJBic_h0S4B1cIOFvx8mwfF3Y_IP2iBYh4qzL5gcgC6w_1A8zaN-fmqE5-ZoOsaxsd6A7bKKr1QcIBYdRK8sKB35Ob4rffOhFX5h0fNZME32XEFc1z-QXm5eGgAZVjGrQGWbTOjSoSzkxgUU3xIZhOthzQ-WBa8XGRYArqYPfEJChqms3rZUq267C5zF3_HNRF1lMaIv7Snhj-KKQUMM9egdeyedsPV_8U_EG2DfNZpj2nJsdos33GoLyavbAMyRDCX-QCcy78iO9yT71Vmxe-7EaSTHkqi12UDElL2MHnD2XFjkZ8RUJRWlqHikVuBSV1OnLqlQzsFtzzRWHmmVkn6aSP5U2LeZkMM4)

clean_body: The simple truth is that the people attacking me know I pose a threat to the Democrat Party’s hold over Black voters. | Fellow American, I'm sad to be writing to you - yet again - about racist attacks against our campaign for U.S. Senate. First, a liberal commentator began his barrage of attacks against me by writing in The Nation : | "Herschel Walker's candidacy is a white insult to Black people." Then he went on MSNBC to say: "I make a hard distinction between Black conservatives and these tokens" - referring to Senator Tim Scott (R-SC) and me - "who are out here right now, shucking and jiving for their white handlers." Now, The Washington Post has published new attacks from other detractors: "Walker has positioned himself into being a useful fool for those who don't have the best interests of Black people or this democracy at heart." and "[Herschel Walker's] irrelevant to the Black community, and we should treat him as such." We need your help to fight back against them. We need to show the voters in Georgia how low some folks are willing to go to defame me and poison my image ahead of November's election. If you reject the LIE that Black and Brown Americans are required to be Democrats, as some mistakenly believe, President Biden believes this lie. You'll recall that he told a Black radio host in 2020 that, "If you have a problem figuring out whether you're for me or Trump, then you ain't Black." I categorically reject that mindset. It's garbage. Nobody tells me what to think or how to vote. I study the issues and make up my own mind informed by my faith and values. The simple truth is that the people making these racist attacks against me believe I pose a threat to the Democrat Party's hold over Black voters. They're attacking because they're scared. Thank you for helping us defeat these lies and win this critical Senate race. Respectfully, Herschel Walker PROUD AMERICAN | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

name: Shahid Buttar
subject: Mothers Day stands for something
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shahid Buttar for Congress Committee, 1390 Market St
body:
The first San Francisco broadcast or print outlet to cover the federal election in one month hosted a powerful discussion last night. | | |
---
| | Dear Peter, **** Whether your mother's still in your life, or has instead already moved beyond this one, we wish you a healthy and insightful Mothers Day. While many celebrate Mothers Day as a celebration of mothers, it began as a commemoration of interests shared by mothers around the world. Advocate Julia Ward Howe wrote a Mother's Day Proclamation in 1870, almost two generations before Mothers Day became an official holiday in the U.S. **[Can you join us today so that we can stand taller in Julia Ward Howe's footsteps and help educate more voters previously unaware of how the corporate Democratic Party actively undermines its stated values under its current leadership?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTCxhAMhTRXK4t_BbI_sQ5MIIEvV7NdkpWu66heNQSkVbUpNxVivJFXwFPSR5cPq3_Oa5SPHONLNEuEmtm2S5LLeCMScOHsBLEXWSsKBnyOHi7ILjNnwAh2Ps-4PBa6-HM4155wAWc1eTRFp3wnOOuYlbgSor2gmJnLantV3mnjjS1VfJNM11N0FBYb-vqdnT1DLTd-HLR3OUUHskq2LUB6K9bfUQI9MMkyBIV8kL-GoPwprnpygj76kYMTVNY0csXjji8kj4p5j_lDDHOULhHb6jFdSL2G_voSF8yGcZFVX8aTi6jz4q7UE8g2Anqs5xMA/3lv/-1gl9nZcSTKX-s-fHhN8FA/h0/SDDN7IoUdWPPU5dgv0bLZ__SFH6k4OVWzimYEM78wFg)** Julia Ward Howe wrote: “Arise, then... women of this day!
Arise, all women who have hearts,
whether our baptism be that of water or of tears!
Say firmly:
We will not have great questions decided by irrelevant agencies.
Our husbands shall not come to us, reeking with carnage,
for caresses and applause.
Our sons shall not be taken from us to unlearn
all that we have been able to teach them of charity, mercy and patience.
We, women of one country, will be too tender of those of another country
to allow our sons to be trained to injure theirs.
From the bosom of the devastated earth a voice goes up with our own.
It says: Disarm, Disarm!
The sword of murder is not the balance of justice.
Blood does not wipe out dishonor,
nor violence vindicate possession.
As men have often forsaken the plough and the anvil
at the summons of war,
let women now leave all that may be left of home
for a great and earnest day of council. Let them meet first, as women, to bewail and commemorate the dead.
Let them then solemnly take council with each other as to the means
whereby the great human family can live in peace,
each bearing after his own kind the sacred impress, not of Caesar,
but of God. In the name of womanhood and of humanity, I earnestly ask
that a general congress of women, without limit of nationality,
may be appointed and held at some place deemed most convenient,
and at the earliest period consistent with its objects,
to promote the alliance of the different nationalities,
the amicable settlement of international questions,
the great and general interests of peace.“ ~ Julia Ward Howe [**Join us today to send a voice to Washington who has stood with mothers who prefer peace over militarism, to help end the cycle of corrupt weapons contracting that continues to drive conflict around the world!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTCxhAMhTRXK4t_BbI_sQ5MIIEvV7NdkpWu66heNQSkVbUpNxVivJFXwFPSR5cPq3_H8fPScE0cJE3PcbhBH2xUIjripDAo6QSC6ooWdnoUEGqy3r3l5belYCawnBO78mX4BMVqGVvt7v-HsdA0Mq1fHVcsnHdaWwSyPVX-e7d2oJqwHEgqaVkW_93um1w8YhAIUkkA6z8XaUSloPNXPutJ5LJlWr2sPFJ0NVa-pxbVL7tNVpnKnig1fGCMpIcVLRLIU3A3BMlQMMipYny9o3jXv-Tt-n-H-WTJdvL7Xnkf26eXQFAjh3K4c0iQSiZBp6eA/3lv/-1gl9nZcSTKX-s-fHhN8FA/h1/qdGS7EtKIAGuIf7qC2hhhpumnuC6x2zkHKo-vVyIdrI)
I am often driven to consider the families left behind in the wake of Washington's bombs. It's those mothers, from Laos to Yemen, and from Nicaragua to Afghanistan—and their counterparts who our country's corporate weapons drove to early graves—who I remember on Mothers Day. That's why this isn't a day I particularly think of as "happy." Thankfully, my mother died peacefully from natural causes. She had access to medical care throughout the illness that eventually took her from us in 2016. I held her hand in the moments that she left us, and feel as close to her now as I did when she was alive. My memories of her are generally joyful. But she didn't raise me to think only of myself, or of her. Too many today have been forced to mourn either their mothers, or their children, or others in their family denied the basic right to healthcare, or subjected to predatory policing, or sacrificed in a war for Wall Street. Too many more are poised to mourn in the future if we don't force change on Washington now. [**Can you join us today to finally help bring the cycle of misery and destruction to an end? We'd rather spend the $33 billion Congress is currently considering for weapons on ending homelessness and child poverty instead.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTCxhAMhTRXK4t_BbI_sQ5MIIEvV7NdkpWu66heNQSkVb48UV3UH-a_tms_vdqufQX0S0R8IBXI-BkYOxn59Ctb-WVcWJJVcQNH7ex8xvhtAp2-qGnr6lVzX6wGvn4qgIWLv-VOT2iJm__e5iWAGUDdQB90x8s1KQPl97r189Zt7IgJowKYbJ1AtBG4xf7icONmMHH2FPaM1mObe4Ol_LSEypiXYcSo1Kr22zKftfvRRGk40N-uy8TAv9JK6At44cEIfraKDkJR4EOi0-ouVuHU7q6SMPjvVA8_STZaSvEkDJDY0cwNs4fP6xb0VDaU0vYQ/3lv/-1gl9nZcSTKX-s-fHhN8FA/h2/lmcTkEtEw39Z6VTa3yI0jLAKlWHYOQwnQ2rg2Af81iA) It's tough to think of mothers today, in 2022, without considering the women across the U.S. living in fear of being forced to bring unwanted pregnancies to term should the Supreme Court ultimately issue a majority opinion in _Dobbs v. Jackson Women’s Health Organization_ aligned with the one that was recently leaked. This is a frustrating moment for many reasons, not the least of which is that Democrats could have stopped this from happening in any number of ways. Pelosi could have passed a bill to codify _Roe_ when Democrats held both the Senate and the House, but she chose other priorities. She could have at least delayed the confirmation of Justice Amy Coney Barrett, but she chose instead to defer, while Sen. Dianne Feinstein outrageously described her confirmation hearings as among the proudest moments of her career! **We need not accept congressional complicity**. I first suggested last week in an interview with Katie Halper, and explored again with Mutiny Radio yesterday, a strategy for blue states to escalate resistance to the Supreme Court’s demagoguery and force the Court to reconsider its reactionary assault on fundamental rights.
When North Carolina passed a bill in 2016 to marginalize trans community members by restricting their access to public restrooms assigned to their chosen gender, allies elsewhere responded by passing boycotts. Artists refused to perform. Corporations relocated their conferences. **North Carolina paid an economic price for choosing to discriminate, and ultimately stepped back from its previous stance within a year.** **If blue states pass boycott bills pledging to prohibit public spending within states that deny women’s rights, the economic impacts of the 2016 boycotts targeting North Carolina would pale by comparison**. If California leads, other states would likely follow. That strategy would threaten interstate commerce and capital, which are the only things to which Washington shows any loyalty. **[Can you support our campaign today? With less than a month before the jungle primary on June 7 to replace a conservative Democrat complicit in the rise of the right wing, your support could not come at a more crucial time.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTCxhAMhTRXK4t_BbI_sQ5MIIEvV7NdkpWu66heNQSkVb48UV3UH-a_tms_vdqufQXyE0pUrA4prBMZVtgClOaowPiQ7oJEqxDrdqCWnp8FWs-0Bvms12G4mjG2ySvhFV0b7a8b46uE2kZ40VzXa2KpdvA8QfT5BZv2oQouDWtx7dje712m8TVMZfVh0NXtPXXW1aYbxbJSdC4lFvWl_gJ-iIdcaRGEQ0FDxU6s52MB2HqxQWGzo4EAxTb5M51EFfDcI6TsoLXSqm0DEAzNOx0h64W1Ebi4F0zuYRiCIYGVc7-rAjIjNGw9ifM6TLBPmwkA/3lv/-1gl9nZcSTKX-s-fHhN8FA/h3/v7w2DJRPFE0mbu0-Q9XYXejfcV5QQDchvD7pqARDOd0)** I’m eager to serve in Washington as a representative of San Francisco, and the visionary values that once inspired our city to lead the progressive movement. But even without a seat in Congress, I've built a long history of building grassroots action opportunities to hold institutional power accountable. I wish that history were less relevant today, and hope that your celebration of mothers can include a reflection on the concerns that have united so many of them for so long across so many countries. Your voice,
Shahid PS -- Looking for ways to support the movement to end corruption in person? [Join us this Wednesday, May 11 at Madrone Art Bar](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlWdUevJCi0PIFikQWEJM1gNXpwhf1cxTOck_11P1fX7C3JT36hDAveMif4w6BS2IOZHFJBq34sDCXotiIGEceivDF_pAP58eALrDi1F8A6vPhNZsSkGGfy4_2LeSgFx4wiU70aPRzvwA28q4bQekgz3fwzt461UNeQZR2D31kfzuwOQtpKMi0YDr5pHFr18oGiWUeYTEvNm_jVnvEIT0BOUO4V1vZQwKE_42wyUSZfVzZsHU-lwYyG_oz7M7qD9_dvLEf_NdgrySfGjj7dnsWg-gtpIqVFSf7gDhV1IBoTCsowpdyVpeR4E9ChGKfDeBs/3lv/-1gl9nZcSTKX-s-fHhN8FA/h4/FlBmgR0e3PbYU3qP_uDvxApxDLyYQMS6cOZ_F04tj8E) (at Divisadero & Fell in the Lower Haight) to meet other supporters and learn how you can support our efforts over the next month! We're also hosting [a special event on Sunday, May 22](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnrSAce6vPbDucK26AnlF3s6zlK0fpjnsLlFGOmuQJcSf56Lcxt2SSLuMMcL3MvNTETi1v3krRf8rA7gSuFTkSwyjl2ojBFGuU0dCAYgahCKR33K7WwBvwC8Vi__OhAJX2aSOHNuTONiJcD9XuEMoHech7qp-BM73idu5Qe5g-it2ooIfNQkMFHQpzulCaluq3GxofwfyV_jJMhw96Q-RYaxPcgrBOPkXrqw12WwaFokoIxc8Wy4nCBKuMidH3yIhjcGTSZ_Jhe6FZK3_DI4HsOuyQ-eMAtFrp7w9EPSUrj17lopQg118uoS9ePG3HPQKLQS2mV8EoFT0cmEDAHGFuT/3lv/-1gl9nZcSTKX-s-fHhN8FA/h5/EH8q39-cfPT36XLH4PAbbnoDNJjNz_YR1FO0WINNQyk) featuring music, food, and a presentation about the history of San Francisco's countercultures in an iconic setting. See you there!
